Hi Peter,
This November, we celebrate the richness and diversity of our Native American communities. Arizona has one of the largest Native populations in the country and is home to 22 federally recognized tribes.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110923_nativeamericanheritage [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110923_nativeamericanheritage]
On so many issues, like environmental and social justice, Native Americans have been at the forefront of these fights. This Native American Heritage Month, may we recognize the significant contributions they’ve made to our country and recommit ourselves to making progress on these vital issues.
Happy Native American Heritage Month!
Team Terán

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, On the same day I took the witness stand, one of the Republican presidential candidates chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a "fatal" mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. Let me clear something up for this very confused little RINO. At the end of the day, it's not the GOP that lets a person be the presidential nominee... It 's the VOTERS who choose our nominee. If the Party establishment can hijack the primary in order to steal the nomination from the most popular GOP candidate in history and cancel YOUR vote, then the GOP will have become no different from the tyrannical Democrats who are trying to remove my name from the ballot. The only thing "fatal" I see is this candidate's chances of EVER having a future in politics. He will "get the BOOT" - as they say - and fade into oblivion. But that's what you get when you choose to side with the tyrannical Biden regime for the sake of your own political ambitions. OH WELL! Very soon, the primary will be OVER - and we will instead be able to focus 100% of our time, resources, and efforts on FIRING the tyrannical crook in the White House. And the truth is - polls consistently show that I am the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe. Together, we will wrap up the primary ASAP and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you, Donald J. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: one year ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, one year ago this week, I was elected Governor of Pennsylvania. Every day since then – waking up with the responsibility of serving our Commonwealth – is a great honor. And it’s a responsibility I don’t take lightly. I want to tell you more about how we made history last year and everything we’ve accomplished since then, but before I go on, [_**will you consider pitching in a few dollars to help us keep up the momentum and continue bringin real freedom and real opportunity to Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108813/437422645/1945296156?refcode=email_110923_One-year-ago&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGQ5ZjRlYi01YzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x52y29Tyy2PeV-EbnchYRmn_FQcsbhDPLdyiaUAN1cw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108814/437422647/1945296156?refcode=email_110923_One-year-ago&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGQ5ZjRlYi01YzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x52y29Tyy2PeV-EbnchYRmn_FQcsbhDPLdyiaUAN1cw=)
---
Election Day 2022 was one of the most exciting (_and nerve wracking!_) days of my life, but I knew we’d left everything on the field.
We showed up everywhere.
I visited Pennsylvanians in their homes and in their union halls. I went to our places of worship and our community centers. I walked our main streets and I visited our big cities and our farms. And most importantly, I listened and I learned from the good people of Pennsylvania.
We treated everyone with respect, and people from all walks of life, all areas and all political parties united under the vision that we laid out for the commonwealth.
**On Election Day, we didn’t just earn a record number of votes, but we won in places where Democrats had not competed effectively for far too long. We won in places that the pundits had written off. We proved that if we show up, Democrats can win again.**
Since then, we’ve continued working together to bring real freedom and real opportunity to every community in our Commonwealth. From creating good-paying jobs that don’t require a college degree to enacting universal free breakfast at every Pennsylvania public school, I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together so far.
But I also know my work is far from finished. Attacks on abortion rights and voting rights won’t end anytime soon — **that’s why I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me keep up the fight.**
[_**We’ve made so much progress in just a year, but we can’t slow down now. As we mark one year since our historic victory, will you chip in to help me keep fighting?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108815/437422648/1945296156?refcode=email_110923_One-year-ago&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGQ5ZjRlYi01YzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x52y29Tyy2PeV-EbnchYRmn_FQcsbhDPLdyiaUAN1cw=)

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: I “subpoenaed” Chairman Comer:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Team, Chairman Comer subpoenaed the Biden family this week over a $200,000 loan that President Biden allegedly gave his brother.

**So I "subpoenaed" Chairman Comer back because, in case he forgot, he did the same thing — giving his brother a $200,000 personal loan.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108861/437423485/-349209756?amount=5&refcode=JMFC_20231109_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYzZDg2Ni01ZDdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKN_sPPafF5qofQH_nqJoX6Zt_ttwBbhwJd0BV81hs=) I don't mean to mock — but when it comes down to it, this probe is a mockery in itself.

**Since being appointed to the Oversight Committee, I've never been shy about pointing out to Chairman Comer the fact that we haven't held one hearing on the gun violence epidemic.**

The Biden Family probe is a distraction and just another event in the circus that is the MAGA-led House.

[**I'm in Congress to fight for common sense solutions — and I'll never let Chairman Comer and the rest of the MAGA Republicans brush that under the rug. But they're already targeting my seat — so I need your help. Will you give $5 or $10 right now to my campaign? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108862/437423486/-349209756?amount=10&refcode=JMFC_20231109_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYzZDg2Ni01ZDdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKN_sPPafF5qofQH_nqJoX6Zt_ttwBbhwJd0BV81hs=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73108863/437423487/-349209756?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&refcode=JMFC_20231109_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYzZDg2Ni01ZDdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=blKN_sPPafF5qofQH_nqJoX6Zt_ttwBbhwJd0BV81hs=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20J.=20Lee?=
subject: Anti-Israel Democrats
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0a9d2c29bc53/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12663932?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=3e216a0344&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,
The United States has no better friend abroad than the State of Israel. From supporting democratic values, standing against terrorism, trade, and spiritual connections that bond us, Israel-United States relations are vital for global stability and security.
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=176d0d3384&e=91a702298f)
Despite this, **Steven Horsford decided to give Israel the cold shoulder.**
**He recently**[**voted against**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=c8c816237f&e=91a702298f)**a critical aid package for Israel, alongside many far-left Members of Congress who are hostile to our friends in the Middle East.**
America has seen a dangerous growth in anti-semitic vitriol that endangers Jewish Americans, and actions like the ones taken by Horsford set a dangerous precedent. Especially when they refuse to call out those in their conference who call for the destruction of Israel.
While Horsford is too scared to call it out, I am here today to tell you that I stand 100% with Israel and against the growing anti-semitism that is festering in America. It will not stand if I am your next representative for NV-04.
[**Can you help me flip the script in Nevada by sending a contribution of any size to make sure that we flip this district in 2024? >>**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=f40b500f32&e=91a702298f)
| [HELP ME STAND WITH ISRAEL >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=bcd95b7708&e=91a702298f)
---
| [END DEMOCRATIC RULE IN NEVADA >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=9b3da2c3b2&e=91a702298f)
---

**For Nevada,**_Fmr. Mayor John Jay Lee_ Candidate for Congress, NV-04

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: time to impeach ⏱️
body:
We don't need more hearings. We need action. We need accountability.

Hi Peter - did you see the news last night in Texas?

A smuggler transporting illegal immigrants over the border crashed head on into another vehicle while trying to evade authorities, killing eight people ... including two innocent Americans.

Biden's border crisis has become a war zone with no end in sight. No one in the Biden Administration seems to care.

We don't need more hearings. We need action. We need accountability at the top.
That's why I'm calling for Congress to impeach Biden's Homeland Security chief Alejandro Mayorkas.

Mayorkas' record in keeping our homeland safe - his literal job - is disgraceful. Americans are dying. He needs to be removed from office.

If you agree that it's time for Congress to hold Secretary Mayorkas accountable, will you join me in calling on Congress to launch impeachment proceedings against him? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_11923&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=b467349823-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

SIGN THE PETITION (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_11923&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=b467349823-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Just look at his record...

Nearly 8 million illegal immigrants have crossed our border since Biden took office, the highest number in U.S. history. 264 potential terrorists have been caught trying to enter the U.S.

Meanwhile, at least 1.6 million illegal immigrants are known to have got away ... and those are just the ones we know about!

Mayorkas has had three years to change course and secure our border or demand action from President Biden. He has failed. He even refuses to call it a crisis!

That's why I'm asking you to sign my petition calling for immediate impeachment proceedings against Secretary Mayorkas. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_11923&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=b467349823-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

I can't sit by and do nothing while our national security falls apart and the Biden Administration turns our southern border into a war zone.

I bet you can't either.

Hope you're with me on this,

Max Ukropina
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/flipca47red_contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=impeachmayorkas_11923&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=b467349823-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

clean_body: Because of YOU It’s been a journey. | | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally say thank you. Last night, I had the opportunity to take the stage for my third presidential debate and prove to America that I am the ONLY candidate who can win this fight and save our country's future. From the moment I left the stage, I've been FLOODED with a nonstop SURGE OF SUPPORT. | We're closer than ever to VICTORY , but our work is far from over. We must continue the momentum, never let up, and keep pouring 100% into every day. With only 67 DAYS until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come. The stakes are now higher than ever to win this race. With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. As president, I will focus on the issues that MATTER like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border. We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen. I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for! My very best, Nikki R. Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

body:
|

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73109064/437427211/1841479525?refcode=20231109_HHDamikolas_DON&sourceid=1052322&refcode2=WTEFHK22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDliZDQ3Ni01ZTdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vEnhlOzyoYdOcAyO-srJQv3YAL7Lrbb0IUzSYQVdJ4=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73109065/437427212/1841479525?refcode=20231109_HHDamikolas_DON&sourceid=1052322&refcode2=WTEFHK22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDliZDQ3Ni01ZTdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4vEnhlOzyoYdOcAyO-srJQv3YAL7Lrbb0IUzSYQVdJ4=) Peter, I'll always be open with you about where I stand on the issues.

**If elected, I would stand with women and vote to protect reproductive freedom.** _My opponent, Young Kim, would enact a nationwide abortion ban._

**I would vote to address the gun violence epidemic in this country.** _Young Kim has proven she won't defy the NRA and protect our communities from gun violence._

**I would vote to expand access to affordable health care.**_Young Kim has defended the GOP plot to kick millions off of their health insurance._

**I would vote to strengthen voting rights and our democracy.**_Young Kim voted twice to nominate an election conspiracy theorist as Speaker of the House._

Ultimately, it comes down to this: I'm running for Congress because I have a clear vision for how to improve the community and the country that I love so much. **And Peter, I'm running because I'm sick and tired of watching cowardly politicians like Young Kim sell us out as soon as they win an election.**

clean_body: | | | = = Peter, I'll always be open with you about where I stand on the issues. If elected, I would stand with women and vote to protect reproductive freedom. My opponent, Young Kim, would enact a nationwide abortion ban. I would vote to address the gun violence epidemic in this country. Young Kim has proven she won't defy the NRA and protect our communities from gun violence. I would vote to expand access to affordable health care.Young Kim has defended the GOP plot to kick millions off of their health insurance. I would vote to strengthen voting rights and our democracy.Young Kim voted twice to nominate an election conspiracy theorist as Speaker of the House. Ultimately, it comes down to this: I'm running for Congress because I have a clear vision for how to improve the community and the country that I love so much. And Peter, I'm running because I'm sick and tired of watching cowardly politicians like Young Kim sell us out as soon as they win an election. If you stand with me in this fight – and I really hope you do! – please pitch in whatever you can spare as a split contribution between our campaign and EMILYs List today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for standing with me. – Allyson = = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. name: Janelle Bynum
subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ll never put politics over people. You have my word on that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73109211/437430921/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.09_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA0NDkyZGYtNWY3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PMsNuX4g83EZi_xgY19N-bM8OO8YBSUjWezW25Z_Q64=)
Did you see what the new Speaker of the House said last week? **In an email to his supporters, Speaker Mike Johnson said:**
**“I __refuse__ to __put people over politics__.”**
This is both egregious and wholly emblematic of today’s Republican Party.

In a moment where our communities are hurting, **now more than ever we need leaders in Congress who will refuse to place political schemes over the people and communities they were elected to serve.**

The extremists running Washington DC – including Lori Chavez-Deremer and Speaker Mike Johnson – have proven that they’re unwilling to do so.

And that’s exactly why I’m running for Congress.

[**Oregonians deserve better than this. Fellow American,

I know you get a lot of these emails but you need to read this one. A lot of Republicans in Congress represent conservative strongholds that have no chance of flipping to the Democrats. Unfortunately, I’m not so lucky. I am defying the odds: I’m a Republican, a minority, and a woman that represents a major US city. This is extremely rare. _**The Democrats know how rare this is and they think they can buy my seat away, labeling me as their TOP TARGET in 2024.**_ I’ve lost an election before because the Democrats were able to silence my voice and ignore my supporters and I will not let Nancy Pelosi buy this race again but I really need your help. **This race is no longer only about Miami. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Without Florida, we’ll lose the Senate Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
It’s important. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Hi, there, I don’t know if you heard, but Sen. Joe Manchin just announced that he will not seek reelection in 2024. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Now that Republicans are all but guaranteed to flip West Virginia red, we absolutely need Florida to defend our Senate majority. Plain and simple.
Listen, there's absolutely no denying it — the path to defending the Senate runs right through Florida.
We've got to step up to the plate — so I’ve launched a $50,000 Emergency Goal, and I need your help to hit it. Will you split $5 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to make sure that we can flip Florida and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:

This changes everything. Without a Democratic incumbent running, we have almost no chance of holding West Virginia. Donald Trump won the state by almost 40 points.
Florida is a different story. Experts are already calling this one of the most competitive races in the nation — and last time Rick Scott only won his seat by 0.12%!
The path to the Senate runs DIRECTLY through Florida. I know it, you know it, Rick Scott knows it, and Mitch McConnell knows it. That means Rick Scott won’t be alone with his millions in this — the GOP will be spending more than ever to keep this seat red and defeat my campaign.
This race is in a statistical tie right now. But if we're outspent over these next few weeks, Rick Scott will retake the lead — and we may never catch back up.
This race in Florida is Democrats' BEST chance to save our Senate majority — and I'm counting on your help to win. Will you split $5 before 11:59 p.m. to flip Florida blue and save the Senate majority? We have to win, friend. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5]
Thank you. This makes this race harder, but I know with this team we will win.
— Debbie

body:
| | | Did you see Renee’s note? The current Speaker of the House is anti-science, anti-woman, and hostile to LGBTQ+ youth and we have _just one year_ to flip the house and make sure that in 2024 we have the majority that we need to pass our Kids First Agenda.

**Their Future PAC is laser focused on defending our allies in tough re-elections, and supporting new candidates who we know can win and help us pass crucial laws in the House.**

**_[We have 12 months to build out our endorsement program and spread the word. Can you rush a donation today to help us make sure that our leaders are putting kids first?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_vQKHstlaU_AXFZoncY3dDHme0e4k1CI_x7X0oY-Vqhr-CbeUJKUF8rEYYX_S_5yZf_hqu8trzfDRDOg_iE0MwFmgGOyKwZFAIJyPUZZIvdKbHr_txjQmGZKDvJ2CkMalbZANA04VnqDFaG02dlns2SXibLO-vHjo9NANRfSi5-sm9BCf2BmKx-Fs7LiszGKrbldB0QcmPqMFZxeMg_EX6MNI3ixOniUBc8mKInawEWXbrXRB6_U8j04I-7hnSv2Qg/416/P1nuUfrZTmuimbdaCfzxsA/h0/OpuwJlYZGlQYrofAGRfvOjWR3-TgewphKjwAVCYSrNw)_**

—Their Future PAC

_—Fwded Message:_

Our Kids First Agenda is a blueprint for Congress to prioritize future generations and ensure that all young people have the resources they need to be healthy and succeed.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_vQKHstlaU_AXFZoncY3dDHme0e4k1CI_x7X0oY-Vqhr53S1W_HKITjNNqsxabCSS1NN-81f483jgq25BHbRkK4ANy3PkyTAzbQ0wy3nr2-5etPG4nJUtJ10XyCf6fgfl67ip3lcmldCQix0A4bnsYI1ePsZhS4QVFJjGdZdoqgXBnkjBC5oejZLXEW8HutS-r4UyMuw82KMyZG2qL-6-7C8mWepYBOKUkx93z_WSjxV3nksmIfcvKzU6RFq8yieqo/416/P1nuUfrZTmuimbdaCfzxsA/h1/Jrt5EOflHp6ZRh56J-O4Q_CNVY8wg9NwkUFTHbqaqlk)
It’s a pretty simple roadmap: stop ruining the planet, give kids access to education, and protect them from getting shot. **_This shouldn’t be too much to ask and yet, we started the PAC because our current leaders are failing us in these fundamental ways._**

**In just one year we’ll elect a new Congress, and we need to make sure we elect a Kids First Majority who will prioritize future generations and the safety of America’s kids.**

**_[Can you pitch in today to help us elect a strong, pro-kid Congress in 2024?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_vQKHstlaU_AXFZoncY3dDHme0e4k1CI_x7X0oY-Vqhr0Efdn3P8RLgyFVKpGxPFs_Kx14rlgecH7ivKOWFPtvQWjdTEm4oA_zcJMmq47mgMxGJV4E7rsBGSs6MdcR6aZB1iJHkk_MNaBo-SqATj3ra2pU0NZmFIDqwJXoJA_EWKrz9if3GvQMLCbVUD6sxsubILeNKVT4T42fw1p968pqNVC2VY3zdJgrgu-wdJZYJKeSlihoYL2qNC_TMvwcfu-A/416/P1nuUfrZTmuimbdaCfzxsA/h2/GdGcB3Tvngtb1HMAcv5fDQdVzmP1Jvcpgiz4AMsNczs)_**

The elections may feel far away, but we have a lot of work to do. We’re focused on defending our allies in vulnerable seats, and electing new Kids First champions to make sure we have the majority we need in Congress next year to build safer communities, reduce childhood poverty, and ensure that we pass down a livable planet to the next generation.

**_[Don’t let the next generation down by sitting on the sidelines–rush a donation today so we can get to work now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_vQKHstlaU_AXFZoncY3dDHme0e4k1CI_x7X0oY-Vqhr70-6wXGcrSL-TIiLH-iv57qiyn_A2L4115jop0Gpassb5Xmp95Jyy0w5LvFTrhwGMvoSnSJoMnZXqGdJBBqukExU5i-5jfNclXSdNqKsth7pjBiIcF-GTnQkQZy8kFX17Sep9Ddv2SIF25gWbxKTR2UTNKY_TphTqCHPuTJtOwvIDvGBHsIwpC2rOGwfI8d1L2u81yM7C1VU-0aJWfidSU/416/P1nuUfrZTmuimbdaCfzxsA/h9/4nPxt00QSLSWbzUxL95_Vw5YctrLzpNHs-tiw2X6Fok)_**

Renee Harvey, Executive Director & Co-founder

I knew the battle I signed up for when I first announced my campaign to take on the darkest and most corrupt forces in our nation’s capital as a political outsider.
---
I knew that the Deep State would unleash the most vicious attacks upon me.
---
But, as I’ve said before, I truly feel bad for my family as they’ve had to endure these vicious attacks as well.
---

---

---

---
...They even want to invoke it upon my family.

---
This shows you the full extent of the _wickedness_ of the enemy that we are dealing with.

---

---

---

---
**This is why I so often say that the 2024 election is our final chance to save America.**

---
**_If we allow such vicious people to remain in power after committing such truly evil acts, then we will lose our glorious nation forever._**

clean_body: These are very, very sick people.| | | | | Patriot, I knew the battle I signed up for when I first announced my campaign to take on the darkest and most corrupt forces in our nation’s capital as a political outsider. I knew that the Deep State would unleash the most vicious attacks upon me. But, as I’ve said before, I truly feel bad for my family as they’ve had to endure these vicious attacks as well. They’ve been smeared, slandered, and subjected to disgusting intimidation tactics. They didn’t sign up for this. It’s not enough for Crooked Joe and the Deep State to try to destroy me and invoke the “corporate death penalty” upon me ... ...They even want to invoke it upon my family. This shows you the full extent of the wickedness of the enemy that we are dealing with. Crooked Joe and the Democrats want to show the nation that these are the consequences of choosing to put a political outsider in the White House. This is ultimately about instilling FEAR in the public. The fear that if you stand in the way of their Marxist agenda, then YOU could be INDICTED, ARRESTED, or IMPRISONED for your beliefs. The fear that if you give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, then they’ll even come after your family and loved ones. This is why I so often say that the 2024 election is our final chance to save America. If we allow such vicious people to remain in power after committing such truly evil acts, then we will lose our glorious nation forever. If you’re doing poorly right now due to the corrupt leftists running our country — people so sick that they would go after their political opponent’s own FAMILY members — then please do not donate. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: =?utf-8?B?QWxseXNvbiBNdcOxaXogRGFtaWtvbGFz?=
subject: throwback Thursday 📷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Friends, it’s throwback Thursday, so I wanted to share a photo:

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105950/images/Allyson%20Graduation%20Pic.png]

That’s me graduating from college! I remember the days of constantly studying and sitting through lectures like it was just yesterday. Time really does fly!

Through hard work, I was able to get my degree in chemical engineering. It wasn't easy, but getting a degree back then was more accessible than it was today.

For so many young Americans, college education is out of the question because of how expensive it has become.

In Congress, I’m going to do everything I can to make college more affordable and accessible. Can you chip in $25 to our campaign for Congress and help us win?

CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q4?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.09_B2_ThrowbackThursday_FriendsandFamilyList&amount=25]

We also need to work on uplifting education opportunities across the board. This means widening access to trade school and apprenticeship opportunities for students graduating high school.

As a Tustin School Board member, I know firsthand the struggles of our students and their families. They’re looking for leadership that will put their academic success and wellbeing first.

But, we won't be able to get this done unless we put our campaign in the best possible position to defeat my opponent, Young Kim. And that's something I'm going to need your help with.

Please friends, chip in any amount to our campaign for Congress and help uplift our next generation of leaders with the education opportunities they need to succeed.

CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q4?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.09_B2_ThrowbackThursday_FriendsandFamilyList_Opens]

Thanks for all that you do,

– Allyson

Paid for by Allyson for Congress
Allyson for Congress
PO Box 1813
Tustin, CA 92781-9998
United States

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/bern-and-revolution-13920538?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=1afdb0eaab&e=fee98d637f)

---
| Dear Friend:

**I am so honored to announce that our campaign has officially received the endorsement of Konstantine Anthony, Mayor of Burbank!**

Like me, Mayor Anthony believes in the power of a clean-money campaign and that elected officials should only be responsible to their constituents, not corporations. I know from my own lived experiences as a children’s court attorney that people aren’t getting their basic needs met. **I am running because our current representative, the incumbent, drowns out the voices of his constituents in CA-34, preferring to listen to the directions of the wealthy few.** That is why it’s so important that we elect individuals who will make sure the voices of those living and working in our community are heard.
Konstantine Anthony’s principled stance on crucial issues that our community cares about such as homelessness, immigration, and healthcare is an inspiration to all who hope to put power back in the hands of the people.

**“A true representative of the district, David Kim serves the people of District 34, not the corporations.” -Konstantine Anthony, Mayor of Burbank**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=028bdac88c&e=fee98d637f)
---
[ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=c94e470032&e=fee98d637f)
---
|
**🗳 ****REGISTER TO VOTE TODAY!**** 🗳** Election Day occurred in other states earlier this week, serving as a reminder that California's Election Day is just one year away. Have you registered to vote yet? Only 59% of eligible residents are registered to vote in CA-34! Where there are low voter registration rates, there are vast numbers of people whose voices remain unheard in the democratic process. It's not surprising that CA-34 is also one of the poorest districts across the state with a 21% poverty rate, compared to that of CA's poverty rate of 13.2%, and a 25% child poverty rate. In a city as diverse and influential as Los Angeles, this distressing statistic underscores a dire need for civic engagement. Every single vote carries the potential to influence critical policies that impact education, healthcare, housing, and public safety. By participating in the electoral process, voters can ensure that their voices are heard and represented in Washington D.C.

Can we count on you to elect someone who will represent our community in Congress? Register to vote or check your registration status at [registertovote.ca.gov](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=ac9fc47e92&e=fee98d637f)!

Join us, and help us knock on doors to register new voters! Become a volunteer today by clicking **[[here]](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=967c824702&e=fee98d637f)**.

Let's win this through the power of the people!
---
|

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Voters just made Ohio the seventh state to protect abortion access.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Missouri is next — and Josh Hawley is terrified.
#
Peter — voters just made Ohio the seventh state to protect abortion access after the fall of Roe v. Wade. **Missouri is next.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38947?refcode=em20231109-4156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4156%2E614464%2EZue3rA)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38947?refcode=em20231109-4156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4156%2E614464%2EZue3rA)**
**Here in Missouri, Josh Hawley has made banning abortion a family business.** He celebrated when our state became first in the nation to fully outlaw abortion access after Roe was overturned — even in cases of rape or incest.
And even more recently, Hawley used his position in the Senate to team up with his wife and a corporate judge who donated to his 2018 campaign to ban the most commonly used abortion pill in all 50 states:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38947?refcode=em20231109-4156&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4156%2E614464%2EZue3rA)

clean_body: Saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most. | | Peter - I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day. It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America. I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on. Why I need your help: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon. Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to "re-engineer" – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on. The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country. Their actions speak louder than their words, As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington. I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left. It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Tom Fitton
subject: Censorship Conspiracy EXPOSED!
body:
Happy Veterans Day!

[INSIDE JW]

EMAILS SHOW SURGEON GENERAL AND FACEBOOK COORDINATING COVID CENSORSHIP

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30675&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1Ja18tN1F0eEsyZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=4e5416275af117b73620717e2de51e16f61b53581526996c681c294087e598ea]

We received 14 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30666&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N1cmdlb24tZ2VuLWZhY2Vib29rLWNvbW1zLTAwMTEzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=932d41121aebc58cbe593c35990da78d6c6c6315874367ebe2c374e65b8cfc31]
of emails between U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy and top Facebook
executives in 2021 regarding the censorship of user posts about Covid
controversies. The emails show Facebook leadership seeking to
“better understand the scope of what the White House expects from us
on misinformation going forward.”

These emails confirm that Facebook censored Americans at the direction
of the Biden White House and Biden’s Surgeon General’s political
operation. This is a massive violation of the First Amendment.

We received these emails in response to our January 13, 2023, FOIA
lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=28787&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctc3Vlcy1oaHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=b42f8c2104f36685596fa460e13e6f7c8a34547a410b19c65c51e1c2d49736b6]
(_Judicial Watch,
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Health and Human Services_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=28779&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXN1cmdlb24tZ2VuLWNvbXBsYWludC0wMDExMy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=c13434eae760b566caaf88d8d6aa9764ee9c93560926e3fc74778fe6fc2700af]
(No. 1:23-cv-00113)) for:

> All records, including, but not limited to, electronic mail, texts,
> memoranda, and handwritten notes, of, regarding, referring, or
> relating to any efforts of Vice Admiral Vivek H. Murthy, MD, MBA,
> U.S. Surgeon General, to contact any employee of Facebook, Twitter,
> TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat, Reddit, YouTube, LinkedIn, Tumblr, and
> Pinterest concerning COVID-19 or COVID-19 vaccines.
On July 15, 2021, Murthy issued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=28780&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGhzLmdvdi9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzL3N1cmdlb24tZ2VuZXJhbC1taXNpbmZvcm1hdGlvbi1hZHZpc29yeS5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=e997b7bdbff0c72f7344a2059e86ed4d49bc6c490340849cc00ea93f822b95a2]
“Confronting Health Misinformation,” a 22-page document addressing
his concerns in multiple areas. These included social media, for which
it offered a number of suggestions to address misinformation:

> [M]ake meaningful long-term investments ... including product
> changes. Redesign recommendation algorithms to avoid amplifying
> misinformation, build in “frictions”—such as suggestions and
> warnings—to reduce the sharing of misinformation, and make it
> easier for users to report misinformation.

***

> Platforms should also address misinformation in live streams, which
> are more difficult to moderate due to their temporary nature and use
> of audio and video.

***

> Prioritize early detection of misinformation “super-spreaders”
> and repeat offenders. Impose clear consequences for accounts that
> repeatedly violate platform policies.

***

> Amplify communications from trusted messengers and subject matter
> experts. For example, work with health and medical professionals to
> reach target audiences. Direct users to a broader range of credible
> sources, including community organizations.
The newly obtained records show that on July 16, 2021, the next day,
Nick Clegg, vice president of Communications and Global Affairs at
Facebook, emails
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30667&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtaGhzLXN1cmdlb24tZ2VuLWZhY2Vib29rLWNvbW1zLTAwMTEzLXBncy0xLTkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=586e4bc08263b1d3075396279dd840f172bb63bd15fdd46c07d3c1f883eb03ff]
Murthy:

> Dear Vivek,
>
> Reaching out after what has transpired over the past few days
> following the publication of the misinformation advisory, and
> culminating today in the President's remarks about us. I know our
> teams met today to better understand the scope of what the White
> House expects from us on misinformation going forward.
>
> In our previous conversations I've appreciated the way you and your
> team have approached our engagement, and we have worked hard to meet
> the moment - we've dedicated enormous time and resources to fighting
> this pandemic and consider ourselves to be partners in fighting the
> same battle. Certainly we understand (and have understood for some
> time) that there is disagreement on some of the policies governing
> our approach and how they are being enforced - even as your team has
> acknowledged the unprecedented scale of our efforts to provide
> authoritative information to millions of Americans and to help them
> get vaccinated. But I thought the way we were singled out over the
> past few days has been both surprising and misleading, and I believe
> unproductive to our joint efforts too.
>
> I would appreciate the opportunity to speak directly to discuss a
> path forward with you and how we can continue to work toward what I
> sincerely believe are shared goals.
Murthy responds on July 19:

> Thanks for reaching out and for sharing your concerns. I know the
> last few days have been challenging. I'd be happy to speak directly
> about how we move forward. Let me know the best way to schedule some
> time later this week and we'll make it happen.
On July 23, Brian Rice, director of public policy for Facebook,
emails Clegg and Murthy:

> Including this week's updated report here. Look forward to
> scheduling our next working session. As always please let us know if
> you have any questions.
Also on July 23, Clegg writes to Murthy:

> Dear Vivek (if I may),
>
> Thanks again for taking the time to meet earlier today. It was very
> helpful to take stock after the past week and hear directly from you
> and your team, and to establish our next steps.
>
> We talked about the speed at which we are all having to iterate as
> the pandemic progresses. I wanted to make sure you saw the steps we
> took just this past week to adjust policies on what we are removing
> with respect to misinformation, as well as steps taken to further
> address the “disinfo dozen”: we removed 17 additional Pages,
> Groups, and Instagram accounts tied to the disinfo dozen (so a total
> of 39 Profiles, Pages, Groups, and IG accounts deleted thus far,
> resulting in every member of the disinfo dozen having had at least
> one such entity removed).
>
> We are also continuing to make 4 other Pages and Profiles, which
> have not yet met their removal thresholds, more difficult to find on
> our platform. We also expanded the group of false claims that we
> remove, to keep up with recent trends of misinformation that we are
> seeing.
>
> We hear your call for us to do more and, as I said on the call,
> we're committed to working toward our shared goal of helping America
> get on top of this pandemic. We will reach out directly to DJ to
> schedule the deeper dive on how to best measure Covid related
> content and how to proceed with respect to the question around data.
> We'd also like to begin a regular cadence of meetings with your team
> so that we can continue to update you on our progress. You have
> identified 4 specific recommendations for improvement and we want to
> make sure to keep you informed of our work on each.
>
> I want to again stress how critical it is that we establish criteria
> for measuring what's happening on an industry-wide basis, not least
> to reflect the way platforms are used interchangeably by users
> themselves. We believe that we have provided more transparency, both
> through CrowdTangle (the flaws of which we discussed in some detail)
> and through our Top 100 report, than others and that any further
> analysis should include a comprehensive look at what's happening
> across all platforms--ours and others - if we are going to make
> progress in a consistent and sustained manner.
>
> Finally, we will be sending you the latest version of our Top 100
> report later today, per our regular schedule. Brian will do the
> honors this week as it will likely be completed at our end later
> today East Coast time. We really do hope that we can discuss our
> approach to this data set in greater detail during our next session
> with DJ, as we genuinely believe it is an effective way of
> understanding what people are actually seeing on the platform.
>
> Once again, I want to thank you for setting such a constructive tone
> at the beginning of the call. We too believe that we have a strong
> shared interest to work together, and that we will strive to do all
> we can to meet our shared goals.

TRUMP ON TRIAL: JUDICIAL EXCESS, PARTISAN BIAS

What’s happening in a New York courtroom right now against former
President Trump is a flagrant abuse of power without precedent in our
nation’s history. Micah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter,
explains
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30642&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtb24tdHJpYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=5afbf70dea93e40500e7b6dffd2e125b47604bc2a30bca6a43df18471b3ca1a6]
in
_Investigative Bulletin_.

> Donald Trump took the stand Monday in New York State Attorney
> General Letitia James’s long running fraud litigation against the
> former president, a case filled with startling twists and turns
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30621&F=T&&hash=64eeb050f9c916b09fe60a2fd623b4766289c4a0afa67c1d41c998c6aa08eb20].

> On September 26, one week before the civil action was set to open at
> trial, the judge in the case delivered a surprise ruling. Justice
> Arthur Engoron issued an order canceling Trump’s certification to
> do business in New York. The order stripped Trump of control of the
> iconic Trump Tower; of a family estate and golf club in Westchester
> County; and of 40 Wall Street in Lower Manhattan, a lucrative
> commercial property. At times it seems as if the entire Trump family
> is on trial. Trump’s two adult sons, Don Jr. and Eric, were called
> to the stand
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30622&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmV3c21heC5jb20vdXMvdHJ1bXAtZG9uYWxkLWpyLWVyaWMvMjAyMy8xMS8wMi9pZC8xMTQwNzU1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=906c2b1cfaac9340723b1ad6b6f0ba466654ea1125d2f257eb424b3bc087cb62]
> by the prosecution last week; his daughter Ivanka is slated to
> testify this week.
>
> In her civil lawsuit
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30623&F=T&&hash=d561f889896373ee81f4f2fd5bf7527e9ba285b663f9f82d1680c941e11b3634],
> James alleged that Trump, Trump family members, and Trump
> Organization executives had committed fraud. Engoron agreed.
> Financial statements that Trump had submitted to banks and insurers
> to support real estate deals, wrote Engoron, “contain fraudulent
> valuations.” The Trump businesses would be placed in receivership
> “to manage the dissolution.”
>
> Legal experts attacked the Engoron ruling as harsh and
> unprecedented. “This is a version of business law capital
> punishment,” a Columbia Law School corporate law expert told
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30624&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL29waW5pb25zLzIwMjMvMTAvMDMvdHJ1bXAtZnJhdWQtdHJpYWwtbmV3LXlvcmstZXhjZXNzaXZlLXB1bmlzaG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=eb6d17c600cee2a59e1f3e211145de7435ee95e31bea71af9a8989b430a04289]
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30676&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL29waW5pb25zLzIwMjMvMTAvMDMvdHJ1bXAtZnJhdWQtdHJpYWwtbmV3LXlvcmstZXhjZXNzaXZlLXB1bmlzaG1lbnQvXXRoZT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=ae4f6d115b41b33591cf00739ac8356a65862d98b71c29cce3d6fa58b452f564
> Washington Post
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30624&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbnBvc3QuY29tL29waW5pb25zLzIwMjMvMTAvMDMvdHJ1bXAtZnJhdWQtdHJpYWwtbmV3LXlvcmstZXhjZXNzaXZlLXB1bmlzaG1lbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=eb6d17c600cee2a59e1f3e211145de7435ee95e31bea71af9a8989b430a04289].
> “I’m not aware of a precedent at this scale.”
>
> The non-jury trial opened October 2. The only issue left for trial
> is how big a penalty Trump will pay. James is looking for a fine
> upward of $250 million and Engoron himself will decide the penalty.
> But the deadlier blow already has been delivered with Engoron’s
> judicial strike against Trump businesses in New York.
>
> The optics of the case are hard to miss. Trump, the builder of
> business empires, is denuded of his empire. The frontrunner for the
> GOP presidential nomination is brought low.
>
> Which is precisely what James has been promising for years. A New
> York City Democrat from the progressive wing of the party, James
> made Trump the centerpiece of her campaign to become state attorney
> general. She repeatedly denounced Trump
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30625&F=T&&hash=55f0b6e9bff51c35946566ebf7a11ad880403405faa3f127fd8758b5f43d97d4]
> as an “illegitimate president” and vowed to “shine a bright
> light into every corner of his real estate dealings.”
>
> Engoron seems largely cut from the same political cloth. A longtime
> Democrat, he “has ruled repeatedly against Trump in the three
> years he’s been presiding over James’ lawsuit,” notes
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30626&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvdHJ1bXAtZW5nb3Jvbi1sZXRpdGlhLWphbWVzLWZyYXVkLW5ldy15b3JrLTliZDQyNjkwZDMyN2Y2ZjYzYzllYjMxYzA0NmY4NDI2P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c6fdc1a3d0fa60d7eb90060e95f53ffb5d538abfe0c9b482c787f6073c9e1437]
> the Associated Press. “He’s forced Trump to sit for a
> deposition, held him in contempt and fined him $110,000.” A
> graduate of Columbia University, Engoron once noted that he took
> part in “huge, sometimes boisterous, Vietnam War protests.” He
> has been a member of the ACLU for nearly thirty years. Trump and
> Engoron have sparred for weeks over a gag order
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30627&F=T&&hash=6248a7d1e69314f18b70d3592fc75bb3aa2a77e52a61d954dd085a0050009f96]
> imposed on the former president.
>
> Trump’s lawyers argue there was “no nefarious intent” in
> submitting the real estate valuations at the heart of the case.
> Trump lawyer Christopher Kise told the court that different
> financial estimates often simply reflect “change in a complex,
> sophisticated real estate corporation.”
>
> Banks and insurers doing business with the Trump Organization knew
> exactly what they were getting into, Kise said. “Banks and
> insurers know that the [financial] statements are estimates.” The
> banks were not victims, the defense argues, saying they made money
> from the deals.
>
> In a surprise twist shortly after the trial opened, a New York
> appeals court temporarily halted
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30628&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wLWxldGl0aWEtamFtZXMtZnJhdWQtbmV3LXlvcmstNzdmMzY5MWFkN2ZhNzNlYTAwOGYwNThhZTZmNzcyZDY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=aeef5f3ad81ef3d3653cef11f2b3d6741ab0fe96610a462d675e86aec9516a6d]
> Engoron’s order to dissolve the Trump business empire while Trump
> appeals the ruling. The trial was allowed to continue.
>
> But Trump appears resigned to his fate in Engoron’s court. Outside
> the courtroom, he has denounced the case as “a scam” and “a
> sham” and “an attempt to hurt me in an election.” Inside the
> courtroom, the Trump team continues to hammer away at the
> prosecution’s case, apparently laying the groundwork for an
> appeal. On the stand Monday, Trump denounced the proceedings as
> “very unfair” in a day of legal fireworks
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30629&F=T&&hash=55340045dc8d2c4f88658001e0e272ca35650957fccc29b3825e6bc232f39dd6].
>
> The Democrat leanings of James and Engoron, and oversteps by
> Engoron, increase Trump’s odds for a successful appeal. And then
> there is the larger question of the whole proceeding and its
> kangaroo court miasma: would this case ever have been brought
> against someone not named Trump?

FEDS PLAN TO LET FELONS, FRAUDSTERS INVESTIGATE HOUSING DISCRIMINATION

Those who have obeyed the law might legitimately wonder at allowing
those who haven’t to participate in undercover federal
investigations, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog suggests
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30643&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmVsb25zLWludmVzdGlnYXRlLWRpc2NyaW1pbmF0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a591af8adcffd1447deae6a6a5cc033e2a7e9c9bdd9096ad2f737376ba7ff9b0].

> As part of the Biden administration’s government-wide initiative
> to give criminals a second chance
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30677&F=T&&hash=2f215fd1f2088f254188a278591156f382961617e56633402e2e77a59eea5405],
> a federal agency plans to eliminate restrictions that prevent
> convicted felons from conducting investigations that often lead the
> Department of Justice (DOJ) to take legal action. It involves fair
> housing testers who help federal authorities gather evidence of bias
> and discrimination by going undercover in housing transactions that
> can expose wrongdoing. Technically, housing testers play a key role
> in government housing probes, and they are supposed to be carefully
> vetted.
>
> Now the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) wants to
> remove existing criminal conviction regulations for fair housing
> testers to make its “programs as inclusive as possible for people
> with criminal records.” In a notice
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30678&F=T&&hash=1f86cdfa679cc4e6875ac4e3aab554cffbb23f986452547ee94c623c76fa5b5a]
> published in the Federal Register, the agency proposes eliminating
> the restrictions for Fair Housing Initiatives Program (FHIP)
> grantees and Fair Housing Assistance Program (FHAP) agencies that
> forbid FHIP and FHAP recipients from using fair housing testers with
> prior felony convictions or convictions of crimes involving fraud or
> perjury. Besides making HUD programs as inclusive as possible for
> criminals, the agency writes that the proposed rule will ensure that
> it can “fully investigate criminal background screening policies
> that are potentially discriminatory under federal civil rights laws
> by using testers with actual criminal backgrounds.”
>
> In a press release
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30679&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaHVkLmdvdi9wcmVzcy9wcmVzc19yZWxlYXNlc19tZWRpYV9hZHZpc29yaWVzL2h1ZF9ub18yM18yNDc/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=fdf6196d53135002ba2745cc1c41b33da5e19038e84a28ade39e7921c7da9ff8]
> announcing the plan, HUD Secretary Marcia L. Fudge says “we trust
> fair housing testers to identify bias and discrimination in housing
> so we can fulfill our mission to root it out.” She continues:
> “Through this new rule, we can ensure people with criminal records
> who want to participate in this important work aren’t facing
> unnecessary barriers. People reentering society, and those with
> criminal records, deserve a fair shot at a second chance. This rule
> helps us get there.” The announcement also provides a link to a
> 2022 memorandum issued by Fudge titled “Eliminating Barriers That
> May Unnecessarily Prevent Individuals with Criminal Histories from
> Participating in HUD Programs.” In the memo, the housing secretary
> points out that we cannot ignore the fact that persons who have been
> involved with the justice system are disproportionately racial
> minorities, accounting for “discriminatory impact exclusions based
> on criminal history.”
>
> Even those who agree with second chances may reasonably question if
> convicted felons should participate in federal investigations. The
> DOJ’s Civil Rights Division uses information gathered by fair
> housing testers to enforce the Fair Housing Act, which prohibits
> discrimination based on race, color, religion, national origin,
> sexual orientation and gender identity, disability and familial
> status. In cases where investigations yield evidence of a pattern or
> practice of illegal housing discrimination, federal prosecutors file
> lawsuits. Since 1992 the DOJ has resolved 111 cases
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=30680&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L2ZhaXItaG91c2luZy10ZXN0aW5nLXByb2dyYW0tMT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=accaf34d9e225086f53eeae5f387bfbe1fc25090dd261fb8cf9ce50272cd689b]
with
> evidence directly generated from the Fair Housing Testing Program,
> according to government data. It has led to the recovery of more
> than $15.3 million, including over $2.3 million in civil penalties
> and north of $13 million in other damages. “The vast majority of
> testing cases filed to date are based on testing evidence that
> involved allegations of agents misrepresenting the availability of
> rental units or offering different terms and conditions based on
> race, and/or national origin, and/or familial status,” according
> to the DOJ. Combating race discrimination has been a central focus
> of the program, the agency confirms.
>
> Allowing convicted criminals to participate in federal housing
> investigations is part of a broader push by the Biden administration
> to “help people who were formerly incarcerated reenter society.”
> In a 2022 Proclamation on Second Chance, the president reminds the
> nation and all government agencies that millions of Americans have a
> criminal record that creates significant barriers to employment,
> economic stability, and successful reentry into society.
> “Thousands of legal and regulatory restrictions prevent these
> individuals from accessing employment, housing, voting, education,
> business licensing, and other basic opportunities,” the president
> writes in his proclamation. “Because of these barriers, nearly 75
> percent of people who were formerly incarcerated are still
> unemployed a year after being released.” In the document the
> commander in chief stresses the “racial inequities that lead to
> disproportionate numbers of incarcerated people of color and other
> underserved groups.”

HAPPY VETERANS DAY!

Judicial Watch’s anti-corruption work is the least we can do for our
country compared to the risks and sacrifices taken by those who
protected our Republic through military service. We all should pray
for peace – but Judicial Watch will, in the meantime, fight for the
truth. President Reagan’s 1985 Veterans Day remarks
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=7909&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudmEuZ292L29wYS92ZXRzZGF5L3NwZWFrZXJzLzE5ODVyZW1hcmtzLmFzcD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=bae5d92113148d9814314288e5f49e982e0e8332fe9f1b22ef2ca9b525913680]
are well
worth noting in these perilous times:

> And the living have a responsibility to remember the conditions that
> led to the wars in which our heroes died. Perhaps we can start by
> remembering this: that all of those who died for us and our country
> were, in one way or another, victims of a peace process that failed;
> victims of a decision to forget certain things; to forget, for
> instance, that the surest way to keep a peace going is to stay
> strong. Weakness, after all, is a temptation — it tempts the
> pugnacious to assert themselves — but strength is a declaration
> that cannot be misunderstood. Strength is a condition that declares
> actions have consequences. Strength is a prudent warning to the
> belligerent that aggression need not go unanswered.
>
> Peace fails when we forget what we stand for. It fails when we
> forget that our Republic is based on firm principles, principles
> that have real meaning, that with them, we are the last, best hope
> of man on Earth; without them, we’re little more than the crust of
> a continent. Peace also fails when we forget to bring to the
> bargaining table God’s first intellectual gift to man: common
> sense. Common sense gives us a realistic knowledge of human beings
> and how they think, how they live in the world, what motivates them.
> Common sense tells us that man has magic in him, but also clay.
> Common sense can tell the difference between right and wrong. Common
> sense forgives error, but it always recognizes it to be error first.
>
> We endanger the peace and confuse all issues when we obscure the
> truth; when we refuse to name an act for what it is; when we refuse
> to see the obvious and seek safety in Almighty. Peace is only
> maintained and won by those who have clear eyes and brave minds.
>
> Judicial Watch benefits from the unique experience of the veterans
> on our staff. And we are proud that countless veterans who, with
> “clear eyes and brave minds,” generously support
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65765&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5]
Judicial
> Watch’s work. Thank you all for your service and have a wonderful
> Veterans Day.

Until next week,
