name: Mike Soboleski
subject: Chinese marijuana operations in rural Maine is appalling
body:
my latest "We the People" update
[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-r/) Peter,_**Illegal Chinese marijuana is being grown in rural Maine right now.**_ Yesterday, The Maine Wire broke an incredibly serious story that you must take a moment to read and share with your friends and family. **[https://www.themainewire.com/2023/11/triad-weed-illegal-chinese-marijuana-grows-are-all-over-maine/](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-y/)** The government's failure to curb illegal Chinese marijuana operations in rural Maine is appalling.Mainers are living in towns rife with dangerous criminal organizations making millions in profit while nothing is done to stop it._**I won 't stand for it.**_That's why I sponsored L.R. 2903, _" An Act to Provide Investigative Authority to the Maine State Police, Sheriffs and Local Police Regarding Maine's Recreational Cannabis Laws and Ordinances to Ensure Proper Enforcement"_ so we can tackle this crisis head-on and take back our land and protect our Maine way of life.Unfortunately, the Democrat controlled Legislative Council rejected my bill today for no good reason.**This is a serious issue and we need action right now.** I'll keep you posted on the latest developments with this important story. [READ THE MAINE WIRE'S FULL STORY HERE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-i/) Stay safe, Mike Soboleski
Republican Candidate for Congress- CD-2 **FOLLOW MIKE ON SOCIAL MEDIA** [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-d/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-h/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-k/) [CHECK OUT MY CAMPAIGN WEBSITE](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-u/) | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country is going in the wrong direction. [Preferences](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/y-xfhikk-150DA8AB-ddldgdkhd-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xfhikk-ddldgdkhd-b/)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: We must remember what President Reagan said about God.

body:
"The time has come to turn to God and reassert our..."

|
---
| | |
**" The time has come to turn to God and reassert our trust in Him for the healing of America - our country is in need of and ready for a spiritual renewal." _\- Ronald Reagan_**
If only President Reagan could see us now, Friend.

Speaker Mike Johnson here, and I have a small favor to ask of you.

**Christian leaders throughout the country are raising the alarm as church attendance falls.**

Surveys show that not only are fewer Americans attending church every week, but fewer and fewer people are identifying as religious at all. It's clear that our country is in crisis, but I need to hear from God-fearing Americans like you on the matter. **[Will you take our Religion in America Survey and tell us what you've noticed in your church?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c3f5cf548cc478fb89afea4301b7458&_e=h1r_vfoplkl6-dAus71Nf-XbwrpFBSbaRp0UCSRXaxMK101AonJuZ5X71IQJ7znrHi6xQXfwFu3Mukb5L-QWOq319aqj1fjXe0wTkq2XmWfl15CTjCZ2Tlh04obQMPtNOtjQTT6f7-59hJU32bAxVrZQcMyWJXGNpceA65bb3_6INMGPy4q5vJY2rdQ87bK-KkdKUYw50Pc9rHT17R4QXwyngJQK95_5UymHq6cDD9JMbyl4HQCq4LHAtEoLOSDWnQ6Y-pTW99jiaedmPf6NtAY1XDmb4sGNyNgC49m93zPbUlHiFISjGc99S8O8JTQ-gqFxt609fZB2cZ3EEX52qCO47EmnoqO8aCx32Yn1xZZ1r5wvAU0nhXaRxr4xPBi2pKb1ekuZq-_1dJbjdvIjRobr2V4cIUR6BGmymoIz0JCKkpWP4g1mx1DRt97iqlpb9O1aFukRt209MvuGDCwIhA%3D%3D "Will you take our Religion in America Survey and tell us what you’ve noticed in your church?")**

**A more secular America is not a better America, Friend.**

Look around. Drugs and violence fill our streets, and children are fed lies about our history in school, as the filth that passes for popular culture these days encourages the next generation to embrace anti-Biblical lifestyle choices.

House Republicans and I are working overtime to reverse these troubling trends and turn America back towards God, but we can't do that without your help. **[Will you do your part and complete your Religion in America Survey today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c3f5cf548cc478fb89afea4301b7458&_e=h1r_vfoplkl6-dAus71Nf-XbwrpFBSbaRp0UCSRXaxMK101AonJuZ5X71IQJ7znrHi6xQXfwFu3Mukb5L-QWOq319aqj1fjXe0wTkq2XmWfl15CTjCZ2Tlh04obQMPtNOtjQTT6f7-59hJU32bAxVrZQcMyWJXGNpceA65bb3_6INMGPy4q5vJY2rdQ87bK-KkdKUYw50Pc9rHT17R4QXwyngJQK95_5UymHq6cDD9JMbyl4HQCq4LHAtEoLOSDWnQ6Y-pTW99jiaedmPf6NtAY1XDmb4sGNyNgC49m93zNVFlzCIjClmqWQ8nOeKmrDSkRrnes-XyWmCF5qRP-MGRWbWg0T6f1i78F9XlzHRlrjyFuRSx8PJhTk10zFpnVD0PuNMORecDnLFq_G_uIttfQL4SMeiT_HtPNeEDsGsv6pqanJkb7t0Gj-FPXKZFEwO4FYV2mQBFES2kimXL5ydA%3D%3D "Will you do your part and complete your Religion in America Survey today?")**

Speaker Mike Johnson here, and I have a small favor to ask of you. Christian leaders throughout the country are raising the alarm as church attendance falls. Surveys show that not only are fewer Americans attending church every week, but fewer and fewer people are identifying as religious at all. It's clear that our country is in crisis, but I need to hear from God-fearing Americans like you on the matter. House Republicans and I are working overtime to reverse these troubling trends and turn America back towards God, but we can't do that without your help. # **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| | _**A****Historic****Week**_****
---
Friends, This has been a big week for Indiana Republicans. On Tuesday, we wrapped up another municipal election cycle by flipping fourteen mayors' offices across the state leading to a new record of elected Republican mayors statewide. While we celebrate all or our work this election cycle, none was more historic than our victory in Marion, Indiana where Ronald Morrell Jr. was elected the first Black Republican mayor in the state. Ronald was one of six graduates of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series (IRDLS) who were on the ballot on Tuesday. He and Council Woman Elect Tiffanie Ditlevson of Fishers were both winners. After only three years of our IRDLS, it was fantastic to have six graduates on the ballot and two get elected. While this progress is exciting, this is the just the beginning and the work to continue to build and grow our party continues. As such, we are excited to announce the [launch of applications for the fourth class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/fb9e1e6da81e9ee83947229f28c3afba/6ef414727b8b7bb7c3d6b838967d376c/40313 "https://www.indiana.gop/IRDLS/apply") Following the impressive success the program has had to date, the party is dedicated to further advancing its mission of bolstering its growth. This leadership initiative reflects the Indiana Republican Party's firm commitment to genuinely engaging with minority communities and building robust relationships. The upcoming fourth class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series is poised to offer a dynamic and enriching experience for participants. Monthly meetings will cover essential topics including civic engagement, campaign management, strategic communications, fundraising, and state government, providing a unique two-way learning opportunity for both class members and elected officials. As the [application ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/fb9e1e6da81e9ee83947229f28c3afba/d310734465a77ce0c3d6b838967d376c/40313 "https://www.indiana.gop/IRDLS/apply")process begins, the party invites individuals from diverse backgrounds and experiences to apply for this transformative journey. The application form is available online and must be submitted by December 31st. Following the application period, interviews will be conducted, with the selected participants for the fourth class announced in January 2024. The program is set to commence in February 2024. Please share this with your networks and encourage anyone interested to apply!
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---

# ** _🚗 Gov. Holcomb Celebrated the Launch of the New Lexus TX at Toyota of Indiana_**
---
---
| | **[Governor Eric Holcomb](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/fb9e1e6da81e9ee83947229f28c3afba/c86e546322c50672c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** delivered remarks to commemorate the line off of the all-new Lexus at Toyota Motor Manufacturing Indiana. “Thrilled to witness the launch of the new Lexus TX at Toyota of Indiana in Princeton today. Hoosier hands showcasing their skill and dedication in crafting top-notch vehicles. A proud moment for our state's automotive industry!" **What else happened this week?****Gov. Holcomb**[Spoke with](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/fb9e1e6da81e9ee83947229f28c3afba/c43703edb5b8d404c3d6b838967d376c/40313) the Dubois County Chamber of Commerce. ****

clean_body: | | | | A Message from the Chairwoman | | AHistoricWeek** Friends, This has been a big week for Indiana Republicans. On Tuesday, we wrapped up another municipal election cycle by flipping fourteen mayors' offices across the state leading to a new record of elected Republican mayors statewide. While we celebrate all or our work this election cycle, none was more historic than our victory in Marion, Indiana where Ronald Morrell Jr. was elected the first Black Republican mayor in the state. Ronald was one of six graduates of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series (IRDLS) who were on the ballot on Tuesday. He and Council Woman Elect Tiffanie Ditlevson of Fishers were both winners. After only three years of our IRDLS, it was fantastic to have six graduates on the ballot and two get elected. While this progress is exciting, this is the just the beginning and the work to continue to build and grow our party continues. As such, we are excited to announce the "" Following the impressive success the program has had to date, the party is dedicated to further advancing its mission of bolstering its growth. This leadership initiative reflects the Indiana Republican Party's firm commitment to genuinely engaging with minority communities and building robust relationships. The upcoming fourth class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series is poised to offer a dynamic and enriching experience for participants. Monthly meetings will cover essential topics including civic engagement, campaign management, strategic communications, fundraising, and state government, providing a unique two-way learning opportunity for both class members and elected officials. As the ""process begins, the party invites individuals from diverse backgrounds and experiences to apply for this transformative journey. The application form is available online and must be submitted by December 31st. Following the application period, interviews will be conducted, with the selected participants for the fourth class announced in January 2024. The program is set to commence in February 2024. Please share this with your networks and encourage anyone interested to apply! Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway | | Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review | | 🚗 Gov. ## Feds Break Up Sex Ring Catering to Wealthy
Federal authorities arrested three men for [operating a high-end sex ring ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL_GZEbutoEhILjE2Vx6ITK4Pfhk8MjuG8Tfn9hNNyqpVNIrvT_P-eliisfrt9tp4pBnt3L80AwgQUnUs2n8FIiQdEMT9OPYoxqUarYpGA-gR99pQK1pCY8HDWFdH6S6pRtcEydUqAFAgeo6bdrRDV55MOCM7hdvhFHkI-fS_s3x4I1CuvKHSrvmvUnTxvyuQv8SaAXa8zzbf9Vx9u66BwJt5Vwugfags97hOOZDoL2xAi2AQKtGgXaLr03S4eVSMm-UqnSlUOUq95giu3LJHEJcqVRJiVYm_11El6r0eeVcbsIAHagRUKlBoG3K5N9nTCnWfhBGvXYX09d3_lnl_wAAAP__eyJ0Kw)catering to potentially hundreds of well-connected clients, including politicians, military officers, contractors, and technology and pharmaceutical executives. The secret brothels were located outside of Boston and Washington D.C. and charged up to $600 an hour. Some paid [a monthly fee to be pre-cleared for sex](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNkd3trFh8NAlW7p2RIc5wrUGR8YK7d9X6dzx6S1P7-M23kiS7Pd32jjUJY8Uqzx5RFQISpvRtnNYmDWblgO6YXAaPEC7hklbMoiTcx566gejySPxAp237LFvJWjQBhEBoeuMvQzkZ5jRIlnjptk2FniWmsvlM8teV17ST35yucS8tSmstT6Oxrw1-troKz12Po-XekGpEhM3-hrztnGJQkkd_K2K7Hc1lVxXTmrneubypagUPuqhfB89-IWptwM61y2APBjncQJ2UXdtCfPjlJTkcL6xcN9I0l9M_f_NbwAAAP___1Jjwg), similar to a TSA pre-check for flying. None of the wealthy clients have been charged or identified yet, but customers had to [fill out forms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb8Gd7ZmBmLjguI1dHntlhYx43hWBCKDYu3fr7Lacvure47Ox3W5BkmS7__Dg13byhLWJi9eEHuEnvRiuug2ZmLdscNxnkeCCaDbHWtrg0VrZ9LWTtM6k443Xg1FnOLKnTgC0ogICJeLNsMcpggRDQajx1s0ygBHaeUYPovktvOWvsqLj2Etjy65vbVnVfqfIq_In-c5PEuSJmt5DxT5zGdV5N8URR5RkQeryG8ca387Sts59ZJfXJvcQ5OS-98HCbn2AEgjXnR3uPg8JSWp46QM3B9B0o9D-zvJdwAAAP__QhNgfQ) that required names, addresses, employers, and even a reference if one was available.
## Israel Agrees to Pauses in Gaza Assault
Israel agreed to [pause its assault](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1u6zAMxfGnsTcHpMTY0aDhLtly144GJVExC_kDtpKgffoinTsenOWH_8dtvLEWXe7_eRZf8zpyrPqUEbFD6IwdqU0-ixixrXjsnesNDADt5CE7JBIbox0CSXCXIbChzIIQLLlWvQFjEREQzmdLJ8dDgoSETLYPiRoCSVrX_fS56lInyeVrfcp-iuvcFj_Vuh2N_deYa2OuvC3yOt7Xe-xVY5HGXPXYWUp352_upsfMi1belZdu48chRxcuOfZoc06X4OwZI6S310HoBSGldvdpe2kpevRDQ3CfWcsvoP7d4ycAAP__Aq1g0g) against Hamas for four hours on some days to allow humanitarian aid to enter northern Gaza, the first formalized pause in the war since Hamas attacked Israel on Oct. 7. The Israeli and U.S. governments hope the pauses will help facilitate negotiations over the fate of over 200 hostages still held by Hamas. Indirect talks are taking place in Qatar involving the U.S., the Israeli Mossad, and Qatar's prime minister. There was a dispute over whether the [pauses would be daily or occasional](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vtDAQhH-N6RZ5bR8cBcXb0N3bpkQLXmAj8yHbd-jy6yOSNu3MSPPo-Xj0D5Ig2_yfVm7ztPc0ZnlxjwiowdjeFb6dmA3bglusmqYyuta6WNo7NQYbNnib7sNga1uzHgbdaOtqj3QvpDXaWETUqG8368qGaq89OiRnq8E75TR7yXssP3fZ8sJTeO8vjuW4r0Vol5yPpOw_ZTpluvM8y8jPzDFd_ZXsMXhlulW8DwxMKSvTTcJxZJhkXrJsM8z0RTBKfsMzQaJ3goMCpyyb0JZgfaYM8_W6_U6PPWU4KcIFD4igG2W6Irb-OCUESVWtnJ5XkvDDmf_W9h0AAP__OV5vRQ), with Israel saying the war would continue without a stop except for a "few hours here or a few hours there."
## List: Ranking Credit Scores by State
A new report shows that the average credit scores for Americans are pretty good overall, but they vary by state, with Minnesota [having the highest average score](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GO6yAQheGngQ5rZiAmLihuQ5fbbmlhGMescIgwipW3X2XrrY_0Hf1ft_kWcsmP-_-ws-trnUPs-cUzokJQpGcjk1uZibVkh-M0jQQWQG7uaqNetRnJrgAXwMlSoGSWgFcGApLZEZBGREC4XLQZpmATJDQYjB6XZIQBTrnXNnzX_Ogbr-VdX9yGWHdZ3Nb78xD6nyAvyJ_nOcTHEj-jIP-hBXlEQR4mQT68uIU7q9g-pjpibXyo5a2OHjoPW9-LbC49z1xKPkYrDNz3kMvvWf-7_ScAAP__HANYGA) at 726, as measured by the major credit bureaus. Generally, the Midwest, Northwest, and Northeast have higher average scores, and the Southeast and Southwest a bit lower. The state with the lowest average credit score is Mississippi at 673, still considered to be in the "good" range. The WalletHub report breaks down credit scores by state in an interactive map. It also breaks down average scores by income, age, and region. [To see how your state ranks. click here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71urDAQRp_G7ljNjH-4FC5uQ7dpUyJjD-DIrFfGyypvH5E67fdJ5-h83qe7Tzk91g-_s2tLmXxo6eQJsUPoSE1aRrcwEyvJDu0wWIIeQG7OznY2Vhla5oGDQuURvbU8BAAyxsrkCEghIiAYo_Rt8H2EiBq9VnaOWmjgmFqpt6-SHm3jJX-Xk-stlF1mt7X2PIT6L2gUNL59zty213y9gkaOL0FjOASN_uTqV-5CvXDdEUrlaydj-n-yuvh8p5zTYXuhYd19yr-G9nfwTwAAAP__K0xVdA)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe63184cdcff4b8496b53dec4d994c3b&_e=Eb8nB7GI88jP7s-qD2g3HG3IIxt9zFu9tNvtzzW3Ic2QrihMWU6x9ZFvJ2E9IFA0uslsnbtFMX6HQ7DbCtXxX84MRx5rhA9iYDv12K6qcRs0PW58VsAnq1ZTMIdA7YT4iV_rAM0YUQjA4D0RVeeveURiwrIBMKjDoeJBvoGgzTkX3vHL2SwHywR9B4gsA6LoJZp7AkNbeCDUyJe2q5y1fXP0QYr-D9zPiEzQ6wj60JJb42Q_YKDlj8YCDYkkY4DD8YzsADJEAqxlnEVF_uTJ02ndu83hTc66KOFtPJlS0ROmai0PuVEeqTbrM_p5oci-). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe63184cdcff4b8496b53dec4d994c3b&_e=Eb8nB7GI88jP7s-qD2g3HG3IIxt9zFu9tNvtzzW3Ic2QrihMWU6x9ZFvJ2E9IFA0uslsnbtFMX6HQ7DbCtXxX84MRx5rhA9iYDv12K6qcRs0PW58VsAnq1ZTMIdA7YT4iV_rAM0YUQjA4D0RVeeveURU8aZKn6yYFUrAt-yJqL1nPyeXzBtnzlbGhD5ZuyIFR2qz8MuxakeGlSGXe326OslbS5UoALKlAqDeYTSu6VhiVVqs_vWreHnAQyMI-31_0eBlRWI2zfNUtrxY5RnSQruu2IW8vGLfxLnuF51GLoLNmTIl4J6ds1Da7JGZoCIu) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fe63184cdcff4b8496b53dec4d994c3b&_e=Eb8nB7GI88jP7s-qD2g3HG3IIxt9zFu9tNvtzzW3Ic2QrihMWU6x9ZFvJ2E9IFA0uslsnbtFMX6HQ7DbCtXxX84MRx5rhA9iYDv12K6qcRs0PW58VsAnq1ZTMIdA7YT4iV_rAM0YUQjA4D0RVeeveYUepDRhCS2yTDOaL9bl74ZsaI4kSCUcJr4SbsXUGlSUsEHMdNyemC8WyrRrM5c19FKerxbaPM9dXv5bV1Y_cbPSsVqhV1XIHOljJECTuHJ6qwg3kx8ai47ytI-Fed9X6c8YsHuAbNInZp7igvP0JEl-8nmP3cXDrTv_Y-cpad7c) on these survival food kits while you can.

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2292da1083810ecf2751d44758b880fa44171c1ea12a7b5f550233a0d6aacc079352cfaecdbadd4af449df064050d3aa7d77729512b57cd2e7fd0cf88d33ae66

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2292da1083810ecf2751d44758b880fa44171c1ea12a7b5f550233a0d6aacc079352cfaecdbadd4af449df064050d3aa7d77729512b57cd2e7fd0cf88d33ae66

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

THEN: A top Democrat strategist DOUBLED DOWN on the fact that I am Biden's biggest threat and said "Joe Biden would lose to Nikki Haley without a doubt in my mind." NOW: "I need your help to win this race and get our country back on track!" | | | Friend, defeating Biden and Harris is possible, but with the first votes taking place in less than 80 days, we need all hands on deck. "Can I count on you to chip in just $6 to supercharge our efforts and win this race?" It's clear I am the best candidate to defeat Biden and Harris. I've never lost a race, and I'm not starting now, Friend. I'm inviting you to join me in sending a powerful message by "contributing $6 or more today." "Your support today will help me have the resources to win and send Biden and Harris packing." Every contribution plays a critical role, and each dollar brings us one step closer to securing America 's future. Join me in this critical moment, and together, let's send Biden and Harris packing in 2024. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: Our X “fight” with a Democrat Senator
body:
Did you see our previous email?

Recently, we here at Shift WA got into an exchange with Democrat State Senator Marko Liias on X (formerly known as Twitter). His little fight was over our public criticism of Sen. Liias for jet-setting to Finland to - in his words - "get inspired to reduce traffic fatalities." Of course, his holiday trip over to Europe will be covered by the taxpayer dollars. And his trip could easily be handled via a Zoom call.

Liias didn't like that Shift WA was drawing attention to his taxpayer-funded holiday trip to Finland - or the idea that anyone would dare hold him accountable for wasting taxpayer dollars. So, he lashed out.

That only means that our new mission to encourage state officials to skip the taxpayer-funded international trip is gaining steam. We've been successful in garnering public attention to the issue and that's why Sen. Liias is so peeved.

We need your help to continue highlighting how Democrats in Olympia so often waste taxpayer dollars on extremely unnecessary international trips - and the hypocrisy of it all.

[**Will you help us by contributing $100, $50, or even $25 today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)

We fell short of last month's fundraising goal, so [**your support is needed now more than ever**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r).

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

Democrat State Senator Marko Liias told the world of his plans for jet-setting to Finland to - in his words - "get inspired to reduce traffic fatalities." | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454691:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Democrat State Senator Marko Liias told the world of his plans for jet-setting to Finland to - in his words - "get inspired to reduce traffic fatalities." Of course, his holiday trip over to Europe will be covered by the taxpayer dollars, so Shift thought it deserved some coverage.

That's right - your taxpayer dollars will cover a state senator's overseas trip for the purpose of "inspiration." And he's planning on taking a bunch of state bureaucrats and other legislators with him on the junket. Never mind that Liias' boondoggle could easily be handled with a Zoom call.

This from a senator who, along with his fellow Leftists, claims to be very concerned about climate change and everyone else's carbon footprints. Unfortunately, as is so often the case with Democrats, this is a clear case of their "do as I say, not as I do" hypocrisy.

We here at Shift WA have been at the forefront of drawing attention to Sen. Liias' wasteful trip - and highlighting the hypocrisy of it all. And, it appears that Liias isn't too happy about all the subsequent negative attention coming his way.

Liias tweeted the following Wednesday:
For the good senator, anyone who dares to criticize him, or his taxpayer-funded trip overseas, is an "extremist" of some sort. It was obvious that Sen. Liias was attempting to smear us, so we responded to him saying:
Liias responded saying:
When called out for his irresponsible behavior with taxpayer dollars, Sen. Liias apparently has plenty of time on his hands for name-calling and pathetic comebacks. Typical of the Left.

Plain and simple, we here at Shift WA have decided on a mission to encourage state officials to refrain from going on such a wasteful taxpayer-funded international trip that could easily be handled via a Zoom call. Clearly, we are having success in garnering public attention to the issue or Sen. Liias wouldn't be so peeved about the backlash he is receiving.

[ **But we need your help to continue highlighting how Democrats in Olympia so often waste taxpayer dollars on extremely unnecessary international trips - and the hypocrisy of it all.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)

**[Will you help us by contributing $100, $50, or even $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)**

The truth is, we are fell short of our fundraising goal last month. [**We need your help right now to ensure we can continue our work of highlighting hypocrisy and holding politicians accountable.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)

[ **Please consider contributing today.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454690:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62454692:sDYHwLiNM:m:1:2610672541:35D6833C62528E6C5353C12208FC93FF:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14339813&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osDYHwLiNM).
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. name: John James
subject: What scares me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
As a former Apache helicopter pilot, there’s not a lot that scares me.

| | | Friend, As a former Apache helicopter pilot, there's not a lot that scares me.

_But as a father of three young boys, here 's one thing that does: the woke indoctrination of our schools. _

As young as the first grade, children are being bogged down with critical race theory, gender ideology, and mask mandates.

After over a decade of this brainwashing in elementary, middle and high school, we finally send our kids off to college where they learn to see the world through a "Marxist lens." If they're really lucky and make it into a top school, they will soon find that their campuses are infested with students and professors who march in support of evil terrorist organizations like Hamas. **_This is sick._** We're not teaching children to be productive members of society anymore: we're teaching them confusion, paranoia, and hate.

This isn't the America we grew up in, Friend, and we need to do better.

I want to make sure my children succeed, and I know you want the same for your family.

THAT is the reason for my fight, and that's the reason I'm reaching out to you today.

**[Our education system is in a state of desperation, and Republicans need YOUR help to step up and fix it. Can you join our team today and STOP the woke agenda in our schools?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zinebedkt55h13qbeolih3ri9ptern4aooc3ofd0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6aor2c3h2bs)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zebs70lh2f90tlgsgapeqnt8du7299mkgmt4rih8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp3ue1gbvmaql537cnhf9t0rnjn5ahttkjqb27c0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjncqt7dn9m8uol1hrl4e3q849b9fjj12v7c0s68_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze3nk2658cia86a4l64jbia8ck3ar9hvd6rs51t8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl4o20g2m46374v9ghmp0qs7238e5hud4i9k1nlo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj0ful0v94fc3oc4n52uh7foogq5g1kidcertc4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zal6hag2sedvarbh2ofeocobpimkeb11m1ib8vvg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bulrrcdeivie112705dfruntub8s408e6klh0g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z72fmbhutv8frsqqd9va2se2vc1v8pvpje4r7vtg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7mrg23nnua12dfpv4vcs1rjqjego380fc1celg8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztu70ql8khfhuhb8c1fcnfrukpkhrps82d2vh9io_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj6eob4cth2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. body:
Grab your “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW, before someone else does.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/3979c6a4f4f7bcd071c088c1ffa4ad01d4a19915/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9) here at any time. November 10th, 2023 Please see the special promotion going on for Gun News USA subscribers from our sponsor below.
* * *
|
“That was a **weird choice** , .”

If you went out and **bought a fancy new Kydex holster...**

**_That’s what I’d say to you._**

Because instead of spending $99+ on a clunky holster that **only fits one kind of gun...and is uncomfortable as hell...**

You could’ve **[gotten this FREE one here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9)** that’s far more comfortable... fits 99% of all handguns... is **way easier** to conceal.

I’m talking about the best selling **“Invisible” Belly Holster** from my friends at _Tactical USA._

**For a short time,** they’re [handing them out at no cost](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9) as part of a No More Gun Control campaign.

The only catch here is that they don’t have many left ** _(382 last I checked)._**

And this email just went out to over 120,000 other subscribers who are reading this just like you...

So you’ll need to move fast if you want one.

[Grab your FREE “Invisible” Belly Holster NOW](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3768/6374453/21ca05636cd607d1b579028f943dfed54203e7d1/a6a8e32521ce20c177b9e03ca865e076b59b1ce9), before someone else does.

Thank You.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=162c220d2082488cb905f33a40de7222&_e=OZIPc6ZStF6d9H6P1BLteaizAwS6WmkJP0YIvuW3GDTjKyadt_F2LX3NoVCFxjj6U1G3QG2tq0M9Y_FtqZn9CV5hPTq5NB8A5Q1C3xifJS7hktGW1lnhRIfpyzhSSXRk3a5xaYjPBnwBDVYwQSF2BTskvqte_AKcjGfgwR2voYVjjpQrPS3wCom6t8EiLAPNPrsI8c3W4nVrKPRjefoIseIKvz9ufkaJEJf6bKOJozijbJxNwlMO2L0E2F4b587LCRoNvbkhEtpRx_M4ed0C0gq80i3ul-8H-LIwLwlwZXoBdPxudZ-3TXey2MlWf86Z2aTN_t32L8Pxgczv8-wgmjmHEgn74l0InHWVee24HLBBAF7Kbde8AmBCcfe6GGZZYMzc-kxsfXQ49u7czxqK51PQruxhw8ZtKLM78WQUMnQ%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=162c220d2082488cb905f33a40de7222&_e=OZIPc6ZStF6d9H6P1BLteaizAwS6WmkJP0YIvuW3GDTjKyadt_F2LX3NoVCFxjj6U1G3QG2tq0M9Y_FtqZn9CV5hPTq5NB8A5Q1C3xifJS7hktGW1lnhRIfpyzhSSXRk3a5xaYjPBnwBDVYwQSF2BTskvqte_AKcjGfgwR2voYVjjpQrPS3wCom6t8EiLAPNPrsI8c3W4nVrKPRjefoIseIKvz9ufkaJEJf6bKOJozijbJxNwlMO2L0E2F4b587LCRoNvbkhEtpRx_M4ed0C0m0FjtvkPBgK8sitYUEuv0ms16y414M1m3sn8o7_5xLeJUsbb0kRXtsiHCrmTjq6wTu0oGA2PodO8PSgZyqx1QZdp5wfV-6DEh0HEoMZFXKfDsfkSvpDncX-wgm2Jxu4ceB_cPUpRSLqngutc6bUgvA%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:

This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49b73a7c70be48af9fb8fc591fb79523&_e=TIz92LGroSAs0ZbxcNrHzQZJUBwedCPv_iOez9NBir2r1Ru0POb3Yab3vperJDWBjujPXsKZpXE2IkZWNyjwPLIvUFRYnntqmXeoeIfH-QE7RfNixU8CdUXWw9A6y_fpQE_idHzl0YyJakp_sLwOwk-x--rLm9jThtd_cJQ29R2X61nzuBR85vjMH-NnIVdkCinnkgtAqjn7jANf2lTp0Ewi1buenvf5uwmJ0a7gZrx8UkgvySq38nzwo2cesNtovpWgf6CHAZf9weW_rtQ5KdyLVApDodTFxpCqfw7MTbM1KizPLQHP9ZPIX16wUkfp14pEoBM1AFDR4Rw3q6mjyD8pkvszOfNzXn2wufjaiqqBbnfeiGix0ZUrIWP8mp0stdc9nDbXUlIsCQhFNeSPiAg1rdFHZ2FKo8hRbQMEef4%3D) Dear Fellow American,

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzY3qZJQJz%2f6n%2boSh1rfgA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673961%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x77QW7OX7wb52XCJLHgp1g&sysid=1 "Once you’ve finished
reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund
my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzY3qZJQJz%2f6n%2boSh1rfgA&sysid=1)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _“Don’t complain. Do something about it.” _
---
| | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzY3qZJQJz%2f6n%2boSh1rfgA&sysid=1)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzY3qZJQJz%2f6n%2boSh1rfgA&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!](https://secure.winred.com/team-stand-for-america/support-nikki-now-underdog-tv?sc=PRentalTV&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20231109_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1409267-2667&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=WG-AUN2.103067&utm_content=20231109_i-want-you-to-know-the-truth&ex_tid=20231109_WG-AUN2.103067_nikki-haley_t1409267-2667&utm_content=tv-au2-20231110&xunv=tv-au2-20231110 "It would mean a lot to me
if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help
me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! ")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673962%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EPBqih%2fLseGmNqfoV10m5w&sysid=1 "Will you consider making a
one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673963%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AW00vn%2bdvqZYCdh4QYKzw&sysid=1)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673964%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fep%2br1PQ0J%2fWJVwKiCqi4Q&sysid=1 "I need your help –
starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673960%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GzY3qZJQJz%2f6n%2boSh1rfgA&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RmVzxEJuA6F7fniebcRIdA&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CA6jGUwki0fTAfOrWiXnKw&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lISvItfbIw7KXHvGpl%2b61g&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g8HFlBYfmC7PCe1kKAD4Dg&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AXQgkWQIu%2buiw7cIYoCH%2fg&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c673970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=saNgxkBDaObXlryNooKF4w&sysid=1)

clean_body: Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family’s business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: “Don’t complain. Do something about it.” | | | So, that’s exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn’t easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn’t know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn’t have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the “kick me” sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn’t know what hit them. | Now, I’m running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I’m hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. body:
I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL.

| |
---
| | | _Friend, do you believe in God?_

I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL. With 5 wartime deployments, including 3 with SEAL Team 3, I've been in the most difficult and dangerous situations imaginable.

But through it all, God's guiding hand has carried me through even the most dire circumstances.

And even though I've put down my combat boots to serve this great nation in Congress, I still count on the Lord everyday to watch over me.

But there's a lot of work to be done in Congress to fix our country, drain the Swamp, and end the cycle of corrupt politicians putting their own interests above We the People.

**[So today I'm humbly asking you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I take on this fight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2jvfjdfe3jp99j6s92s3q8g13lra8t5r6dkmjko_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj69oj1c9h2bs "So today I’m humbly asking you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I take on this fight.")** | | [SEND A PRAYER](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zloirpj5hmtqe2ectu2rf2lde9kuumhgssijahdo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj69oj1c9h2bs)

Eli Crane [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg0ifhf38it76jg8a3dv0hu4006haukmt1tllod8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdj69oj1c9h2bs)

name: Mary Vaught
subject: Manchin Calls It Quits
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

U.S. Senator Joe Manchin (D-WV) made it official - he's calling it quits and won't seek re-election next year.

Manchin's decision essentially guarantees that Republican will win the seat next year, which opens the door for West Virginians to nominate conservative U.S. Rep. Alex Mooney (R-WV).But that won't happen unless conservatives in the Mountain State and across the nation lock arms
and help Alex Mooney defeat Gov. Jim Justice (R-WV) in the May 14 Republican primary election.

Gov. Jim Justice (R-WV) and Rep. Alex Mooney (R-WV)

Justice is the former Democrat-turned-Republican who ...

Endorsed Joe Biden's budget-busting COVID spending bills;
Supported the COVID lockdowns; and
Proposed the largest tax increase in state history

It's no surprise that Justice was recruited by Senator Mitch McConnell and is supported by Karl Rove and countless other RINOs.If Jim Justice wins the nomination, there's zero chance he will fight for conservative principles and values when it matters most.Thankfully, there's a
pathway to victory for Alex Mooney if he can raise the money he needs to get his message out. While recent polls show Mooney trailing Justice by double digits, he surges into an eight-point lead when voters learn about Justice's liberal record.And now that Joe Manchin is no longer in the race
the establishment can't use his past election success to trick Republican voters into settling for a weaker candidate they claim is more electable.Now is the time for conservatives to come together and support Alex Mooney for the U.S. Senate in West Virginia.

He's the choice of leading conservatives like Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH), Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX), and Senator Mike Lee (R-UT).Please take action by making a generous contribution to Alex Mooney's grassroots Senate campaign.SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100%
of your donation directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him. He gets to spend more of your contribution on voter contact, and he will know that conservatives are standing with him in the fight for America's future.Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to
help build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

 

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

While recent polls show Mooney trailing Justice by double digits, he surges into an eight-point lead when voters learn about Justice's liberal record.And now that Joe Manchin is no longer in the race the establishment can't use his past election success to trick Republican voters into settling for a weaker candidate they claim is more electable.Now is the time for conservatives to come together and support Alex Mooney for the U.S. Senate in West Virginia. He's the choice of leading conservatives like Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH), Senator Ted Cruz (R-TX), and Senator Mike Lee (R-UT).Please take action by making a generous contribution to Alex Mooney's grassroots Senate campaign.SCF will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation directly to his campaign. It's the best way to support him. He gets to spend more of your contribution on voter contact, and he will know that conservatives are standing with him in the fight for America's future.Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help build a conservative Senate. Sincerely, Mary Vought Executive Director Senate Conservatives Fund   END OF THE MONTH COUNTDOWN     DONATE Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003   Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’m done watching Republicans lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden and END the culture of losing that has infected our party. It’s time to fight, win, and lead!
---

Peter, On November 7th, nationwide, we saw yet another election day where the Republican party lost. **We cannot continue to accept this.** Our moment to choose winning-to choose success over decline, to choose freedom over control--is now. Allowing Joe Biden to continue to run our country in 2024 would mean continuing to watch gas prices soar, woke corporations to take advantage of consumers, and woke indoctrination to run rampant in our schools. **The precedent we're allowing to take root is dangerous.** Peter, I need your support to ensure that an outcome like we saw this election day does not prevail next November.
---
| | [SEND IN $25 OF SUPPORT NOW](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b19928aa24784f75b1e3976dc89cd2fb&_e=wur2J80XhMuM_GevMu7VpOkoXnzFQy-zTIOFKaLicev28MME2lQQwU0g35Lsfj4ehZccT1Ea3_4xeEaob4QIfeSz3AXtysaxFrF0bBI__8rOPLl8u2QMrDLkECRVUGuYI0DJ33LIEsnHjOfsI3ZaXZY4l9kcl9BZpPKplO3vuv-oKShbSeeL5lI-8IO5JDitGod9W_Gt_NFf9ffWQe3SQJN-_voPmJAADO8luBOQFdpjWfVTlUbYNuMHPNPOLTgC14CqXyY-R0USkPtl830Cu8ceTKUPHvwqJxXXXkq_keNaoxDsQxo4noL3HKRjxZPz3mDnu2IJFUYmcjHRL-u5Co7Eo2MQ2-RlAQBNwtWZEPnmnXNTYKolDSLOTlCD0LCdqZ5bYXtTD_Rb_PYxz2bmP3Ndoyrtpos2NmdjpXg-0c1HC2ybsHhpuK4E53dZ60kN)

We've got to nominate a winner. And I am stepping up to lead. We showed that we CAN get this done when we turned a swing state into a red state one year ago. We not only won the greatest Republican victory in a governor's race in Florida history, but we also helped elect a record number of Republicans up-and-down the ballot. Outside of a few states, Republicans have consistently underperformed over the past few election cycles. The time for excuses is over. Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden and END the culture of losing that has infected our party. It's time to fight, win, and lead, and with your help, there will be nothing standing in our way. We need to come together, Peter.
---

Join me, and we will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in schools, and the consumer choices we make. I promise you: this nonsense, _this culture of losing_ , does not go beyond 2024.

Yours in Freedom,
