Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b19928aa24784f75b1e3976dc89cd2fb&_e=wur2J80XhMuM_GevMu7VpOkoXnzFQy-zTIOFKaLicev28MME2lQQwU0g35Lsfj4ehZccT1Ea3_4xeEaob4QIfeSz3AXtysaxFrF0bBI__8rOPLl8u2QMrDLkECRVUGuYI0DJ33LIEsnHjOfsI3ZaXZY4l9kcl9BZpPKplO3vuv-oKShbSeeL5lI-8IO5JDitGod9W_Gt_NFf9ffWQe3SQJN-_voPmJAADO8luBOQFdpjWfVTlUbYNuMHPNPOLTgCI6vf5LVULNGrPCrja-ABvvJ7nfK7DmqYPzzDWp6GGJxl95P6rtWRFD3GYp3kljxNSU0upllFmKMduPDyDfO2mt5bushzZd4d74FcKROnQ9rJaHgx-wj7PAg3Hh7XMuULWQDbJOSvFgPwdQtj94GjTLVnUU2qTX_ZZ4hxw4HfkI1TAFl4E-qwEAv0c9MRBrY7)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b19928aa24784f75b1e3976dc89cd2fb&_e=wur2J80XhMuM_GevMu7VpOkoXnzFQy-zTIOFKaLicev28MME2lQQwU0g35Lsfj4ehZccT1Ea3_4xeEaob4QIfeSz3AXtysaxFrF0bBI__8rOPLl8u2QMrDLkECRVUGuYI0DJ33LIEsnHjOfsI3ZaXZY4l9kcl9BZpPKplO3vuv-oKShbSeeL5lI-8IO5JDitGod9W_Gt_NFf9ffWQe3SQJN-_voPmJAADO8luBOQFdpjWfVTlUbYNuMHPNPOLTgCI6vf5LVULNGrPCrja-ABvmCA2oejQzDzrxwTI320DcfQe55lsRPDUcQLS6DeUyOewWzhXiAapMLhvW0_-sG8b9WxtYY3Q1BZwSAyaphiBlAWHZGSeDbeinBiBsoAmLh1gPBxy4L73WBmrgFBMEzSpSMGXiYNckJxgbVR2DH7fOr3v9NqzIk5QhD1KhfOZSFh)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

It’s Sen. Chuck Schumer — have you heard about what’s happening in Florida?
My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, a former Congresswoman and a gun safety advocate, has launched her campaign to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida. And she’s about to hit her end-of-month deadline.

**If you’re not convinced, let me tell you about Debbie’s story.** When she was 14, her family came to America from Ecuador in search of a better life. Debbie’s mom worked double shifts to afford rent for their one room apartment. When Debbie turned 15, she started working at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet.
Because of their relentless hope and hard work, Debbie graduated college, helped expand health care access in her community, and eventually became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress.
_Friend, Debbie’s story of hope, perseverance, and opportunity is America’s story._
**Rick Scott, on the other hand, has spent his time in the Senate working to _destroy_ the opportunities that make the American dream possible. **
Now, with Scott’s approval rating tanking and the incredible energy behind Debbie’s campaign, we have an extraordinary opportunity to win Floridians the leadership that they deserve. _And if we defeat Scott, Democrats can expand our ultra-slim Senate majority._

| | **In 2023, there are 67,495 unhoused veterans.**

**The housing crisis IS a crisis for our veterans.

Peter, this Veterans Day, I wanted to discuss an issue that many veterans experience: homelessness.
Veterans make up **_more than 10%_** of all unhoused people in the United States. Tragically, veterans are _**more than two times** _as likely to experience homelessness than people who didn't serve in the military.
Peter, it is absolutely devastating that the very people who sacrificed everything to serve our nation are overwhelmingly the ones who are left out in the cold in the winter and treated like pariahs by our society.
**The housing crisis is overwhelmingly a veterans' crisis – and that's why this Veterans Day, I'm asking you to please join me in fighting for affordable and accessible housing.**
**Peter, e****very single person should have the right to housing that is both safe AND affordable – and I'm fighting for this right.** As the People's Lawyer, I’ve spent the last five years fighting to hold predatory landlords and manipulative private investors accountable, and to change discriminatory housing laws. Already, we've won some major fights – but with a crisis this large, I need your help.
**I’m counting on 5,000 fearless fighters to respond to my flash poll before midnight tonight so I can see how many people are in this fight with me, but I'm still missing your response. So please, Peter, tell me now:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Cold, wet, and sandy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic.

|
---
| | |
**_Cold, wet, and sandy. _**

When you’re training to be a Navy SEAL in Coronado, California, those are all feelings that become second nature to you.

But you remember what you are fighting for: To be a member of the world’s most elite fighting force.

These days I’m still fighting every waking moment. Instead of battling to earn my SEAL trident, **I’m battling to save our nation from the Radical Left and their tyrannical leader, Joe Biden.**

---
| | | [SAVE AMERICA](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35395%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eG62G%2bFpXK5mdi5iRrwz2A&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---

[**This country needs red-blooded Americans like you and me more than ever. Just like the SEALs, this is a team effort. I can’t do this without you, Friend.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35396%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4%2fu70HtqmOTiVTQpkmMMPA&sysid=1 "This country needs
red-blooded Americans like you and me more than ever. Just like the SEALs, this is
a team effort. I can’t do this without you, Friend.")

Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic.

---

Thank you and God bless.

clean_body: Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic. | | | | Cold, wet, and sandy. When you’re training to be a Navy SEAL in Coronado, California, those are all feelings that become second nature to you. But you remember what you are fighting for: To be a member of the world’s most elite fighting force. These days I’m still fighting every waking moment. Instead of battling to earn my SEAL trident, I’m battling to save our nation from the Radical Left and their tyrannical leader, Joe Biden. | | | "Generic Button" "This country needs red-blooded Americans like you and me more than ever. Just like the SEALs, this is a team effort. I can’t do this without you, Friend." Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic. | | | "Generic Button" Thank you and God bless. | Ryan Zinke, Navy SEAL (ret.) name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: We’re surrounded . . .
body:
Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2gusuo1c2sekltl0urd26rrsinut7t5rrqgprbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmnlqllioeh6q2e4hb1qhhrt5imj8i59jujom07g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.

We've exposed financial behemoth BlackRock for war profiteering in Ukraine, Best Buy for religious discrimination against Christians, school boards, Fox News, John Fetterman, CNN, Pfizer, and most recently, the payment processing giants who are funding our nation's elections with shady practices.

The pace at OMG is breakneck because our sources and whistleblowers are handing over so many relevant stories that it is becoming impossible to keep up!

I need to expand OMG's operations but to do that,**[I need your help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbst9t9acmr1rnb6e08eu2prkio471v3iob2gbfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)**

Within the next ten days, I set a goal of raising $142,000 to cover the recruitment and hiring of much-needed staff that can help us keep and increase the pace.

**[Will you chip in today?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh55iiuuek0sqrrl5a32eo7ilqa1ohm246dtqj1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)** Any amount gets me closer to our goal, and you will have my thanks.

OMG is controlled by NO ONE and funded by people just like you. We are beholden to no advertisers, special interests, parties, or candidates and take an absolutely independent outlook on reporting the truth to the American people.

Most importantly, we're able to BYPASS the filters of the media and report directly to you.

Our latest story on a massive campaign finance scheme garnered 1 million views on X (formerly Twitter) alone!

Different from when I first started my career in investigative journalism over a decade ago, getting people to watch isn’t the issue!

Our story-rich environment is the issue!

It reminds me of a story from Marine Corps history, and I wanted to share it with you.

During the Battle of Chosin Reservoir, Colonel “Chesty” Puller, an iconic Marine twice decorated with the Medal of Honor, found his Marines surrounded by Chinese troops and outnumbered 35 to 1.

Col Puller radioed in to give a situation report and calmly stated, _"We've been looking for the enemy for several days now. We've finally found him.**We’re surrounded. That simplifies our problem of getting to these people and killing them.”_**

While that may sound like bravado for those unfamiliar with Chesty Puller, it was far from it.

Puller and his Marines fought to the sea with ferocity and purpose, leading an Army Major General to state for history,_"The safest place in Korea was right behind a platoon of Marines. Lord, how they could fight.”_

My team at OMG is like those Marines; they are restless, diligent, and the best in their class. And we are also surrounded and grossly outnumbered.

Corruption never sleeps; it never rests, but it can only operate in darkness.

OMG’s purpose is to bring it to the light.

[**Please help me do that by donating today and helping us grow.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4d4958om8eggbh07ur8vl0l45ndgitjkfvfqg4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)

Thank you for your time and attention, and please [**support our operations and growth today.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zul7ogv4aa45cbidgm37rjh9rn7t938j6ofj6jb0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0ege722pno3dtjhaa8kr8517p33ehuuv80nda68_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o72chh2bs)
---

Pro Life Update
---

name: Speaker Johnson
subject: I know how important this is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97u5f6peir3mt33o29mi600sokrjamp0rvfaco8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvavp3j3vhuop4ot5610qb8h8bg36mnt2uradki8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
[** JOIN SPEAKER JOHNSON’S TEAM > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3fmdnhb4l0jjl1arueonjtl2ga3etnq84umgfk8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztqiaiamgvr92hj56j4081p7l9vg5cvfolhri768_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)

As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington.

I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, [**which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znj4u7bku2kgkk36ep1nqevj8107eo7ce6r2a65o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)

[** BE PART OF TEAM JOHNSON > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqpn5nmgbglakeqielc4ao34b12hr1i7qt1crlvo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left.

It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. [**I can’t do this without you.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqa19t436sl8dp7d82bqlo4iv8mep4a50t30tg30_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)

For America,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z300a8uhn89sd8ba29vg1p0mbdfm2m2m4mufugc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z48o04uj7fth3q5e3tivsq3mdhd9b1544jbuaajg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3vdd4cat1d12oabes5orpteo8q1td18ml95qlpo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrcijjsfriluhfakhtml19bn2rv5anuu75vn7kg0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

GOP Presidential
---

| | Tomorrow is Veterans Day, a solemn moment to honor the courageous men and women who have served our country. The sacrifices they made are immeasurable, which is why they deserve our deepest gratitude. Our all-volunteer military exemplifies selflessness and valor. No one forced them to do this. In fact, life would be a lot easier for them and their families if they chose another path. These folks truly feel called to a higher purpose—one that has shaped this country and made it a beacon of hope. It’s a choice they make out of love for their country and a profound sense of duty. But as we tip our hats to their remarkable service to America, we must recognize that our veterans face some serious hurdles. Here's a glimpse at the numbers to ponder:
* 1 in 4 veterans struggle with [depression, anxiety, or PTSD](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxiPsZNNHQwLw7wuUsSCSVsqhOQ8WCYRXuYp_2swh2AVh6gj1sSRUbYBnBYDrRzqRd1oPO4b0eSV2aNABu2lYYwdXdCUqDNKdbU6ZGyW8Tp7VDnDKTFCl8UQIImUcUNNUo8ZZJDpc6IEVLsPyAo8bkmFVUIog3b_RxVLfze9NXO4bpuclmElUBxPlDUrn26p3VW1fmgWr7m2qbiXcJxsrcm7rAiMAheRidsC1WmXSX07nFn_RmfWUBjAfnkCV6GZwrws3M8HLSjvdAOCeK0-NfcDbCYWhAAegLaX4ig2JXiw8tx72FI1Z9NCzk9J1WxafnIdOaMYV8UovM0vlF8F0XBk%3D)
* Only 46% of veterans say the VA is doing an [‘excellent’ job](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxgmvnAJOfwTr_XfDHTCmlmhCtZ9ERS4IO15OwURismPJ5NrBQrMYrsn0E3GSz0XquqpB7X9VxrEO-WUSwdUmABhjb_pPsPAAz_7aPjRb_3vS13SnXhAgUzxlFWCdDscJTkFjsyBhyaeK89aJ3GmH1qymuLKSJjGCh6Mey3HxuXSVaL1_YTGEvWDeS6qws1awcnhOPxVWQHubfIXLA2AYxWqxIg_7WrbV63QvN-ouZG-rgMlpxIUBnXcytmQtJCwvdKM04QKDm-jQoRmbVoxn41Y7CxQ28nTMaqv_viytq34IPury7o2JJcmGzqi62ICnKqvc6nUlHx39gOaIrYMJh8gAc9K7te2jEQTHNRjLHq1uirFzXQWxdiQ0ESN3FZsTPg%3D%3D) meeting their needs
* Veterans are twice as likely to become [homeless](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxvwf-8wbzg-jJVr2A2SJjKglKSqncqUFbHIiA0hgr1WQSgkMiQ9wgcajIcskvbfbOTClD_Mb89Cxp-PNbA5svvmLZbgIn1i0Egj-0BFTA3EIueFi4cTfU7gJRZftg619KDro_4jRTJMGOtLxynEiE5ipOVwaXzRw7UUQcACzH9_vu0FeuIQqOu6WSAE6LjnaqWHVSiJ8hujwdWPTy_WagWQ1rxSxOAxfUEpStYdosLCq1UfUOfatMzum9G64z2hJEURs7TGR4lqbvmS1aBMDdTc%3D) than those who didn’t serve in the military

As we take stock of the challenges our veterans deal with, we're reminded of our shared duty to lend them a helping hand. Whether it’s protecting them from [scams](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxgkOHUSux6JDwaAQRCEAMnStMPcmua2u2fIA4tEgkYA_xP4b00mMO7Q8VLWrJEHj4xsmouzeuu_PsDEFDYf8Qz1VtCSRwN2DoiKqZMJMIGeqeRRgLHZv1cCePMWrSjuSGaEXs5jC843iJDzJ9COTCtsoqxjjh94ATBs3evBC11choAn-xQpbuEZyntQQbO6Jt0yrQJOLCaMpbWde8fb2eyX6m9lQ0-VLPzTaug3mFivw22Xej2qAmRdXwSfDOjiieMU7b4Inpdj-7ZcV6T6aJdMbObRIU9ndmnSna6FE7MA8In1ZYHMqyyNoaeSIAdvrRA6czLY0rjhGhSrtGQyJ9YrcQF9VyauYLW_XkQWt_OT8) or providing [housing](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxpqJHDe0SAJbggQXxMZ-gCUWWpt3Oymbm8oHrZc0MNaxsDPwSsBAyVuwqkAq8HTELcFoRKLSIa33XnIhfGfwc4_4ApeBANxXpbqIfFk6CSJQISsmf0CZPpJQSsYyulpN6gqtwWJVXAvd8mDmsp3gAnzahT81mjcTK9P6Aodi0dRLPP5NaGVP1QQtHf1Em2REK1tSb1Oi9jWDwQxuVAsZmC8w90CIEouX3JhwS2BWia9-BhH8Q7j2hxNO9G1CKzCALzqxwv16GRQn0h4xHRvbmI3TEY9uOeZ3eLIbpTYO3EwK) options, I will always fight for these men and women. I promise to take every opportunity to help our selfless heroes find success and peace in their lives after service. On this Veterans Day and every day, let’s honor the courageous men and women—from this generation and those that came before—for risking their lives so that those at home can live in freedom and safety.

| | Wreaths Across America is asking for donations to pay tribute to the veterans laid to rest in [East Tennessee](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxpqJHDe0SAJbggQXxMZ-gCWWWlHtor4RX8_Pqa02eXPFsoaTpow8l7EXfFB9R8DjDV2srVJ1t6fZGbjuPuXvwoSLOgz1QC1uRW7acvkt2LPM7XT6MkyMFa_20RHno1QtyEn4hNPs9-BrQFaXE859pQR9rdWJnoMsDORFUWX4ruAfyGauKIdH4lmB90pJn3VIMb9nUlXHzGoLS0Fyqfb02mHIQrJ__3YXzvpLijB8I1XwBBEstJxZTvZfnS29ZZwAD8erhfamtOcP4bJKftqgKQI%3D). Knoxville’s three veteran cemeteries have about 18,000 grave sites—all of which need wreaths during this holiday season. Last year, [Wreaths Across America](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxgSieCpcO8nv23_ipfjA2hhWgKR0QS9wgZDt9MWCruhHHayOjPoBtjJKitUwf6j3oITzF2khSV2qBQxPcxqEXyFLGnWHgLEgYsUZGVjia4xRbcTsYXRyUgDMecyRzBJouj4mIovbSCaF68DAtlHoHh9t81KiCqLubV2c8qXqTRg6IM0vfgBBK_ZT0dgCmlYMxOATBm4WkGmEYjPnTgkTt3w%3D) reached their goal of placing a wreath on every single one of those headstones, but that was only the second time in history that this was accomplished. This organization exists only through donations from generous folks like you. Each wreath costs $17, so if you have the means to give, [this is a worthy cause](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=dba38beee3514d089874f56db4ce302a&_e=qSK_0V63vj0uYDqFyF1cxhGS1UnmiU-nM0MpvdW-SlzLexqFBl-DcQBFUJEgCs4UJ_9-tOZjNkGpWw5SB7-Uio_sg730IFoNtDt27AP-pgq0NkdIGG3zX5uQboplqo_u4qvE-VCSNgZvHXlERQqdf6FgdGUARuqN9QiSoflj3_pWHn1RnzsYfCLYqvQl5Kgf8gUr3Y7S9sTt89FRJOLgfg%3D%3D). Our veterans who have left an indelible mark on East Tennessee deserve a meaningful gesture this holiday season, and I hope we can ensure their legacy lives on for generations to come.

body:
Kari Lake launched her campaign 1 month ago

Peter —
Bumping the email we sent on this day, one month ago. That’s the day that Kari Lake announced she was running for Senate in Arizona.
Besides the day we kicked off our own campaign, that was the most important one of the race so far.
When Ruben launched this campaign it was to take back Arizona’s seat from Kyrsten Sinema. And make no mistake: It still is.
But things changed after Kari Lake got in the race. This isn’t just about getting another vote for working people and the middle class into the Senate anymore. It isn’t just about beating Kyrsten Sinema after she turned her back on us.
It is about defeating someone who calls herself “the most dangerous politician in the world.” It is about stopping MAGA extremism in Arizona for good. It is about saving our democracy itself.
With Joe Manchin’s announcement that he won’t seek re-election to the U.S. Senate, we have to win. There is no room for error here. None.
And that is why Ruben needs your help. Less than 5% of our supporters have made a donation to this campaign. 5% have skin in the game.
Today, we are asking you to join that group.
[**Make your first online donation to Ruben Gallego today. We really need you, Peter.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231110-1-f&t=1&akid=1425%2E734936%2ETfDE3q)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231110-1-f&t=2&akid=1425%2E734936%2ETfDE3q)
Thank you.
* * *

$1, Peter.
That's the contribution Ruben Gallego is asking you to make before Kari Lake officially kicks off her campaign for Senate in just a few hours.
Yes, just $1.
$1 because we cannot let Kari Lake become a United States Senator.
$1 because she will launch with the support of the entire MAGA-right, including Donald Trump.
$1 because this is how we fund our campaign — and it all adds up FAST when lots of people are chipping-in.
By the time you get to this point in the email, a lot of folks have already contributed their $1. Now they're hoping you'll do the same.
[**Please use this link to contribute $1 to our campaign for United States Senate. Do it before Kari Lake officially gets into the campaign here in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231110-1-f&t=3&akid=1425%2E734936%2ETfDE3q)

Growing up poor, Ruben could have NEVER imagined he’d be running for the United States Senate and with the support of so many people.
He is so thankful for you, Peter.

Besides the day we kicked off our own campaign, that was the most important one of the race so far. When Ruben launched this campaign it was to take back Arizona’s seat from Kyrsten Sinema. And make no mistake: It still is. But things changed after Kari Lake got in the race. This isn’t just about getting another vote for working people and the middle class into the Senate anymore. It isn’t just about beating Kyrsten Sinema after she turned her back on us. It is about defeating someone who calls herself “the most dangerous politician in the world.” It is about stopping MAGA extremism in Arizona for good. It is about saving our democracy itself. With Joe Manchin’s announcement that he won’t seek re-election to the U.S. Senate, we have to win. There is no room for error here. None. And that is why Ruben needs your help. Less than 5% of our supporters have made a donation to this campaign. 5% have skin in the game. Today, we are asking you to join that group. Thank you. $1, Peter. That's the contribution Ruben Gallego is asking you to make before Kari Lake officially kicks off her campaign for Senate in just a few hours. Yes, just $1. $1 because we cannot let Kari Lake become a United States Senator. $1 because she will launch with the support of the entire MAGA-right, including Donald Trump. $1 because this is how we fund our campaign — and it all adds up FAST when lots of people are chipping-in. By the time you get to this point in the email, a lot of folks have already contributed their $1. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | ** Growing up poor, Ruben could have NEVER imagined he’d be running for the United States Senate and with the support of so many people. He is so thankful for you, Peter. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb42c7e478g1pi5jd5f87f6lgs6d3i4b6abthm9o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl7fijeqq1ie3rc2cgplol5oj3bcnfbti006kqk0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh3ckgk7bmtldnlutsrd7j3kdf75f8s32qkquo78_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlnmdtovc98j15jugd7da0jj2qv9201v45mu3k7o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zviklcuq9ji8n7d5r3jj0g3b7pbcdurehpajjmf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ieap8sgq8gennjtftid5n1je6024fna00d0cqg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd15ovt64avq9s1ffi3j600kscb66ohv07d3ud0o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ncrpdc6u4uqnq7auqd65fmt1mlp9s2hnbslh1o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmo062fm61iqck5e4b5dh4718bbbshkhacbmn75o_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg1r1teuu35k9gd6n1lnf3hq5ps09mqqv0r0qiug_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6p9q0qnbdr4kc0o1piofb5s956h6o7vk93f2028_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqahkevu0216bj3rbal9rrdntf913ionm9smk198_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfquanjt30e8pno4aheomi4ibens5m41ra2hv3u8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zduthubbo7lam4kknv2411i1ib3v7rb9nfb364jg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm4o76c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

clean_body: Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?" | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, "I need your help – starting right now. " Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. name: Ryan Busse
subject: I’m a dad, a hunter, a former firearms exec, and I’m a proud Democrat running for Governor of Montana.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Busse for Montana, PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904, Democrat
body:
Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/KuMB1syMs0W9O3v5MuCvqQ2?unsubscribedata=mxZIYHCjZcjG%2FR0sk10C5NnwTAYDPXns58IjqG3Dvn1Y8GtgaHLwvIqVTo1YzvVgo50d5CBBMawNnCzAUXPq9aG75qy%2FjnUzgdRVSv%2B7mzUhYwJ0MO50wjNyzy8lfeU4%2BXaHD%2FSWRnn%2BYfzR9rW1mb1KTS7dyqnlDqPedhuUS3SqTQ9rHFq5zET4S28jA2mKsCrPhoN7QTqLb1%2FOTPNRLxhn%2B%2BM7XuT62T%2BwraR698%2FJdzniBbpeozsz8esQQqhFUZ8C1XqwKeav34bivrFlDpqTw133JEHI5L7fql84WgQqgj73xkykBorkkxOfa8E5Gy%2BX02QXcBoVTboZZfD53iW7kZo3BtUReAjQjGp3GbKqZJFuHaG9%2FaGu%2F3EmtWcgP2SypPaPlZA%2BYWymFM5SPerIMD%2Fn%2BHf51%2Bn3%2BM0wU53dOWaHds870eDub2O4MDdp]

# [#]
Hi Peter, it's Ryan Busse. I’m a dad, a hunter, a former firearms exec, and I’m a proud Democrat running for Governor of Montana.

Right now, our way of life as Montanans is under attack. Thanks to billionaire Governor Greg Gianforte, Montana is being overrun by outsiders and his wealthy buddies who are buying their second, third, and fourth homes.

Meanwhile, real Montanans can’t even afford to live in our state anymore!

I believe in personal freedoms, responsibility, and opportunity for all Montanans. I believe in a Montana where we protect our rivers, public lands, and the air we breathe for our kids and grandkids. And I believe all Montana kids deserve a quality education.

A second term for Gianforte would be even more disastrous than his first. In just one term, he’s:

*
Pushed
for
a
huge
property
tax
hike,
*
Ignored
Montana’s
housing
crisis,
*
Limited
our
access
to
public
lands,
*
And
threatened
women’s
privacy
and
freedom.

If given a second term, Gianforte will wipe out Montana’s Constitution, defund our public schools and turn Montana into a playground for the rich.

Do I need to go on?

Peter, this is going to be a competitive race, and there’s a LOT on the line. My team and I have to make some important decisions about where we’ll be focusing our efforts throughout the rest of this campaign. That’s where you come in.

Will you take 30 seconds to fill out this quick priorities survey to let me know what you want to see from my campaign? I’d really appreciate your input→ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZJu7Pgf0dkm5gr8Ncwdz7A2]

TAKE SHORT SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZJu7Pgf0dkm5gr8Ncwdz7A2]

I’m running for Governor because as a ranch kid, I was taught that if you saw something that needed to be done, you just did it. And right now, Montana is at a crossroads.

I’m determined to fight back against the extremists who are dead-set on ruining our state and to represent ALL Montanans, not just the rich. In other words, your priorities are my priorities, Peter.On the other hand, here’s a quick rundown of Greg Gianforte’s priorities...

*
❌
Raising
property
taxes
for
Montana
homeowners
*
❌
Giving
tax
breaks
to
fellow
billionaires
and
huge
corporations
*
❌
Stripping
funding
from
our
public
schools
*
❌
Kicking
tens
of
thousands
of
people
off
Medicaid
(including
over
24,000
children!)
*
❌
Going
after
women’s
healthcare
rights

I’m not like Greg Gianforte, Peter. I’m just an everyday Montanan fighting for everyday Montanans, and I want to make sure I’m doing the best I can. So if you have 30 seconds, please fill out the following short survey and let me know what issues are most important to you and your family: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZJu7Pgf0dkm5gr8Ncwdz7A2]

BEGIN SHORT SURVEY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZJu7Pgf0dkm5gr8Ncwdz7A2]

I really appreciate you taking the time to help me out, Peter.Ryan Busse
Candidate for Governor of Montana
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfm-em-footer-2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfm-em-footer-2023]
Ryan is running to fight for freedom, fairness, and common sense. Meanwhile, liars, cheats, billionaires, and fascists are unraveling American democracy before our eyes. We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. He’s already raised your taxes, ignored the high cost of housing, lied to Montanans, and even went jet-setting in Italy while Montanans had to deal with record-breaking floods. He’s just getting started. Ryan is ready to deliver “a new brand for Montana,” and protect the Last Best Place from Greg Gianforte’s dangerous, failed leadership.

clean_body: Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hi Peter, it's Ryan Busse. I’m a dad, a hunter, a former firearms exec, and I’m a proud Democrat running for Governor of Montana. Right now, our way of life as Montanans is under attack. Thanks to billionaire Governor Greg Gianforte, Montana is being overrun by outsiders and his wealthy buddies who are buying their second, third, and fourth homes. Meanwhile, real Montanans can’t even afford to live in our state anymore! I believe in personal freedoms, responsibility, and opportunity for all Montanans. I believe in a Montana where we protect our rivers, public lands, and the air we breathe for our kids and grandkids. And I believe all Montana kids deserve a quality education. A second term for Gianforte would be even more disastrous than his first. In just one term, he’s: Pushed for a huge property tax hike, Ignored Montana’s housing crisis, Limited our access to public lands, And threatened women’s privacy and freedom. If given a second term, Gianforte will wipe out Montana’s Constitution, defund our public schools and turn Montana into a playground for the rich. Do I need to go on? Peter, this is going to be a competitive race, and there’s a LOT on the line. My team and I have to make some important decisions about where we’ll be focusing our efforts throughout the rest of this campaign. That’s where you come in. Will you take 30 seconds to fill out this quick priorities survey to let me know what you want to see from my campaign? I’d really appreciate your input→ [] TAKE SHORT SURVEY [] I’m running for Governor because as a ranch kid, I was taught that if you saw something that needed to be done, you just did it. And right now, Montana is at a crossroads. I’m determined to fight back against the extremists who are dead-set on ruining our state and to represent ALL Montanans, not just the rich. In other words, your priorities are my priorities, Peter.On the other hand, here’s a quick rundown of Greg Gianforte’s priorities... ❌ Raising property taxes for Montana homeowners ❌ Giving tax breaks to fellow billionaires and huge corporations ❌ Stripping funding from our public schools ❌ Kicking tens of thousands of people off Medicaid (including over 24,000 children!) * ❌ Going after women’s healthcare rights I’m not like Greg Gianforte, Peter. I’m just an everyday Montanan fighting for everyday Montanans, and I want to make sure I’m doing the best I can. So if you have 30 seconds, please fill out the following short survey and let me know what issues are most important to you and your family: [] BEGIN SHORT SURVEY [] I really appreciate you taking the time to help me out, Peter.Ryan Busse Candidate for Governor of Montana [] Ryan is running to fight for freedom, fairness, and common sense. Meanwhile, liars, cheats, billionaires, and fascists are unraveling American democracy before our eyes. We should be terrified of their anti-freedom agenda. Greg Gianforte is the problem. He’s already raised your taxes, ignored the high cost of housing, lied to Montanans, and even went jet-setting in Italy while Montanans had to deal with record-breaking floods. He’s just getting started. Ryan is ready to deliver “a new brand for Montana,” and protect the Last Best Place from Greg Gianforte’s dangerous, failed leadership. [#] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] CONTRIBUTE » [] Paid for by Busse for Montana, PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904, Democrat Busse for Montana PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: You can also click here to donate [] .

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We're watching the Republican Party fall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vscrEdLiNS

Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden
and END the culture of losing

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oscrEdLiNS

Friend,

On
November 7th, nationwide, we saw yet another election day where
the Republican party lost. We cannot continue to accept this. Our
moment to choose winning-to choose success over decline, to
choose freedom over control-is now.

Allowing Joe Biden to continue to run our country in 2024 would
mean continuing to watch gas prices soar, woke corporations to
take advantage of consumers, and woke indoctrination to run
rampant in our schools. The precedent we're allowing to take root
is dangerous.

Friend, I need your support to ensure that an outcome like we saw
this election day does not prevail next November.

SEND IN $25 OF SUPPORT NOW

We've got to nominate a winner. And I am stepping up to lead. We
showed that we CAN get this done when we turned a swing state
into a red state one year ago. We not only won the greatest
Republican victory in a governor's race in Florida history, but
we also helped elect a record number of Republicans up-and-down
the ballot.

Outside of a few states, Republicans have consistently
underperformed over the past few election cycles. The time for
excuses is over.

Next November, with me as your nominee, we will defeat Joe Biden
and END the culture of losing that has infected our party. It's
time to fight, win, and lead, and with your help, there will be
nothing standing in our way. We need to come together, Friend.

PITCH IN
$25

PITCH IN
$47

PITCH IN
$75

PITCH IN
$100

PITCH IN
$150

PITCH IN
$250

The
time to act is now. The time for leadership is now.

I
am humbly asking for your support today, Friend. Join me, and we
will put an end to the culture of losing that has surrounded the
Republican party. We will keep the woke indoctrination away from
kids, the way we live our lives, the curriculum taught in
schools, and the consumer choices we make. I promise you: this
nonsense, this culture of losing, does not go beyond 2024.

Yours in Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Bill Spadea
subject: 🚨 Urgent: Turning the Tide in NJ
body:
Peter, In the wake of our recent election battles, it's clear that we, the true patriots of New Jersey, are facing a crucial
|
---
| Peter, In the wake of our recent election battles, it's clear that we, the true patriots of New Jersey, are facing a crucial turning point. Like many of you, I'm feeling frustration at the state-level results, but more so, **_a burning determination to fight back._**
It's evident now more than ever that the NJGOP requires a seismic shift - a return to the core American values that this great country was built upon.
But through all the chaos, there's still a flame of hope - our local level victories. The recent Board of Education and Mayoral races, which we wholeheartedly backed, have proven that our efforts are far from futile. **These are not just wins; they are a call to those who believe in the power of the American spirit, in the ideals of freedom, and in the principles of common sense.**
Now, more than ever, we need to unite and focus our energies where we can truly make a difference. The Republican Party in New Jersey is in a state of crisis, lacking a clear, resonant message that speaks to the heart of what it means to be an American. This is where the Common Sense Club comes into play. We're not just a club; we're a movement. A movement dedicated to rebuilding and reinvigorating the conservative spirit in New Jersey, starting at the local level. **If any of this is resonating with you, we want you to join us.**
---
| | [LEARN MORE AND JOIN THE CLUB HERE](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/045f54b9c44612068730127afab81cb5/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1ztShvIhJieYg6x6JTbum6bGP2gf-9taJTQdd3nnmGd-5AKLmkOAcfLnRjzAULNGZCCZQU1pJ49pyysee4jgWlkMe5rhsF_v3r8gfoY2cyG1lAV4UGWa-CMInT-XYRp4khFdfmxn8ez5t-PNEyiBfQdT_FWAmKzsZ9Ap90g32jXJhWtNGl4QsidfJtu23b4aEWkgrciX1BbMTcYVZXdh8OsOKiNDauFMr8_YoEry9n9wAly2b4)
---
| Joining the Common Sense Club is a declaration of your commitment to America First principles. It's a stand against the radical left's relentless assault on our values. As a member, you'll be at the forefront of:
* Shaping the future of the NJGOP, removing the RINOs and steering it back to its true conservative roots.
* Participating in exclusive strategy sessions that will define our next steps in this critical fight.
* Connecting with fellow patriots who share your fervor for protecting and advancing common sense based solutions

**This is more than just a membership; it's a battle cry. A call to arms for every true American who believes in the greatness of our nation and the enduring power of our founding principles.**
Join us. Stand tall with the Common Sense Club, and let's take back New Jersey from the clutches of the radical left. Together, we will prevail. For our state, for our country, for America. Make sure you [**show your support for common sense here.**](https://xtz223.keap-link013.com/v2/click/ffeef3796ab3900928319af0eee61ddb/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnDVztQhvIiJidYg6x6ZTbum6bFP2gf-9taJTQdd3nnmGd-5AKLmktIAALnRjzAMLNOZCCZQUNZJ4_pyyke96rgWVkIdENycFwf3r8gfoY3c8GVtAV4UGWS7CKEvnyXqazjNDKq7Njf88vj_5eOJZmE6h636KsRYUn437CAHpE_aNCmFa0UpXhi-J1DFwnLZtB_tGSCpxK3YlsSHzBnlTO31oY81FZW-MjyuFsng_I8Pry9o9APRSZ4w=)
Talk soon, Bill
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/15014380/e8b4405ceb0de952) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu8qfos8vvm66stnagjkf3ndspb4c7hp31h46n08_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm2or2c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

And she was right. Nikki has now been declared the WINNER of not one, not two, but THREE presidential debates, and the media is speaking the truth! | "Nikki Haley should NEVER be underestimated! Will you show her your support today?" | | It's simple. Nikki has NEVER lost a race, and she 's NOT starting now. When she launched her campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against her. Nikki was the least known and least funded candidate. She was told she was too brown, too female, and too young. She was the outsider and the underdog, but that never stopped her. Just months before the primary, Nikki was polling in fourth place, but she never gave up. South Carolina took a chance on Nikki, she WON , and she proved that she deserved to be there. "Nikki knows what it takes to win. She knows what it takes to get our country back on track. Will you join her movement today?" | | America is always worth fighting for, and Nikki will do everything in her power to protect American values and fight for policies that lift up all Americans. Now, it 's up to us to make it happen. Can she count on your support? "A donation of just $20.24 will help Nikki fund her campaign, amplify her message across America, and send Biden and Harris PACKING! → Don’t wait, send $20.24 now!" Let's win this race and save America's future. -Team Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. | | Patriot,

---
Joe Biden and the Radical Democrats know they can’t beat us in a free and fair election, so they’ve raided my home, arrested me, gagged me, sought the “corporate death penalty” against me, tried to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even trying to REMOVE me from the 2024 ballot.
---

---
**_The Democrats' case to strike my name from the ballot in a key battleground state was just_** _**_DISMISSED_**_** _by the state’s Supreme Court._**
---
I hope this serves as a stark reminder for every freedom-loving patriot in America:
---
When __WE__ stand tall and **NEVER SURRENDER** our country to tyranny, we WIN!

---
But let me be crystal clear, the witch hunts will not end here.

---
Crooked Joe and the Democrats are _still_ trying to CANCEL OUT YOUR VOTE and remove us from the 2024 ballot in other critical battleground states.

---
And now more than ever, I’m counting on YOUR support to help keep up the fight to DEFEND your vote.

Friend, Under the leadership of Marcy Kaptur and Joe Biden, America has seen millions of illegal immigrants, deadly fentanyl, and dangerous criminals pour over the southern border. I've been to the border myself. I've seen firsthand the consequences of these policies: an open border where illegal immigrants cross without repercussions. **It's not just a problem; it's a crisis that strains our infrastructure and puts our communities in danger.** **[Friend, I want you to see the crisis I saw. clean_body: This is what I saw at the southern border.| | | Friend, Under the leadership of Marcy Kaptur and Joe Biden, America has seen millions of illegal immigrants, deadly fentanyl, and dangerous criminals pour over the southern border. I've been to the border myself. I've seen firsthand the consequences of these policies: an open border where illegal immigrants cross without repercussions. It's not just a problem; it's a crisis that strains our infrastructure and puts our communities in danger. This is a crisis that won’t go away unless Democrats like Joe Biden and Marcy Kaptur go away. Thank you for staying informed and standing with me on border security. Faithfully, Craig RiedelRepublican candidate for OH-9 | | | | ---|--- craigriedelforcongress.com 427 W Dussel Dr. Maumee, OH. 43537 Box 196

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Veterans Day, Stand with Israel, & Twitter/X Spaces tonight!
body:
| | |
---
**First, Happy Veterans Day to all of our veterans and their families!** Thank you, thank you for your service to our nation. The last few years have been particularly difficult, with Covid vaccine mandates and other policies that have been forced on you, and I just want to make sure you know that we are all so grateful for the sacrifices you have had to make to protect the United States. _Thank you._ **Second, I want to reiterate the call for people to participate in National Stand for Israel Day by doing one of the following:**
* **[Attend the national March for Israel](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMxNC1hODIzZGI0OTcxOGQ0ZmQ0YmUyNzM1MGY3M2RiNWU5NiIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIwIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWFyY2hmb3Jpc3JhZWwub3JnP21pZD00NjU1NCZpZD1UMTdVTlRzZlpKdHdrU3lUVEMifQ/E_1wFV0UP6WxtMtkgu1FxA)** in Washington, D.C. on Tuesday, November 14th – if you can get to D.C.
* **[Organize a Stand with Israel sign and flag waving event](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)** in your local community on Tuesday, November 14th (or on a date that works better for you!). We will work with you every step of the way to help you organize it, if you need help.

**Third, please join our**[**Twitter/X Space tonight**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**at 8:00 pm ET to discuss the hostages held by Hamas, and more.** We will be joined by Simeon Myers from the [Voice For Freedom coalition,](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMxNC1hODIzZGI0OTcxOGQ0ZmQ0YmUyNzM1MGY3M2RiNWU5NiIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiIzIiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3ZvaWNlNGZyZWVkb20ub3JnLz9taWQ9NDY1NTQmaWQ9VDE3VU5Uc2ZaSnR3a1N5VFRDIn0/BI_qJJL-sCiNSUsw7cYqoQ) a group that is helping the families of the hostages. Other speakers have been invited, including the man who was with the elderly man murdered in California while he held an Israeli flag. You can join the Space and listen [**through this link.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**** You can listen even if you do not have a Twitter/X account. Additionally, if you’d like to get text updates and reminders about this event and others, including an updated speaker list as more speakers RSVP, [**simply go to our website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjpudWxsLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyMzMxNC1hODIzZGI0OTcxOGQ0ZmQ0YmUyNzM1MGY3M2RiNWU5NiIsInBoIjpudWxsLCJtIjpmYWxzZSwidWkiOiI1IiwidW4iOiIiLCJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00NjU1NCZpZD1UMTdVTlRzZlpKdHdrU3lUVEMifQ/iEis8-yy0TX605MRziLDwA) and sign up on the front page, making sure to include your cell phone number when you fill out the form _(if you include your email address, it will just add your phone number to your current subscription)_. Thank you so much, and please remember to – thank a veteran today, sign up to host a sign waving event, and set an alarm to join our Space tonight! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| |
---
| | |
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I am hopeful about the future of America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day.

| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z44n9i61f94tbsrt3fkt7eolvad99b04s46rip4g_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlu98f8bscc47ggq8pmd5p07an0c3co2suhogrbo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
[** JOIN SPEAKER JOHNSON’S TEAM > **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcdukgfsda08i0imkecl5c6gnpv2bjqshd6abmi8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3h9ghs0g20uu30hmbkim01rnqpdk5stpgn48720_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington.

I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, [**which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zprkbk729vr33065gtrgnh1bg2r62s7kjksu9jv0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

[** BE PART OF TEAM JOHNSON > **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn71pra1arf54dtf35qkcfll0q4ie6b15q1vm3eg_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left.

It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. [**I can’t do this without you.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt6h1plso2agi04jth5vknp1rcesbe282em734a8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

For America,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z92rjtl22k70s9le40jirs1jvasb6q858dmc49q8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlrcv3gudlj6ilsv8l82b3cn8ilft9hbfhub0vu8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdh67ks9m5ki3qbc8l411op10g96977kn67dq230_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7gdd7fktui9udnuu83d0j4o18o3r2v2c2na2ng0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z36rbfl696nu1bfvpl0gh3638re7l4blr3coh1c0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34spj66pr246h22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb6ekm1m580o2d740d6rlqdadij5bvc6532smse8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1qt87oi1lkhqka9qa9k394lgldnj8n51aug91m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
