disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Hi team,
In the dynamic world of redistricting, your unwavering commitment lights the way. [**Mark your calendars for our upcoming All On The Line National Volunteer Call on November 14, 2023, at 8:00 PM EST, because your voice is pivotal in driving our mission forward.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73128301/437503304/684926256?utm_campaign=20231109_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjg5YmQ1LWQ5N2YtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Jzd6mzupFa0V4Y_02EuzkdezatnvoInfh90GsM0X6s=&emci=34508d6f-367f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=cf689bd5-d97f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73128302/437503305/684926256?utm_campaign=20231109_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjg5YmQ1LWQ5N2YtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Jzd6mzupFa0V4Y_02EuzkdezatnvoInfh90GsM0X6s=&emci=34508d6f-367f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=cf689bd5-d97f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)
---
[RSVP NOW!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73128303/437503306/684926256?utm_campaign=20231109_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjg5YmQ1LWQ5N2YtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Jzd6mzupFa0V4Y_02EuzkdezatnvoInfh90GsM0X6s=&emci=34508d6f-367f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=cf689bd5-d97f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)
---
We're entering another critical phase that will shape the future of fair representation. From coast to coast, as many as 10 congressional districts across 7 states could change as a result of litigation before voters go to the polls next fall. With so much changing over the next few months, we want to update you on what to expect. **During this call, we will:**
* Dive deep into the heart of democracy, exploring how it will evolve and ensuring every voice is heard loud and clear.
* Uncover strategies to ensure that every corner of our nation is represented.
* And explore the current cases that are paving the way for a fairer democracy.

[**RSVP to join us in this important conversation ➡️**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73128307/437503307/684926256?utm_campaign=20231109_AOTL_O_NatlVolCall_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNjg5YmQ1LWQ5N2YtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Jzd6mzupFa0V4Y_02EuzkdezatnvoInfh90GsM0X6s=&emci=34508d6f-367f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=cf689bd5-d97f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8431045)
---
Your dedication to our movement is the spark that ignites progress. **Join us to forge ahead toward a democracy where every voice matters.**
Warm regards,
All On The Line

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

clean_body: | Hi team, In the dynamic world of redistricting, your unwavering commitment lights the way. We're entering another critical phase that will shape the future of fair representation. From coast to coast, as many as 10 congressional districts across 7 states could change as a result of litigation before voters go to the polls next fall. With so much changing over the next few months, we want to update you on what to expect. During this call, we will: Dive deep into the heart of democracy, exploring how it will evolve and ensuring every voice is heard loud and clear. Uncover strategies to ensure that every corner of our nation is represented. And explore the current cases that are paving the way for a fairer democracy. Your dedication to our movement is the spark that ignites progress. Join us to forge ahead toward a democracy where every voice matters. Warm regards, All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228** to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This is a list of the 22 Democrats in Congress who voted to censure
Rashida Tlaib this week. All but one accepted money from AIPAC:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-1.PKu1i-&refcode=em20231110-31772&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31772%2E1203867%2ETWzV6G ]List of Democrats who censured Rashida and how much money they've
accepted from AIPAC

AIPAC has influence over far too many Democrats in Congress who accept
their campaign contributions in exchange for disgraceful votes like this —
but not our Justice Democrats incumbents.

Our diverse, progressive, working-class bloc of candidates like Rashida,
Summer Lee, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Ilhan Omar don’t let AIPAC buy
their votes, which is why the anti-Palestinian group has spent millions of
dollars opposing them.

AIPAC is already spending big and running attack ads against our
Democratic incumbents standing up for human rights, in hopes that they’ll
unseat them next year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-1.PKu1i-&refcode=em20231110-31772&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31772%2E1203867%2ETWzV6G ]Help us stop AIPAC and protect our progressive incumbents standing up

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in

using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=31772%2E1203867%2ETWzV6G ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: We’re surrounded . . .
body:
Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo94i2ib8802a39nbgk6161n6hs5bc26iqoci2eo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z28vpaimgsmfbfupbrvt4b18748tstccv5v7cvv8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.

We've exposed financial behemoth BlackRock for war profiteering in Ukraine, Best Buy for religious discrimination against Christians, school boards, Fox News, John Fetterman, CNN, Pfizer, and most recently, the payment processing giants who are funding our nation's elections with shady practices.

The pace at OMG is breakneck because our sources and whistleblowers are handing over so many relevant stories that it is becoming impossible to keep up!

I need to expand OMG's operations but to do that,**[I need your help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi3uoi55q7q2liboku6aemrdb0je2o2pu4943uf0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)**

Within the next ten days, I set a goal of raising $142,000 to cover the recruitment and hiring of much-needed staff that can help us keep and increase the pace.

**[Will you chip in today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcf06ghsb3mt5ju2ia2rrjjiuei1hijs8l9jn8o8_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)** Any amount gets me closer to our goal, and you will have my thanks.

OMG is controlled by NO ONE and funded by people just like you. We are beholden to no advertisers, special interests, parties, or candidates and take an absolutely independent outlook on reporting the truth to the American people.

Most importantly, we're able to BYPASS the filters of the media and report directly to you.

Our latest story on a massive campaign finance scheme garnered 1 million views on X (formerly Twitter) alone!

Different from when I first started my career in investigative journalism over a decade ago, getting people to watch isn’t the issue!

Our story-rich environment is the issue!

It reminds me of a story from Marine Corps history, and I wanted to share it with you.

During the Battle of Chosin Reservoir, Colonel “Chesty” Puller, an iconic Marine twice decorated with the Medal of Honor, found his Marines surrounded by Chinese troops and outnumbered 35 to 1.

Col Puller radioed in to give a situation report and calmly stated, _"We've been looking for the enemy for several days now. We've finally found him.**We’re surrounded. That simplifies our problem of getting to these people and killing them.”_**

While that may sound like bravado for those unfamiliar with Chesty Puller, it was far from it.

Puller and his Marines fought to the sea with ferocity and purpose, leading an Army Major General to state for history,_"The safest place in Korea was right behind a platoon of Marines. Lord, how they could fight.”_

My team at OMG is like those Marines; they are restless, diligent, and the best in their class. And we are also surrounded and grossly outnumbered.

Corruption never sleeps; it never rests, but it can only operate in darkness.

OMG’s purpose is to bring it to the light.

[**Please help me do that by donating today and helping us grow.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt0pum2dhc3fggu7viptls6udp3mga9f7cegl0a0_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

Thank you for your time and attention, and please [**support our operations and growth today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1d11eap4sp5bpm77e95utst07oreff09947ulao_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kq5ms0n8112c9m2s7kae3nh60rn6ngkkc2hobo_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdgm6ob1cdh2bs)

clean_body: Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind. Dear Friend, Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind. We've exposed financial behemoth BlackRock for war profiteering in Ukraine, Best Buy for religious discrimination against Christians, school boards, Fox News, John Fetterman, CNN, Pfizer, and most recently, the payment processing giants who are funding our nation's elections with shady practices. The pace at OMG is breakneck because our sources and whistleblowers are handing over so many relevant stories that it is becoming impossible to keep up! I need to expand OMG's operations but to do that, Within the next ten days, I set a goal of raising $142,000 to cover the recruitment and hiring of much-needed staff that can help us keep and increase the pace. Any amount gets me closer to our goal, and you will have my thanks. OMG is controlled by NO ONE and funded by people just like you. We are beholden to no advertisers, special interests, parties, or candidates and take an absolutely independent outlook on reporting the truth to the American people. Most importantly, we're able to BYPASS the filters of the media and report directly to you. Our latest story on a massive campaign finance scheme garnered 1 million views on X (formerly Twitter) alone! Different from when I first started my career in investigative journalism over a decade ago, getting people to watch isn’t the issue! Our story-rich environment is the issue! It reminds me of a story from Marine Corps history, and I wanted to share it with you. During the Battle of Chosin Reservoir, Colonel “Chesty” Puller, an iconic Marine twice decorated with the Medal of Honor, found his Marines surrounded by Chinese troops and outnumbered 35 to 1. Col Puller radioed in to give a situation report and calmly stated, "We've been looking for the enemy for several days now. We've finally found him.We’re surrounded. That simplifies our problem of getting to these people and killing them.” While that may sound like bravado for those unfamiliar with Chesty Puller, it was far from it. Puller and his Marines fought to the sea with ferocity and purpose, leading an Army Major General to state for history,"The safest place in Korea was right behind a platoon of Marines. Lord, how they could fight.” My team at OMG is like those Marines; they are restless, diligent, and the best in their class. And we are also surrounded and grossly outnumbered. Corruption never sleeps; it never rests, but it can only operate in darkness. OMG’s purpose is to bring it to the light. Thank you for your time and attention, and please In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Colin Allred for Senate Update
subject: BREAKING: Joe Manchin just announced he will not run for reelection next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, Sen. Joe Manchin just announced that he will not run for reelection next year – essentially guaranteeing that the GOP will pick up a Senate seat in 2024.
Our slim Senate majority is now in grave danger. We have absolutely no room for error. Colin Allred MUST win in Texas.
Here’s the good news: Polls are showing Colin Allred competitive against Ted Cruz, so this race – and the future of the Senate – is in your hands.
If you want to stop Mitch McConnell from retaking Senate control, split a donation between Colin and Serve America to help us raise an emergency $75,000 today to power the campaign to defeat Ted Cruz and keep the Senate blue → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
If we are truly committed to creating meaningful change for the issues Texas families care about, we need to hold the Senate majority. And we can't do that without your support.
Thank you so much for having our back in this critical moment.

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Update on the Michigan Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=789%2E135344%2EHVETM6)

Friend --
A LOT has happened the last eight weeks in the Michigan Senate race. So to keep you up to date, we wanted to lay out our big updates in regards to our Republican opponents. There are actually 10 in the primary, and the leading candidates and their attacks mirror the chaos we’ve seen from the national GOP.
**FIRST:** In early September, Republican former Congressman Mike Rogers got in the race. Mike has tried to paint himself as a moderate, but in his first two weeks in the race, he, as a former FBI officer, put out a video – attacking the FBI, calling them “corrupt” for going after Trump. He’s catering to the extremes of the Republican base because he will do and say anything to get elected, even at the expense of Michiganders.
**THEN:** James Craig, a Republican former Detroit Police Chief and the most Trump-aligned potential candidate, has jumped into the race. He called for an audit of the 2020 election results, is against any additional gun safety laws, and opposes all abortion, including for victims of rape and incest. In the last few weeks, he has been a regular on Steve Bannon and conservative radio and talk shows promoting his campaign and attacking Elissa.
**NOW:** Another new opponent – former Representative Peter Meijer – has entered the growing Republican primary. Despite his very public vote to impeach Trump, Meijer will spend the next year working to win over the GOP base by defending Trump and highlighting the extreme votes he took during his one term in Congress. On top of that, he has the ability to self-fund millions of dollars – making this race even more expensive.
So here’s where we’re at:
In response to these three new opponents and the fighting ensuing among them, we plan to share our positive, affirmative message about Elissa with voters across Michigan in order to combat the inevitable negative attacks from whoever our eventual Republican opponent is.
But that takes resources. That’s why we’re asking for your help.
[**If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d be able to continue building the early foundation we need to ensure success down the line. It all adds up, and the important thing is that you're in it with Elissa today. So, please contribute any amount you can today.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231110-1-tt&t=2&akid=789%2E135344%2EHVETM6)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.
clean_body: Friend -- A LOT has happened the last eight weeks in the Michigan Senate race. So to keep you up to date, we wanted to lay out our big updates in regards to our Republican opponents. There are actually 10 in the primary, and the leading candidates and their attacks mirror the chaos we’ve seen from the national GOP. FIRST: In early September, Republican former Congressman Mike Rogers got in the race. Mike has tried to paint himself as a moderate, but in his first two weeks in the race, he, as a former FBI officer, put out a video – attacking the FBI, calling them “corrupt” for going after Trump. He’s catering to the extremes of the Republican base because he will do and say anything to get elected, even at the expense of Michiganders. THEN: James Craig, a Republican former Detroit Police Chief and the most Trump-aligned potential candidate, has jumped into the race. He called for an audit of the 2020 election results, is against any additional gun safety laws, and opposes all abortion, including for victims of rape and incest. In the last few weeks, he has been a regular on Steve Bannon and conservative radio and talk shows promoting his campaign and attacking Elissa. NOW: Another new opponent – former Representative Peter Meijer – has entered the growing Republican primary. Despite his very public vote to impeach Trump, Meijer will spend the next year working to win over the GOP base by defending Trump and highlighting the extreme votes he took during his one term in Congress. On top of that, he has the ability to self-fund millions of dollars – making this race even more expensive. So here’s where we’re at: In response to these three new opponents and the fighting ensuing among them, we plan to share our positive, affirmative message about Elissa with voters across Michigan in order to combat the inevitable negative attacks from whoever our eventual Republican opponent is. But that takes resources. That’s why we’re asking for your help. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Elissa Slotkin for Michigan PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: John James
subject: What scares me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
As a former Apache helicopter pilot, there's not a lot that scares me.

| | | Friend, As a former Apache helicopter pilot, there's not a lot that scares me.

_But as a father of three young boys, here 's one thing that does: the woke indoctrination of our schools. _

As young as the first grade, children are being bogged down with critical race theory, gender ideology, and mask mandates.

After over a decade of this brainwashing in elementary, middle and high school, we finally send our kids off to college where they learn to see the world through a "Marxist lens." If they're really lucky and make it into a top school, they will soon find that their campuses are infested with students and professors who march in support of evil terrorist organizations like Hamas. **_This is sick._** We're not teaching children to be productive members of society anymore: we're teaching them confusion, paranoia, and hate.

This isn't the America we grew up in, Friend, and we need to do better.

I want to make sure my children succeed, and I know you want the same for your family.

THAT is the reason for my fight, and that's the reason I'm reaching out to you today.

**[Our education system is in a state of desperation, and Republicans need YOUR help to step up and fix it. Can you join our team today and STOP the woke agenda in our schools?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=acbcc51ebb4a4aab85679c563ab1deaf&_e=G-aKtdhdbKoYYuIdzgcdhZvL5Sh85QSga4I5Neuf0tJl2Y6Bbxc47JRvswbubWF32tecJZndj62PkuUmFeVkzlQ-tIl5qgD8pKfPxetK1DV58XWO1hn-FXJqw4TiYDnW32MtjOCEutdsZUjr9f2IP1uwnC3THISAtcRsiqoIp-_kLDYsQkMkjD0jztYs_8DTS_HLEltFSA5DIT5qRWRB_3QL44hQi7W44GkcIXC-Sdde5RUOGhsmT6x3cpj7Fk_SYJVF-t2v2W6AbsOQ14-e0OgL4VypqBrUrs-XsqT4_EELMhoxn-hAYRZkmTgvdd-PitwVq7jH-JkKNFQZQFRJafK2rtZThRzg4dDQHhOjrekihltQTBCrbDgoLtebYgqkeRPA8mOz6D8H1i06Yxa9D6sLPS-VjUlbL8ICRgx50NkDj26jRFLFDX2eNYfASSuJcsgaMOKvk-F8RxPzLBMbx5t-F1M2MfWxUQyoUawbNjkaV7EZyzAxroHVfhktSL4fhAp6beeEJrKf6mzLuNrG4clKguAg_-oQfUqmfbBCk3Q%3D)**

subject: This time of year is tough for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=7f62983125e0464793fbdbf6db052973&_e=gEPnA5D9NUyyeDn2bcRnYDJqm1oG-nn0A3KCV2cIPSNZJ5lA_oBARoQZw_zGKHmazhmDRR7QXYSWD7pUZ7NBXFmQInx0dx738UbbYJQty7w5pU08d8hlVHMwUTzQvsNK6mR6P82MX5ED2BEvQ9uY1_QxTZmsnrnYoo4P2JMMGFDzj4ptu0olvXSesIxQcIbadwhIlXnfouyoPJNmZ5NJgry7ZkwLuKRm4C-vP-3VdbkOLYI1KAqVtVWfo3FLI3un250j55HdJlf2zvZZHmaqBVSh3FUFHxjnk5NH8J84HOjhzaNAKNScCYo2dPMxzkP9qiuVkl1yyA2TnEYf66GqRDfuJAOnrIvzjj50TlGQbvQTQs4IYbG1P-bNUhdz-tgkeWvtmBgEOOHhGMRVoupPPw%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter, This time of year is tough for me. My name is Captain Hung Cao. I served for over 25 years all over the world defusing bombs and protecting you and your family from foreign terrorists who only care to kill and take away the freedom we hold so dear. Leaving for deployment was never easy. I have a wife and five kids at home but I had a duty to protect and defend the country I love.
---
---
**Now - I have a new duty: running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia.** **Washington needs a FIGHTER, someone who’s not beholden to dark money groups, a leader who’s seen firsthand the troubles we face.** Under the current leadership of Joe Biden and the U.S. Senate Democrats, America looks weak, our citizens can’t afford to live, and our southern border is being invaded. We have become a second thought in our own country, and the only people benefitting is the Washington Establishment. I am running for the U.S. Senate to defeat one of Washington’s Biggest Insiders – career politician, Tim Kaine. _My time in the Navy may be done, but my duty to our country is nowhere near finished._ My uniform may change to a suit, my boots may change to dress shoes, and my rifle may change to a pen, but there is one thing that will never change - my love and service to our country. I owe it to my kids, my fellow brothers and sisters who have fallen on the battlefield, and to YOU to make our future a better one. **[I will never waver, but I do need your support. Can you fuel my fight with just a few dollars or whatever you can afford today?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=7f62983125e0464793fbdbf6db052973&_e=gEPnA5D9NUyyeDn2bcRnYDJqm1oG-nn0A3KCV2cIPSNZJ5lA_oBARoQZw_zGKHmazhmDRR7QXYSWD7pUZ7NBXFmQInx0dx738UbbYJQty7w5pU08d8hlVHMwUTzQvsNK6mR6P82MX5ED2BEvQ9uY1_QxTZmsnrnYoo4P2JMMGFDzj4ptu0olvXSesIxQcIbadwhIlXnfouyoPJNmZ5NJgry7ZkwLuKRm4C-vP-3VdbkOLYI1KAqVtVWfo3FLI3unlQVhFe-NNszVVnjQ-aKbSZRiwH_Blr9RnzWpblDK1VBCs7kHDLDgr7XD4uzXNT4d9Jn27iuiyECczY4mEE8Oye_5Od3GH1UZ1DR2vmhpN_pimfCv7dKHTyfpm44UghafSFIkOq8iS-Q7sUdkUc342g%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, This time of year is tough for me. My name is Captain Hung Cao. I served for over 25 years all over the world defusing bombs and protecting you and your family from foreign terrorists who only care to kill and take away the freedom we hold so dear. Leaving for deployment was never easy. I have a wife and five kids at home but I had a duty to protect and defend the country I love. Now - I have a new duty: running for the U.S. Senate in Virginia. Washington needs a FIGHTER, someone who’s not beholden to dark money groups, a leader who’s seen firsthand the troubles we face. Under the current leadership of Joe Biden and the U.S. Senate Democrats, America looks weak, our citizens can’t afford to live, and our southern border is being invaded. We have become a second thought in our own country, and the only people benefitting is the Washington Establishment. I am running for the U.S. Senate to defeat one of Washington’s Biggest Insiders – career politician, Tim Kaine. My time in the Navy may be done, but my duty to our country is nowhere near finished. My uniform may change to a suit, my boots may change to dress shoes, and my rifle may change to a pen, but there is one thing that will never change - my love and service to our country. I owe it to my kids, my fellow brothers and sisters who have fallen on the battlefield, and to YOU to make our future a better one. Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) Republican U.S. Senate Candidate | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T315086af-f5c6-4769-9018-96fe9c2939e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, Sen. Joe Manchin just announced that he will not run for reelection next year – essentially guaranteeing that the GOP will pick up a Senate seat in 2024. Our slim Senate majority is now in grave danger. We have absolutely no room for error. Colin Allred MUST win in Texas. Here’s the good news: Polls are showing Colin Allred competitive against Ted Cruz, so this race – and the future of the Senate – is in your hands. [If you want to stop Mitch McConnell from retaking Senate control, split a donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action to help us raise an emergency $75,000 today to power the campaign to defeat Ted Cruz and keep the Senate blue →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37e0811b-b1f7-4da4-90d8-b5fb06589f10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3635435-b703-4229-a006-c787ee4862dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Hill Harper
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Help us send out T-shirts!!
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231110&t=1&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
Peter,
Did you see our last message? **We just launched a T-Shirt Fund goal of $7,000 and we could really use your help to reach our goal.**
Our team brainstormed *fun* ways that we can get the word out about Hill, and we thought of T-Shirts! It may seem simple but think of how many times a cool T-Shirt has caught your eyes when you’ve been walking around.
It’s an easy way to rep support for Hill + get his name out there in Michigan and beyond, and it’s just what our movement needs.
Your donation will go directly to supporting our T-Shirt production _**(**_**_[you won’t get one though, so if you’d like your own T-Shirt, make sure to visit our store!!](https://act.hillharper.com/go/200?t=2&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR))_**
[**Make sure to read our last email below + donate $30 or more now to help us reach our $7,000 goal!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231110?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-546&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231110?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-546&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
Many thanks!
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: HillHarper.com [info@e.hillharper.com]
Date: Mon, Nov 8, 2023
Subject: Here’s what the real cost is
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Hey Peter,
Running a scrappy grassroots campaign in Michigan is no easy job. We’re doing everything that we can to spread the message of our movement for change in Michigan.
**But we can’t do it without you.** When we say that you are the only reason we can do our work we mean it. We’ll be honest — we’re the underdogs in this race.
The thing that we do have on our side is **_time_**. We’re still early in this race, and together we can raise awareness about Hill, get out the vote, and recruit volunteers.
Having supporters rock our T-shirts out in public is a big part of that! A donation of $30 (_the price to produce and ship 1 T-Shirt_)*, or more today will go directly to our T-shirt Fund goal of $7,000.
*_Your donation today will go directly to supporting our production + shipping of T-Shirts to folks across the country but does not get you a T-Shirt._[**_If you’d like your own T-Shirt please purchase from the Hill Harper store!_**](https://act.hillharper.com/go/200?t=3&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
[**__**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231110?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-546&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
[**Will you chip in $30 or more now****, Peter?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231110?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-546&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231110?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-546&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Hill 💙
P.S. [**Don’t forget to purchase your very own T-Shirt by visiting the Hill Harper store now!**](https://act.hillharper.com/go/200?t=4&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231110&t=5&refcode2=546_62735_SF0lvR&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=546%2E62735%2ESF0lvR)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Bell for Missouri
subject: Choose to fight for Wesley
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
At the end of the month, our government will face ANOTHER reckless and preventable federal government shutdown, putting the livelihoods of over 36,000 hardworking families at risk, Peter.

Wesley's committed to fighting for Missouri's hardworking families, and that's why he knows that it's not just important to take the House majority next year. It's about voting for someone who will fight on your behalf.

As the leading prosecuting attorney in St. Louis, Wesley has fought daily on behalf of his community. He will do the same in Congress, but he needs your support to get there.

[**Will you support Wesley today by chipping in $5 >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135072/437527178/1029727644?refcode=em23_231109_housek_fndd_gq_act___B4MO_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231109_housek_fndd_gq_act___B4MO_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=41897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDE4OTczMzUtZTI3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jOxUyzgm_cpCrKtws4N3OhswJOkHNyryBqwvXSE5zfA=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bell <digital@bell4mo.com>
Date: Thursday, November 09, 2023
Subject: Show you want change Hey Peter,

Last month, House Republicans led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then, MAGA Republicans voted to oust Kevin McCarthy – for the first time in our history.

As a result, our country wasted 22 days as they used their **FIVE-seat** majority to fight amongst themselves to finally find the courage to vote for a MAGA speaker. A MAGA speaker who believes in criminalizing LGBTQ relationships, blames school shootings on abortions and the teaching of evolution, and wants to punish abortion providers.

This isn’t the kind of leadership Missourians voted for, and that’s why Wesley threw his hat into the ring to represent MO-01.

[**If you want to see change, it's not just about winning back a five-seat majority. It's about voting for a candidate who will keep fighting on your behalf. Make an immediate donation to Wesley’s House campaign today, and together, we'll ensure Democrats retake the House majority in 2024 clean_body: At the end of the month, our government will face ANOTHER reckless and preventable federal government shutdown, putting the livelihoods of over 36,000 hardworking families at risk, Peter. Wesley's committed to fighting for Missouri's hardworking families, and that's why he knows that it's not just important to take the House majority next year. It's about voting for someone who will fight on your behalf. As the leading prosecuting attorney in St. Louis, Wesley has fought daily on behalf of his community. He will do the same in Congress, but he needs your support to get there. = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bell <digital@bell4mo.com> Date: Thursday, November 09, 2023 Subject: Show you want change Hey Peter, Last month, House Republicans led us to the brink of a reckless government shutdown. Then, MAGA Republicans voted to oust Kevin McCarthy – for the first time in our history. As a result, our country wasted 22 days as they used their FIVE-seat majority to fight amongst themselves to finally find the courage to vote for a MAGA speaker. A MAGA speaker who believes in criminalizing LGBTQ relationships, blames school shootings on abortions and the teaching of evolution, and wants to punish abortion providers. This isn’t the kind of leadership Missourians voted for, and that’s why Wesley threw his hat into the ring to represent MO-01. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Wesley will be facing many challenges on the road ahead. Team, in a moment, **_[I am going to ask you to chip in just $1 to my campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135238/437527471/1307708269?amount=1&refcode=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjg5NzMzNS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mc8TUXYCOebNMNO8OXiEYxwpjwLNP7mlMANVhZ-l61Y=)_**. Yes, I said $1. But before I do, I want to tell you a little bit more about me. A few years ago, as families struggled with the high cost of living and the increasing stresses of raising a family, paying the mortgage, and staying afloat – I embarked on a mission to do something about it. I won a race no one thought was possible. **I beat a 40-year Republican incumbent, becoming the first Indian-American to ever serve in the New York Senate.** And at a time of high cynicism about what could _actually_ get done, I accomplished real results for everyday New Yorkers. I’ve stood up to MAGA extremists and transformed Democratic beliefs into tangible legislation. I’ve fought to protect abortion access in NY, strengthen our gun safety laws, defend student loan borrowers from greedy corporations that were taking advantage of them, safeguard our environment, and deliver justice for survivors of abuse. And I did it all because I refused to back down from a challenge. **And now, I am running in one of the most competitive House districts in the country against a well-funded Republican incumbent, Anthony D’Esposito.** D’Esposito flipped this seat red in 2022, but the writing’s on the wall for him. Experts are calling this race a toss-up, and Biden won this seat by nearly _15 points_ in 2020. It’s no wonder the GOP is already pouring millions of dollars into this race — they’ll do whatever it takes to hold onto their razor-thin majority in Washington. But we won’t be intimidated. With your help, we can build an unstoppable grassroots movement, flip this district blue, and take back the House for Democrats. **_[So there you have it, team. Now that you know a little more about me and this race, can I count on your $1 donation to help us win big in 2024? I’m counting on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135240/437527473/1307708269?amount=1&refcode=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjg5NzMzNS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mc8TUXYCOebNMNO8OXiEYxwpjwLNP7mlMANVhZ-l61Y=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | _[DONATE $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135241/437527475/1307708269?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.3b897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjg5NzMzNS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mc8TUXYCOebNMNO8OXiEYxwpjwLNP7mlMANVhZ-l61Y=)_

clean_body: That’s all I am asking for today. | Team, in a moment, =. Yes, I said $1. But before I do, I want to tell you a little bit more about me. A few years ago, as families struggled with the high cost of living and the increasing stresses of raising a family, paying the mortgage, and staying afloat – I embarked on a mission to do something about it. I won a race no one thought was possible. I beat a 40-year Republican incumbent, becoming the first Indian-American to ever serve in the New York Senate. And at a time of high cynicism about what could actually get done, I accomplished real results for everyday New Yorkers. I’ve stood up to MAGA extremists and transformed Democratic beliefs into tangible legislation. I’ve fought to protect abortion access in NY, strengthen our gun safety laws, defend student loan borrowers from greedy corporations that were taking advantage of them, safeguard our environment, and deliver justice for survivors of abuse. And I did it all because I refused to back down from a challenge. And now, I am running in one of the most competitive House districts in the country against a well-funded Republican incumbent, Anthony D’Esposito. D’Esposito flipped this seat red in 2022, but the writing’s on the wall for him. Experts are calling this race a toss-up, and Biden won this seat by nearly 15 points in 2020. It’s no wonder the GOP is already pouring millions of dollars into this race — they’ll do whatever it takes to hold onto their razor-thin majority in Washington. But we won’t be intimidated. With your help, we can build an unstoppable grassroots movement, flip this district blue, and take back the House for Democrats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = I can’t thank you enough, Kevin Thomas = | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. name: Survey Alert (via Courier Newsroom)
subject: [Survey Enclosed] Do you think AI will increase election misinformation?
body:
We want to hear from you!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135065/437527137/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk4OTczMzUtZTI3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uJ3RVG4-3vzgAhUKLXpqg-yIgBIouVVynPM5EZnQyCo=&emci=a8653251-427f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
The proliferation of artificial intelligence (AI) has given right-wing bad actors new opportunities to broaden the kind of online disinformation campaigns that fueled Donald Trump’s win in 2016.
It isn’t just political experts who are concerned about the prospects for 2024. According to a recent poll sponsored by the University of Chicago and _The Associated Press_ , **nearly 6 in 10 Americans think that AI will lead to the spread of false or misleading information in the upcoming election. **
This is an important issue, and we want to hear from you, Peter. **[Are you concerned that AI will increase the amount of false or misleading election information in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135070/437527142/-402262406?contactdata=MLc5VBE0bEj9svZffEfBBNb+pqlFJGWXp7dW2QoU99YmM5jJrt/RNvvE709oqsneJou90XAHYVhDvApuxdbdjwrGz5wD/05D1j/298RkntQbMw+drnA3L5/whePhI7JErkbRXFaS+mFbNblobmMoR7da3MBWL/sxowOtG2ye0LA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk4OTczMzUtZTI3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uJ3RVG4-3vzgAhUKLXpqg-yIgBIouVVynPM5EZnQyCo=&emci=a8653251-427f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)**
Courier Newsroom was founded as a direct response to the failures of the 2016 election. Our newsrooms in nine battleground states publish our vital local coverage to the online spaces where false and misleading political information thrives.
We dismantle right-wing propaganda at its source by telling the truth and making it freely available in communities where good journalism is hard to find. In a time where right-wing bad actors like Donald Trump are looking for any opportunity (artificial or otherwise) to mislead and divide the public, our coverage is more important than ever.
**[Do you share our concerns about right-wing bad actors using artificial intelligence in the 2024 election? It’s an important issue and we want to know where you stand.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135085/437527185/-402262406?contactdata=MLc5VBE0bEj9svZffEfBBNb+pqlFJGWXp7dW2QoU99YmM5jJrt/RNvvE709oqsneJou90XAHYVhDvApuxdbdjwrGz5wD/05D1j/298RkntQbMw+drnA3L5/whePhI7JErkbRXFaS+mFbNblobmMoR7da3MBWL/sxowOtG2ye0LA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk4OTczMzUtZTI3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uJ3RVG4-3vzgAhUKLXpqg-yIgBIouVVynPM5EZnQyCo=&emci=a8653251-427f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)**
[Take the survey ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73135093/437527200/-402262406?contactdata=MLc5VBE0bEj9svZffEfBBNb+pqlFJGWXp7dW2QoU99YmM5jJrt/RNvvE709oqsneJou90XAHYVhDvApuxdbdjwrGz5wD/05D1j/298RkntQbMw+drnA3L5/whePhI7JErkbRXFaS+mFbNblobmMoR7da3MBWL/sxowOtG2ye0LA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDk4OTczMzUtZTI3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uJ3RVG4-3vzgAhUKLXpqg-yIgBIouVVynPM5EZnQyCo=&emci=a8653251-427f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=49897335-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The Power of Persistence
body:
Persistence is a virtue that many of us could use help cultivating.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac728e5bca3f4b37ac09589a531fb20e&_e=_7DwrE5LytcT3GluTkr1GEYx7yM5v56b1rAvCQ2LqawKlavteXVr9c3q4jN9B6FWRe_DqWO4CCpr-kJVRnj7Ysx4e1_g89A4_p97CRRjlWPZreoL6V0IYomi4Ibt3sFqhdIm3zdhS3XvKQ5HaHZuG951-lX7vYu8YSpdaPtG53_8Vuh13BkkUiYgQ1MK2p_19Y-5PmmBCeFDf6H3DisNqo0O23-WU-QQiW5gvOyzks4-LIfNXfPddfnwSWGH-P8gqtixWigfan6_DbWLAdVPb8xJeTOdQbrOtzkYDdgUdraFHGtMK7EaQNYlvXYfEqYd7cS8AT5DkYRVMbUdiXuXvzwUCG9MeDjrX9kzdFYYQb4nMeI1zNBT6lfZ4SK3VLW37RdEg-0v4qQjjtCDC7VOSA%3D%3D)
---
Hi Friend,

God told Joshua that in order to defeat Jericho, his army was supposed to march around the city walls once every day for six days, and then seven times on the seventh day. I imagine there were more than a few raised eyebrows among the soldiers at these instructions. By the fifth or sixth day, they were probably tired of hauling their armor around in the hot Palestinian sun. And I'm sure they were tired of residents of Jericho standing on the wall making fun of them. **But Joshua and his men remained persistent and the payoff was massive.**

Then there was Naaman, a mighty military commander who was told to go down to the muddy Jordan River and dip himself in it seven times in order to have his skin disease cured. Imagine if, on the sixth dip, he said to himself, "I'm getting nothing but waterlogged. I give up." **No, instead Naaman persisted, and his healing was incredible.**

**Persistence** is a virtue that many of us could use help cultivating.

Do you wish to be successful in your family life? Do you want to have greater financial stability in your life? Do you desire to be successful in your business? Do you want to improve the most important relationship of all: your relationship with God?

The key to all of these things is persistence. Consider these modern examples:
* George Lucas's movie Star Wars was rejected by every major studio in Hollywood. But he persisted in submitting it until 20th Century Fox decided to take a chance on it. Of course, it's one of the most successful blockbuster franchises of all time.
* Thomas Edison discovered 1,880 ways not to make a light bulb before he found a way for it to work.
* Babe Ruth struck out 1,330 times, and yet he's considered one of baseball's greatest players.

Thomas J. Watson, the founder of IBM Corporation, said "The way to succeed is to double your failure rate." In other words, **" To succeed more, fail more."** [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac728e5bca3f4b37ac09589a531fb20e&_e=_7DwrE5LytcT3GluTkr1GEYx7yM5v56b1rAvCQ2LqawKlavteXVr9c3q4jN9B6FWRe_DqWO4CCpr-kJVRnj7Ysx4e1_g89A4_p97CRRjlWPZreoL6V0IYomi4Ibt3sFqhdIm3zdhS3XvKQ5HaHZuG951-lX7vYu8YSpdaPtG53_8Vuh13BkkUiYgQ1MK2p_19Y-5PmmBCeFDf6H3DisNqo0O23-WU-QQiW5gvOyzks4-LIfNXfPddfnwSWGH-P8gUKJpSjJmAchnY9OAkkGIvbK4cbTxfLms0xuN8vleSyVS7t5R4tfdxUn6dAseCPdZhpB5WAduuF0HzL1oRpYeRL9Wjq0OuR9LY8WBw5n0mLQ8NjvV90XcI-pOIdhGKidcCUb9GHrIp_NisDtVws5sCw%3D%3D)
That's one of the **10 keys to extraordinary success** that are outlined in the book of Proverbs. I explore all 10 of those keys in my book called The Solomon Secrets.

The natural question, of course, is **" How do I develop persistence in my life?"** In the book, I've answered that question in detail and I've outlined 9 other significant principles to help you succeed in every facet of life--all of them based on **the truth of God 's Word**.

If you'd like to get a copy of The Solomon Secrets, now's the time to do it, because we're making it available as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to Pathway to Victory this month. Included with the book is our ministry-exclusive booklet, Timeless Wisdom from Proverbs.

**You can make your gift to the ministry and get your copy of The Solomon Secrets at this link: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-solomon-secrets-generous-gift-1](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac728e5bca3f4b37ac09589a531fb20e&_e=_7DwrE5LytcT3GluTkr1GEYx7yM5v56b1rAvCQ2LqawKlavteXVr9c3q4jN9B6FWRe_DqWO4CCpr-kJVRnj7Ysx4e1_g89A4_p97CRRjlWPZreoL6V0IYomi4Ibt3sFqhdIm3zdhS3XvKQ5HaHZuG951-lX7vYu8YSpdaPtG53_8Vuh13BkkUiYgQ1MK2p_19Y-5PmmBCeFDf6H3DisNqo0O23-WU-QQiW5gvOyzks4-LIfNXfPddfnwSWGH-P8gZhdPANrAOHy0kok05z-YzPlLDfSzBcmCIdI-2bopynncA7qdyUD_aP7yEF88W0LG27ni94an432LzA99Nuo3c1GllJ8J3z5Gg-3zg9yxBqjVCtbc3CeFi92KwzUb7msoLM3ox1YYgqtktxQqufxjzQ%3D%3D)**

Your gift will be used to bring bold, biblical truth to a world in need.

I truly hope that this book helps you on your journey to develop persistence and improve your relationship with God.

God bless you,

Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
|
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=ac728e5bca3f4b37ac09589a531fb20e&_t=EaMN1GI-GDs2MFsifqRkeL9spWkBHV6_Sjyl9X1P0RfbzofiHkSXjoMp1yMCg7fFeH4a7pVHVaPMokHpWTHrimxismnaR8YVtoc76O9SbPHay6yrp2uWOL6oNivy02dIwimf0dZLjK2I59HTemAfMOZ_vNgWlW6GAe1w5H2OAzg%3D)

name: Lose Cruz
subject: Raise. Build. Plan. Mobilize.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=137%2E623276%2Ex4oRiH)
When it comes to losing Ted Cruz next November, there’s _a lot_ that needs to be done between now and then — and we have a to-do list to help us keep track!
📢 Build a massive grassroots coalition of volunteers, donors, activists, and supporters to send our part-time senator home for good next year.
🗣️ Plan and run a massive ad campaign across Texas to educate voters on _the necessity_ of retiring Ted Cruz.
🤑 Raise enough resources to help support the eventual Democratic nominee.
🗳️ Mobilize and motivate Texans to get out _and vote._
**And so much more.**
This won’t be easy, but we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. During his decade in the Senate, Ted Cruz has and continues to embarrass Texas on the national stage, and we’re over it.
Your support is critical to powering our work to defeat Ted at the ballot box next year.
[**So can we count on you to pitch in $5 to take down Ted Cruz?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231110?refcode=em20231110&amount=5&refcode2=137_623276_x4oRiH&akid=137%2E623276%2Ex4oRiH)

clean_body: When it comes to losing Ted Cruz next November, there’s a lot that needs to be done between now and then — and we have a to-do list to help us keep track! 📢 Build a massive grassroots coalition of volunteers, donors, activists, and supporters to send our part-time senator home for good next year. 🗣️ Plan and run a massive ad campaign across Texas to educate voters on the necessity of retiring Ted Cruz. 🤑 Raise enough resources to help support the eventual Democratic nominee. 🗳️ Mobilize and motivate Texans to get out and vote. And so much more. This won’t be easy, but we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. During his decade in the Senate, Ted Cruz has and continues to embarrass Texas on the national stage, and we’re over it. Your support is critical to powering our work to defeat Ted at the ballot box next year. Thank you!!! ❤️ Together, — Lose Cruz

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Cold, wet, and sandy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic.

|
---
| | |
**_Cold, wet, and sandy. _**

When you're training to be a Navy SEAL in Coronado, California, those are all feelings that become second nature to you.

But you remember what you are fighting for: To be a member of the world's most elite fighting force.

These days I'm still fighting every waking moment. Instead of battling to earn my SEAL trident, **I 'm battling to save our nation from the Radical Left and their tyrannical leader, Joe Biden.**

---
| | | [SAVE AMERICA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0rhdrrri0d1v46t0nshdfkaton0jh9htpq2a848_rp22sh2s8i66p74sdim0o34clh2bs "Generic Button")
---

[**This country needs red-blooded Americans like you and me more than ever. Just like the SEALs, this is a team effort. Just like the SEALs, this is a team effort. I can’t do this without you, Friend.")

Generations from now will look back at these moments as the days that saved our Republic.

name: Micah, Team Waltz
subject: Here’s what sets Mike apart
body:
| | | When you work in politics, it's easy for all the members of Congress to start blending together.

You see career politician after career politician in the same stuffy suit with the same selfish attitude.

**But Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.) is different.**

Unlike these career politicians, Mike knows the cost of freedom - because he’s seen it firsthand serving as a **Special Forces Green Beret.**

Mike put his life on the line for our country, and after making the sacrifices he has, you don’t just turn around and accept the status quo of politicians milking hardworking Americans for everything they’re worth.

**Col. Waltz is a firm believer that once you’re a freedom fighter, you’re ALWAYS a freedom fighter.** **Now, he’s defending YOUR rights in Congress, but he needs your help.**

Because Mike isn’t afraid to wear his love for our country and unapologetic conservatism on his sleeve, the radical Left is DETERMINED to silence him.

_But I know you’re not about to let that happen._

[Can you pitch in TODAY to keep this American hero in Congress?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=9685c20cea2b45798dcc5c2a1739053b&_e=TFL5GZHLeXZ3hEzxM6ZvXa8hDgwJku7Io0aW_nfVRq7b2MD7s1U7efpnwDq0k9dGS4q-Z1II5XGbo_qt6i19P-C-8msfjZL_uwGnlX4nyyDp3mVLlwnsMpITJ3cZnMhdlHEEIQumKPZOkcNLMaLpmGXm5CnaDurkFU-437vObNY7Tpv18AEas-Hs7it_mHlZIt746_QUqy-QBS6pNmtfGLZxxAImhxwWkwpdXVwtxHgcm1royoDGYhuVJIzdHmSBfV9bjUzwMw1yZDQgryfCBDOEONzcOsD2eXQ-MPY_l2RtbfXJb4_RYPbnvXfCmpnUnVjrYo4iw0rvwK2phxh8hWfZIKUYUJ-tvXhQ_zkRBkilbgqDU_NoMOZ3OpPRRyXo)

name: Gloria J.
subject: strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
It’s about people.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73136351/437530696/-849459103?refcode=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTZlOS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yU9ERhQilj8ovt3RDeuDzIjuF69SBdO-9AhzVEFWUho=&emci=e6e8f178-3a7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=46764483)
---
I’ve told you before that I value honesty in this campaign. That’s why I won’t let us kid ourselves that we’re in for an easy race. **Democrats haven’t seen a lot of success in Tennessee in recent years. We haven’t built the kind of coalitions that we need to — or given voters enough to be enthusiastic about.** _Our electoral strategy depends on changing that._ There are 95 counties in this state, and folks in every single one of them _deserve_ to have their needs and concerns addressed. I know that what a family in Nashville needs won’t always be the same as what would help a family in Union City. I won’t just be speaking to Democrats, either. I’m committed to earning support from Republicans and Independents, too. Because there are issues that we can all agree need to be resolved — like the lack of affordable child care options in our state. Whatever your political leanings, I promise to hear you out. We can’t make real progress if we don’t listen to those who disagree with us and understand where other people are coming from. **_[This is a campaign for all Tennesseans, and I’m counting on Tennesseans to help see it through. Make your first contribution right now to say you’re with me>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73136354/437530698/209297649?refcode=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTZlOS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yU9ERhQilj8ovt3RDeuDzIjuF69SBdO-9AhzVEFWUho=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73136357/437530701/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTZlOS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yU9ERhQilj8ovt3RDeuDzIjuF69SBdO-9AhzVEFWUho=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73136360/437530704/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTZlOS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yU9ERhQilj8ovt3RDeuDzIjuF69SBdO-9AhzVEFWUho=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73136375/437530746/209297649?refcode=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.605356e9-e27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDUzNTZlOS1lMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yU9ERhQilj8ovt3RDeuDzIjuF69SBdO-9AhzVEFWUho=)
> _Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes up to a week to sync in our systems. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign._
---
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: It’s about people. | I’ve told you before that I value honesty in this campaign. That’s why I won’t let us kid ourselves that we’re in for an easy race. Democrats haven’t seen a lot of success in Tennessee in recent years. We haven’t built the kind of coalitions that we need to — or given voters enough to be enthusiastic about. Our electoral strategy depends on changing that. There are 95 counties in this state, and folks in every single one of them deserve to have their needs and concerns addressed. I know that what a family in Nashville needs won’t always be the same as what would help a family in Union City. I won’t just be speaking to Democrats, either. I’m committed to earning support from Republicans and Independents, too. Because there are issues that we can all agree need to be resolved — like the lack of affordable child care options in our state. Whatever your political leanings, I promise to hear you out. We can’t make real progress if we don’t listen to those who disagree with us and understand where other people are coming from. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria Johnson = Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes up to a week to sync in our systems. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign._ | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. body:
#
Peter — he stakes of Missouri’s U.S. Senate race just got even higher.

**But now, there’s so much more on the line.**

So if we’re able to keep up our record-breaking grassroots momentum, we really can flip this Senate seat and take back power for everyday Missourians.

Help us take back the House. Help us hold the Senate. And help us beat Donald Trump, once and for all.
#
Derek,
When you join the Military you raise your right hand and swear an oath to defend the Constitution from all enemies — foreign and domestic.
January 6th was an assault on our Constitution. It was an insurrection, and it occurred on the direction of the former President of the United States with help from prominent members of his administration and the Republican Party.
It’s disgraceful. But more than that, it’s dangerous.
Donald Trump and the GOP are a threat to our Constitution, to our democracy. They have not moderated — their lies and conspiracies since January 6th have only done more damage.
That’s why VoteVets is doubling down on our work to defeat as many of these extremists as we possibly can.

Friend,

Since forming OMG in March of this year, activity and investigations have been a whirlwind.

We've exposed financial behemoth BlackRock for war profiteering in Ukraine, Best Buy for religious discrimination against Christians, school boards, Fox News, John Fetterman, CNN, Pfizer, and most recently, the payment processing giants who are funding our nation's elections with shady practices.

The pace at OMG is breakneck because our sources and whistleblowers are handing over so many relevant stories that it is becoming impossible to keep up!

I need to expand OMG's operations but to do that,**[I need your help.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsjzGPrCAUhX8Ndhq4KAyFxXtv4ks22WKLmXbDwEXJiBjEbPz3G8xkq20_Ps65R4d19u7oifxLACZvNwJA-B8CsGd-17fbezrq5e2j_t_dYSyP8I8A5GPFH_MV0mDQfi5UXivbt6CZMxX2TCglOKctq6beYdsiZco9Okmxo4IqbVnHlAQlpRCV74ECZ4xRJphkl0Yqe-mkgE4b1RpnSUvPosYlxDz55YnJaj8fjYmhmvsp53U7DxsIDBuaPWGjF7QxF4PAEJ-IDgNar8cU95XAEHTyC9ZbjmUuoq0nnNc6POoYCB_2HD63uCeDhF9_dwmIYpXUPRB-LU0nMTqs2o9L-fl4sYypOC5bVqXerl9-nv0mJGnpeG4zMXwHAAD___GGgoc)**

Within the next ten days, I set a goal of raising $142,000 to cover the recruitment and hiring of much-needed staff that can help us keep and increase the pace.

**[Will you chip in today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsjzGPrCAUhX8Ndhq4KAyFxXtv4ks22WKLmXbDwEXJiBjEbPz3G8xkq20_Ps65R4d19u7oifxLACZvNwJA-B8CsGd-17fbezrq5e2j_t_dYSyP8I8A5GPFH_MV0mDQfi5UXivbt6CZMxX2TCglOKctq6beYdsiZco9Okmxo4IqbVnHlAQlpRCV74ECZ4xRJphkl0Yqe-mkgE4b1RpnSUvPosYlxDz55YnJaj8fjYmhmvsp53U7DxsIDBuaPWGjF7QxF4PAEJ-IDgNar8cU95XAEHTyC9ZbjmUuoq0nnNc6POoYCB_2HD63uCeDhF9_dwmIYpXUPRB-LU0nMTqs2o9L-fl4sYypOC5bVqXerl9-nv0mJGnpeG4zMXwHAAD___GGgoc)** Any amount gets me closer to our goal, and you will have my thanks.

OMG is controlled by NO ONE and funded by people just like you. We are beholden to no advertisers, special interests, parties, or candidates and take an absolutely independent outlook on reporting the truth to the American people.

Most importantly, we're able to BYPASS the filters of the media and report directly to you.

Our latest story on a massive campaign finance scheme garnered 1 million views on X (formerly Twitter) alone!

Different from when I first started my career in investigative journalism over a decade ago, getting people to watch isn't the issue!

Our story-rich environment is the issue!

It reminds me of a story from Marine Corps history, and I wanted to share it with you.

During the Battle of Chosin Reservoir, Colonel "Chesty" Puller, an iconic Marine twice decorated with the Medal of Honor, found his Marines surrounded by Chinese troops and outnumbered 35 to 1.

Col Puller radioed in to give a situation report and calmly stated, _"We've been looking for the enemy for several days now. We've finally found him.**We 're surrounded. That simplifies our problem of getting to these people and killing them."**_

While that may sound like bravado for those unfamiliar with Chesty Puller, it was far from it.

Puller and his Marines fought to the sea with ferocity and purpose, leading an Army Major General to state for history,_"The safest place in Korea was right behind a platoon of Marines. Lord, how they could fight. "_

My team at OMG is like those Marines; they are restless, diligent, and the best in their class. And we are also surrounded and grossly outnumbered.

Corruption never sleeps; it never rests, but it can only operate in darkness.

OMG's purpose is to bring it to the light.

[**Please help me do that by donating today and helping us grow.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsjzGPrCAUhX8Ndhq4KAyFxXtv4ks22WKLmXbDwEXJiBjEbPz3G8xkq20_Ps65R4d19u7oifxLACZvNwJA-B8CsGd-17fbezrq5e2j_t_dYSyP8I8A5GPFH_MV0mDQfi5UXivbt6CZMxX2TCglOKctq6beYdsiZco9Okmxo4IqbVnHlAQlpRCV74ECZ4xRJphkl0Yqe-mkgE4b1RpnSUvPosYlxDz55YnJaj8fjYmhmvsp53U7DxsIDBuaPWGjF7QxF4PAEJ-IDgNar8cU95XAEHTyC9ZbjmUuoq0nnNc6POoYCB_2HD63uCeDhF9_dwmIYpXUPRB-LU0nMTqs2o9L-fl4sYypOC5bVqXerl9-nv0mJGnpeG4zMXwHAAD___GGgoc)

Thank you for your time and attention, and please [**support our operations and growth today.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsjzGPrCAUhX8Ndhq4KAyFxXtv4ks22WKLmXbDwEXJiBjEbPz3G8xkq20_Ps65R4d19u7oifxLACZvNwJA-B8CsGd-17fbezrq5e2j_t_dYSyP8I8A5GPFH_MV0mDQfi5UXivbt6CZMxX2TCglOKctq6beYdsiZco9Okmxo4IqbVnHlAQlpRCV74ECZ4xRJphkl0Yqe-mkgE4b1RpnSUvPosYlxDz55YnJaj8fjYmhmvsp53U7DxsIDBuaPWGjF7QxF4PAEJ-IDgNar8cU95XAEHTyC9ZbjmUuoq0nnNc6POoYCB_2HD63uCeDhF9_dwmIYpXUPRB-LU0nMTqs2o9L-fl4sYypOC5bVqXerl9-nv0mJGnpeG4zMXwHAAD___GGgoc)

name: Doug White
subject: Organized local Ds stop MAGA cold
body:
Results show our strategy for silencing MAGA works
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/55OktXS5-/c?w=7MDR3on-uONgpiW4YNnU-N-qQsvlRMpJcZCajgglpxY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzU1T2t0WFM1LT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Organized local Ds stop MAGA cold
---
| | For Democrats across America, there was a lot to cheer about in this Tuesday’s elections. Democratic Party candidates won big in a number of competitive races—including deep-red Kentucky, where Gov. Andy Beshear clobbered his Trump-backed opponent and in Virginia, where Democrats won control of the House of Delegates while maintaining their majority in the state Senate.
And, almost 17 months after the conservative-dominated U.S. Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, candidates and ballot measures backing reproductive rights scored victories in a number of states with constituencies spanning the political spectrum. For example, by a strong majority voters in MAGA-controlled Ohio enshrined the right to abortion in their state constitution—a harbinger of things likely to come in other states, regardless of their political makeup. Americans, it is clear, still believe in individual freedom and personal choice.
But in Washington state’s 4th Congressional District—where MAGA has run rampant and controls most city councils, school boards, county commissions, police and sheriff departments, community organizations, housing boards and more—Tuesday’s election was devastating.
This election MAGA seized even more seats on our local school boards. This partisan takeover is causing long-term and possibly irreparable damage to our children due to MAGA policies of book banning, curriculum based on “God’s law,” erasing and shaming of LGBT+ people, defunding of school systems in favor of charter schools, animosity and suspicion towards teachers and a push to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education.
---
| | Check your local race results [here](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/55OktXS5-/c?w=rqAAjIphR2oBP6cWO9ppF8Do6byOWZUpDBREAxL9keo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN1bHRzLnZvdGUud2EuZ292L3Jlc3VsdHMvMjAyMzExMDcvIiwiciI6ImE3ODQ3NTlhLTU0OTctNDEyZS1iNmQ1LWFhMzgzZjdjY2QzOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | Despite this we see an opportunity. There has always been a chink in MAGA’s armor: truth. For too long Democrats in Central Washington have operated in the background for fear of retribution from MAGA zealots. Attacks by MAGA are well known, horrific and terrifying. As a result, Democrats here have restricted political campaigning—canvassing, text messaging, phone banking, post card mailings and conversations—to known Democrats. That represents under 30 percent of registered voters. The remaining 70 percent of voters hear only the bellowing and unending repetition of MAGA lies.
But in two places in Central Washington the Democrats were not silent. They were loud, demanding and shouting the truth. And in these two places Democrats excelled!
In Richland the fight over the school board started long before this election. Three MAGA school board members broke rules by holding a closed door session in the absence of their two other colleagues and the public to make policy on mask mandates—an undemocratic action which shook the city, resulting in a Democrat-led recall election. In Tuesday’s election, [all three recalled MAGA candidates](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/55OktXS5-/c?w=2cw-MifYlqXKUwN20OAYLYpWFCXjmaiG8YxIzDaLRkA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua3Vvdy5vcmcvc3Rvcmllcy9yZWNhbGwtdm90ZS1sZWF2ZXMtcmljaGxhbmQtaW4tbmVlZC1vZi1hLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC1tZW1iZXIiLCJyIjoiM2MyNTg0MTQtODJhOS00ZmZkLWFmNWEtZTVjMDQ5OTM3YzQyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0), were replaced with three non-MAGA members who embrace democratic values.
In the small town of Sunnyside, a group of six residents decided that the status quo would not do and they set out to wrest MAGA’s grip from the City Council and School Board. In the boldest local campaign in memory they took their town by storm. Democrats were everywhere all the time and held numerous candidate forums to increase accessibility of voters. The four running for City Council won their seats and one of the two running for School Board won theirs.
It could not be clearer that Rural Americans United’s strategy for Central Washington of increasing the visibility and voice of Democrats and moderates is the best approach. With energized, active voters we can assert our individual rights and our belief in a truly democratic system that is fair to everyone.
---
| | |
---
| | We are raising representation of Democrats all across Central Washington and to continue running our encouraging pro-Democratic ads we need your support. Please donate generously.
---

| | We are getting close to starting our 2nd month!

---
| Ohio Issue 1 is a victory to be celebrated! At RAU we reported on the previous election which attempted to make it harder to enshrine Issue 1 in the state constitution. We stated that, whereas the victory is sweet, the voting pattern was alarming. The clear Urban/ Rural divide was stark. And the Republican encroachment on
---
| | suburban areas were obvious. This outcome was repeated in the current election, demonstrating the consistent divergence of Urban/ Rural ideologies. Some say that as long as we have our islands of Democratic dense voters, then it is good. At RAU we see things differently, we see the people in rural areas living under MAGA tyranny and being brainwashed by unrelenting disinformation and lies. Their lives diminished and unjust. In Central Washington, this is our lives, but without the island of Democrats to help mitigate some MAGA oppression. Even our largest population center, the Tri-Cities, is MAGA red! It is up to us to stand up and say "No More!"
---

---
| | ICYMI

clean_body: Results show our strategy for silencing MAGA works | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | Organized local Ds stop MAGA cold | | For Democrats across America, there was a lot to cheer about in this Tuesday’s elections. Democratic Party candidates won big in a number of competitive races—including deep-red Kentucky, where Gov. Andy Beshear clobbered his Trump-backed opponent and in Virginia, where Democrats won control of the House of Delegates while maintaining their majority in the state Senate. And, almost 17 months after the conservative-dominated U.S. Supreme Court struck down Roe v. Wade, candidates and ballot measures backing reproductive rights scored victories in a number of states with constituencies spanning the political spectrum. For example, by a strong majority voters in MAGA-controlled Ohio enshrined the right to abortion in their state constitution—a harbinger of things likely to come in other states, regardless of their political makeup. Americans, it is clear, still believe in individual freedom and personal choice. But in Washington state’s 4th Congressional District—where MAGA has run rampant and controls most city councils, school boards, county commissions, police and sheriff departments, community organizations, housing boards and more—Tuesday’s election was devastating. This election MAGA seized even more seats on our local school boards. This partisan takeover is causing long-term and possibly irreparable damage to our children due to MAGA policies of book banning, curriculum based on “God’s law,” erasing and shaming of LGBT+ people, defunding of school systems in favor of charter schools, animosity and suspicion towards teachers and a push to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education. | | Check your local race results | | Despite this we see an opportunity. There has always been a chink in MAGA’s armor: truth. For too long Democrats in Central Washington have operated in the background for fear of retribution from MAGA zealots. Attacks by MAGA are well known, horrific and terrifying. As a result, Democrats here have restricted political campaigning—canvassing, text messaging, phone banking, post card mailings and conversations—to known Democrats. That represents under 30 percent of registered voters. The remaining 70 percent of voters hear only the bellowing and unending repetition of MAGA lies. But in two places in Central Washington the Democrats were not silent. They were loud, demanding and shouting the truth. And in these two places Democrats excelled! In Richland the fight over the school board started long before this election. Three MAGA school board members broke rules by holding a closed door session in the absence of their two other colleagues and the public to make policy on mask mandates—an undemocratic action which shook the city, resulting in a Democrat-led recall election. In Tuesday’s election, , were replaced with three non-MAGA members who embrace democratic values. In the small town of Sunnyside, a group of six residents decided that the status quo would not do and they set out to wrest MAGA’s grip from the City Council and School Board. In the boldest local campaign in memory they took their town by storm. Democrats were everywhere all the time and held numerous candidate forums to increase accessibility of voters. The four running for City Council won their seats and one of the two running for School Board won theirs. It could not be clearer that Rural Americans United’s strategy for Central Washington of increasing the visibility and voice of Democrats and moderates is the best approach. With energized, active voters we can assert our individual rights and our belief in a truly democratic system that is fair to everyone. | | | | | We are raising representation of Democrats all across Central Washington and to continue running our encouraging pro-Democratic ads we need your support. Please donate generously. | | | | | | | TikTok Topics: 1. Destroying election integrity with ballot harvesting and 2. When Dems get loud, Dems win | | | | | | | | | We have been up and down Central Washington. Appreciating the wonderful efforts of our neighbors. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are getting close to starting our 2nd month! | | | | | | | | Ohio Issue 1 is a victory to be celebrated! At RAU we reported on the previous election which attempted to make it harder to enshrine Issue 1 in the state constitution. We stated that, whereas the victory is sweet, the voting pattern was alarming. The clear Urban/ Rural divide was stark. And the Republican encroachment on | | suburban areas were obvious. This outcome was repeated in the current election, demonstrating the consistent divergence of Urban/ Rural ideologies. Some say that as long as we have our islands of Democratic dense voters, then it is good. At RAU we see things differently, we see the people in rural areas living under MAGA tyranny and being brainwashed by unrelenting disinformation and lies. Their lives diminished and unjust. In Central Washington, this is our lives, but without the island of Democrats to help mitigate some MAGA oppression. Even our largest population center, the Tri-Cities, is MAGA red! It is up to us to stand up and say "No More!" | | | | | ICYMI | | | | | | | Want to join our team? Please contact us. We are looking for all skills including: Content creators: social and website Researchers Data analysis Community outreach Fundraising | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .
