body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)
Derek, every time I travel from California to DC there’s a real cost for my family. I leave behind my three school age kids.
I tell you this because it 100% informs my work in Congress. **I don't go to Washington to curry favor with those in charge, schmooze at cocktail parties, or be wined and dined by lobbyists.** I go because I’m fighting to unrig the rules on behalf of families like yours and mine. Some weeks, that feels like a fool's errand. But much of the time, I know we’re really making a difference.
**[I spoke with a local reporter about this while carving pumpkins with my kids (multitasking for the win!):](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-1/?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_CDC_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32905_3422442_3uN_PV&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-1/?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_CDC_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32905_3422442_3uN_PV&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)
It’s at those cocktail receptions and lobbyist retreats that big checks get doled out to politicians. But because I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists (and I’m the only person in this race who can say that) I really rely on supporters like you. **I’m so proud to “do Congress” differently than most, and it’s all possible because of grassroots support.**
**[If you’re able, could you chip in to our campaign today? Every supporter makes a real difference in this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-1/?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_CDC_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32905_3422442_3uN_PV&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-1/?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_1_CDC_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32905_3422442_3uN_PV&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)
Thanks a ton,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_CDC_20231110_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32905_3422442_3uN_PV&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=32905%2E3422442%2E3uN_PV)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: We need Angela Alsobrooks in the Senate, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1010&amount=25&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ][IMG]

Having served in the Senate for nearly 15 years, I can safely say that
I’ve seen both the best and the worst of what the chamber has to offer.

At its best, the Senate can be a beacon of progress and a testament to our
democratic ideals. I truly believe that Angela Alsobrooks embodies those
traits and would be an invaluable asset and a champion for democracy.

That’s why I’m proud to endorse Angela as the next United States Senator
from Maryland, and why I’m emailing you now,
Peter.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1011&amount=25&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]This is going to be a tough race, and Angela is relying on grassroots
support from people like you. Can I count on you to chip in $25 to send
Angela to the Senate?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1012&amount=25&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Donate $25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1013&amount=35&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Other Amount

As a state’s attorney and as Prince George’s County Executive, Angela
dedicated her career to bettering the lives of Maryland families by
increasing opportunity, prioritizing education, and improving public
safety.

On top of that, she has an energy and an enthusiasm for public service and
lifting up communities that we could use a lot more of in the
Senate, Peter.

I know that Angela will represent Maryland with dignity, grace, and
determination, and I’m ready to do what I can to help her win.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1014&amount=25&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Will you join me in supporting Angela in her race for the U.S. Senate
by donating $25 today?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7624?t=1009&amount=35&akid=652%2E52803%2ErEwvFG ]Other Amount

Thank you for your time, Peter.

—Kirsten Gillibrand

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

")**

As president, I will focus on the issues that **MATTER** like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border.

_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for!

**[I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c7b559c18b9406e8e8789718df484b4&_e=Z8SOCDeQF0Jnfx1JHGXMb0D2OfxhUiB2aipryo2ULPiF1plUaRIlu5F2f86B0RoJsOXC44PxSzYS7w0kXxBy2dqVS5n4X1mYSISChrX_uP9FYOCoun8pVCyd-nFRpWs6alesSl0mQjHaGP9S-UUndSjgEg8V6MKNaqyDFUhJJI8kfNm5-thxqUQalK8kjUDhpZ5g-MwAZoJ8yU5a89yKjyQvaU0HXYq6PLmvIrA80juP3uOZ4ONtUl9SKtKuEhWv3datWL2S9ecrI24FanrSDlXjedvteJ-lViY3ICY7u9ARHvJyrKtXRo9v2yr4WoSLOfqXz0EOnjs-lpuWsCBEQoIiDufuP4HN3RPQlQztj0aC828a8WAJeAqs0EqRD7ADMA6Mp4LNgz7Hfmj1COFmjtVJLlA1T2bXPoP2QAlT-7EGTCPV7JCdnzQFgDK1LszyU7QVF2M1qDD9Dz6M8RSg_KxfGDqxU4lviwS2yYxoghvcmOsiaHKig0Aq0Q84HiPI1Vg8Dfoc-rHfVz_ACNfBS0M9VwS9P_BrXKcxbG-1tt6I1e3sQ_t5j4nQ_3yux76eAg5iK_N-z1Lrso2c3NlhUQnBRps2LKGyqb723zSu_Tp0MLCf2fYMjWT57veO_kK_83480rrQpX-MiN8DgBTLBXKcYPjZupxtd5A1-zWQmw0%3D "I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c7b559c18b9406e8e8789718df484b4&_e=Z8SOCDeQF0Jnfx1JHGXMb0D2OfxhUiB2aipryo2ULPiF1plUaRIlu5F2f86B0RoJ8b8x7W1UmBwlkD2FJy41VLEU61UN239ESgk_DLaZ4X_Rg7tEp_GAK_WZCA5bOJH0-2ozydB3kx_VX-PxeM1Q2iy7EMjwN529H08yoAPcBkCFFVSoSspwfhTiXktRBb9aUR3HQ5DPkNFaiu95pyTRg5ID3458E5LO8d0feSiM43Bd_LB-QDWpCBNKPCzdykjc1N3xE9kDt_tA1aj3YufQ_yp6dt9qiwqI7_908CyMspFMOfP9zq0uCGkt8vbK2QRfb53lVuhXkd3wqoQATfDEV1VStDj4DWbhEcpBmMive_V9OpzvETwwSWydxCWcRUXN7Y1nyXuzgtOMWJh_4ttAsx3InSKSefZfWhCwkpExh_9Va898WGEs5Hmx3W84_FeXA5zH4F8VtVhMiPlbSlerOadCoA7pE35HTS0r0vlhqpQtl602OX391-Zlq7HW8MzgSP3YgaV1E7Oh9flNk8TSmmI6587ww6tpfG7yOaVtW0aVJX19DJfLoplu6x3GZp4CgbaU5Hrc73JjNUCrsSFUA3tirCt19LHVssX8goM7ftBpEzHFg910WrBO8YrhMlw-7IiTNM3l244AbPXpZn9hxA%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Because of YOU | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally say thank you. I had the opportunity to take the stage for my third presidential debate and prove to America that I am the ONLY candidate who can win this fight and save our country's future. From the moment I left the stage, I've been FLOODED with a nonstop SURGE OF SUPPORT. "Right now, momentum is on our side, but I need YOUR help to keep it going. Can I count on your support today?" | | | We're closer than ever to VICTORY , but our work is far from over. We must continue the momentum, never let up, and keep pouring 100% into every day. With less than 70 days until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come. The stakes are now higher than ever to win this race. "Will you rush an immediate donation to help me continue to FUEL the momentum and WIN the fight for our future?" | | "With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. " As president, I will focus on the issues that MATTER like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border. We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen. I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for! "I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG." My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: The Long Run PAC
subject: This is unsettling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
This is concerning news, team. Take a look at CNN’s most recent National Poll:
**_CNN National Poll_
Donald Trump: 49%
Joe Biden 45%**
**Trump has a 4-point lead on Biden among registered voters nationwide.**
This is not the news we wanted to share today. We know critical and life-changing issues are on the ballot next November — abortion, democracy, climate action, gun violence prevention, and so much more. We cannot afford another four years of Trump, who will stop at nothing to strip away our democratic freedoms.
From day one, it's been clear that this race will be close. And after Tuesday’s remarkable elections in Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky, it’s clear that every single ballot cast in the 2024 election will make a difference. Especially in the tipping point swing state like Wisconsin.
So we need to do everything in our power to turn more voters out to the polls in 2024 and keep President Biden in the White House. And Mandela is leading the charge with Power to the Polls Wisconsin to make sure of that.
**[Will you please split a $5 contribution between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today? Every donation will help us reelect President Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=1&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=2&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
Power to the Polls Wisconsin is already knocking on voters’ doors, showing up in the community to listen to voters’ concerns and building the foundation necessary to ensure Democratic voters reach the polls next November.
Democrats have proven the power of high voter turnout. We saw it on Tuesday when Ohio voted to enshrine the right to abortion in their constitution, when Virginians voted to flip their State Assembly blue, and when Kentuckians reelected their Democratic Governor.
When more people vote, we win. So it's no secret that the voters we reach now will make all the difference in 2024.
And if we continue to work together to get out the vote, we can do the same for President Biden, Tammy Baldwin, and every Democrat on the ballot next November.
But first, Power to the Polls needs our support to continue to talk with voters about the issues that matter most to them and empower them to show up to the polls on Election Day.
**[So, we are asking: can you please split a $5 contribution or whatever you can afford between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today? Every donation will help us keep Wisconsin Blue.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=3&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Power to the Polls Wisconsin and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.ADME7Q&amount=5&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=22&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.l1zvmy&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=23&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.0iRyiC&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=24&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.3owE8C&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=25&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.44g3gi&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=26&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em231110-1-t3&t=27&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
Thank you,
The Team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=4996_196590_AoJmxo&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=4996%2E196590%2EAoJmxo)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

clean_body: Which candidate would you most want to have a drink with?| | | Peter, Enough talk about policy. We’ve asked you a lot of questions about the Republican Presidential candidates and their respective platforms. But now we want to ask you the questions that REALLY matter... These questions might seem silly, but our Party needs to nominate the candidate that best connects with everyday Americans like you, Peter. It’s the ONLY WAY we’ll win the crucial 2024 election. | | PRESIDENTIAL PERSONALITY POLL GOP VOTER: : MISSING DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT TONIGHT | | Thank you, NRSC HQ Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Our campaign is catching fire
body:
Because of YOU
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_)
---

Friend,

I wanted to reach out to personally say thank you.

I had the opportunity to take the stage for my third presidential debate and prove to America that I am the **ONLY** candidate who can win this fight and save our country's future.

From the moment I left the stage, I've been **FLOODED** with a nonstop **SURGE OF SUPPORT. **

**[Right now, momentum is on our side, but I need YOUR help to keep it going. Can I count on your support today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_ "Right now, momentum is on our side, but I need YOUR help to keep it going. Can I count on your support today?")**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_)
---

We're closer than ever to _**VICTORY**_ , but our work is far from over.

We must continue the momentum, never let up, and keep pouring 100% into every day.

With **less than 70 days** until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come.

_The stakes are now higher than ever to win this race._

**[Will you rush an immediate donation to help me continue to FUEL the momentum and WIN the fight for our future?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_ "Will you rush an immediate donation to help me continue to FUEL the momentum and WIN the fight for our future?")**
---
| | [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4_X61S5hO6odLBH3Z2idpQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
**[With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_ "With your support, we WILL make America strong and proud again. ")**

As president, I will focus on the issues that **MATTER** like our skyrocketing debt, out-of-control government spending, lack of transparency in schools, high crime in our cities, and chaos on the border.

_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

I assure you that your dedication and commitment to a better future will never go unnoticed. Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for believing that America is worth fighting for!

**[I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_ "I look forward to having you by my side and finishing this race STRONG.")**

My very best,

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/w8DCXm3YEZecbLtn_IlC5Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4R8AWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93YXRjaC1ub3ctam9pbi10aGUtbW92ZW1lbnQtdGhpcmQtdHY_)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pdhZcBzYDpXNd-hEPPRIhw~~/AARclAA~~~ "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pdhZcBzYDpXNd-hEPPRIhw~~/AARclAA~~~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DyMbQEjlrBGUfZRAUDdnCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4RwAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DyMbQEjlrBGUfZRAUDdnCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4RwAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DyMbQEjlrBGUfZRAUDdnCQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMRq2P4RwAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_ "DONATE")

name: Troy E. Nehls
subject: My heart is with our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, Tomorrow is Veterans Day, and I’d like to take a moment to thank all veterans, especially my fellow Texans, for their service.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d04ca26b1a34bf153947229f28c3afba/263b597c52efb812c3d6b838967d376c/35193)
---
As a proud veteran of the United States Army and a member of the House Committee on Veterans’ Affairs, I know all too well the sacrifices our brave men and women in uniform make to preserve our freedoms. Our military service members go overseas, leaving their families and loved ones behind, to keep America safe. And we owe them a great debt of gratitude for everything they’ve done for our country. I will continue to fight for America’s veterans in Congress and always honor their service and sacrifice. \- Troy E. Nehls
---
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d04ca26b1a34bf153947229f28c3afba/98f6c5ed0003ce7ec3d6b838967d376c/35193)| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/d04ca26b1a34bf153947229f28c3afba/d9aa5b1a39e5ae4fc3d6b838967d376c/35193)

But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kM1uwyAQBp9mfYsFCwZz4NDUcipFao_plb80VOAgYzfK21eO0l6_HY1Ga3JJ8XzXIPeAeIm-AiKwF0A88v3nuziejsMu9PfDbhAdv21XfAXE5V7CP_q0tCGbmLZVDo3X6Hp0rgmaCqUE63pFmosWPSEcxblTkjBjg5XE9JR1jlrJUPEmaiTIKKWESsI5tsJ7Ib0TZ6sINZYDJ7c4tf46meS_l3nNpXXX3CR9WZZSH0kj4FjNTzA5zNGZdlpdCmt9BG4w4PiM3sDVVjfHssTrVAHHdXouNgAbH09hgzJZvn0czKmZtS-3mFKsQgInX3_O3wAAAP__yuVlfw)

**It’s true:** Just this year, we have won 31 special elections, defying odds and breaking barriers for communities. And if we continue to build our grassroots power, there is no stopping what we can do.
**The contrast is clear – Democrats are focused on protecting our rights, while Republicans are doing everything they can to take them away.**

THEN: First Lady Jill Biden echoed her call to come together and defend democracy by expanding power in our state legislatures! BUT: Republicans all across the country are doing everything in their power to halt the expansion of democratic power, push their anti-democracy agenda in the states, and roll back all of our progress. SO NOW: We are relying on our dedicated supporters to stand behind us and help us fight for democracy by electing state Democrats in states like yours and beyond. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | For years, Republicans have had the advantage – building their majorities in chambers and destroying progress on abortion access, LGBTQ+ rights, and gun safety laws. But we are right on their heels – we have shown that when grassroots Democrats stand together, we can get real work done! | Tea Party Patriot,
First, I wish you all a very Happy Veterans Day Weekend! I hope you enjoyed your time with your families. Thank you to all of our Veterans both Active Duty and Retired for all that you have done and continue to do for us. We are forever in your debt!
---
---
| Now, a lot has happened since our October meeting and boy does the GOP have some 'splainin to do!
This Tuesday, November 14th we will have our monthly meeting at South Metro Fire at our usual time of 6:30 PM.
This month we will hear from Councilwoman-Elect Stephanie Hancock, hear updates on the Prop 108 Lawsuit, Trump Cases, Discussion about the 2023 elections, calls for Ronna McDaniel to resign as Chairwoman of the RNC, the disastrous debates that the RNC has held, a look ahead at the 2024 elections and more.
Also, should we have a Christmas party (Bah humbug!), all happening this Tuesday! Don't miss it!
Just as an FYI, we are trying a different registration portal this month in an attempt to avoid the trolls that always take tickets from our valued members. Let us know what you think!

body:
We are one week out with no solution on the horizon.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73142272/437549965/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFjMTRhYjAtZWM3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T1OQd3T1lFf8_Po6QaT5-qvF8Z69SAfSVLD2C6pYKLA=&emci=56e63593-267f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bac14ab0-ec7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=10481059)

| | Hey Peter, Last week, I wrote about the latest in a long line of government shutdown deadlines to hit Congress, and how communities like ours would face real consequences because of these spending fights. **Now, with one week left to keep the government open, leaders in Congress are trying to run out the clock on finding a solution — again.** It's been clear for a while now that voters are tired of this routine. The House of Representatives is where we should be building consensus and working to find solutions that will make a difference in the lives of everyday people. But too many in Washington would rather create gridlock and cut critical dollars going to families and seniors. **When I wrote about how I was focused on how this shutdown fight would hurt our district, I meant it.** This movement is fighting for our neighbors here in CA-30. Across the district, voters have made it clear that they want a representative in Congress who will listen and work for our community, not play partisan games with important issues. **[I'm running for Congress to bring a fresh kind of leadership that will deliver for our community here in CA-30. Our community-driven campaign is powered by donors like you, Peter — can you pitch in $3 today so we can send a message to Washington that we're ready to move past the constant dysfunction and start getting to work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73142275/437549968/1183499175?refcode=2023-11-10-shutdown&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bac14ab0-ec7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmFjMTRhYjAtZWM3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=T1OQd3T1lFf8_Po6QaT5-qvF8Z69SAfSVLD2C6pYKLA=)** Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Nick Melvoin [info@nickmelvoin.com]
Date: Fri, November 3, 2023 at 11:46 AM
Subject: Another shutdown? 😵💫
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Peter,
After nearly a month of self-inflicted gridlock, the House of Representatives was finally able to get back to work earlier this week. This news _should_ be some much-needed relief — but now Congress is facing another potential government shutdown if they can't pass a spending bill in the next two weeks.
I'm sure I can guess your reaction here: **_Again?_**
Yes, it feels like we've all been watching our government get pushed to the brink of another shutdown for months. But while most headlines focus on the latest outrageous nonsense coming out of Congress, **I'm thinking about the real damage to our district that we face with these constant spending fights.**
I'm thinking about the next class of high school graduates in our district, who may be unable to continue their studies and pursue their passions because funding for Pell Grants might get cut.
I'm thinking of the young adults working to build a life for themselves in Los Angeles, but who struggle to find opportunities because people in Congress want to slash funding for job trainings, apprenticeship programs, and housing vouchers.
I'm thinking about the parents I represent on the school board, who should feel secure in taking care of their families — but instead could be forced to stretch every dollar in their budget, because funding for childcare, Head Start, and WIC benefits wound up on the chopping block in this spending fight.
And I'm thinking of the seniors in CA-30, who could find the rug pulled out from under them because people in Congress want to cut funding for Meals on Wheels and local Social Security field offices.
**_None of this is a game_**. If the House GOP has its way, our district will suffer real consequences. All of the families, seniors, and workers in CA-30 whose lives are impacted by the decisions in Washington deserve a representative who will keep our communities supported. **That doesn't happen with partisan soundbites or grandstanding, but with serious leadership focused on results.** That's what our movement is fighting for, and that's the leadership I'll bring to Congress as our next representative.

clean_body: We are one week out with no solution on the horizon. | | | | Hey Peter, Last week, I wrote about the latest in a long line of government shutdown deadlines to hit Congress, and how communities like ours would face real consequences because of these spending fights. Now, with one week left to keep the government open, leaders in Congress are trying to run out the clock on finding a solution — again. It's been clear for a while now that voters are tired of this routine. The House of Representatives is where we should be building consensus and working to find solutions that will make a difference in the lives of everyday people. But too many in Washington would rather create gridlock and cut critical dollars going to families and seniors. When I wrote about how I was focused on how this shutdown fight would hurt our district, I meant it. This movement is fighting for our neighbors here in CA-30. Across the district, voters have made it clear that they want a representative in Congress who will listen and work for our community, not play partisan games with important issues. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Thanks for standing with us, Nick \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Nick Melvoin [info@nickmelvoin.com] Date: Fri, November 3, 2023 at 11:46 AM Subject: Another shutdown? 😵💫 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, After nearly a month of self-inflicted gridlock, the House of Representatives was finally able to get back to work earlier this week. This news should be some much-needed relief — but now Congress is facing another potential government shutdown if they can't pass a spending bill in the next two weeks. I'm sure I can guess your reaction here: Again? Yes, it feels like we've all been watching our government get pushed to the brink of another shutdown for months. But while most headlines focus on the latest outrageous nonsense coming out of Congress, I'm thinking about the real damage to our district that we face with these constant spending fights. I'm thinking about the next class of high school graduates in our district, who may be unable to continue their studies and pursue their passions because funding for Pell Grants might get cut. I'm thinking of the young adults working to build a life for themselves in Los Angeles, but who struggle to find opportunities because people in Congress want to slash funding for job trainings, apprenticeship programs, and housing vouchers. I'm thinking about the parents I represent on the school board, who should feel secure in taking care of their families — but instead could be forced to stretch every dollar in their budget, because funding for childcare, Head Start, and WIC benefits wound up on the chopping block in this spending fight. And I'm thinking of the seniors in CA-30, who could find the rug pulled out from under them because people in Congress want to cut funding for Meals on Wheels and local Social Security field offices. None of this is a game. If the House GOP has its way, our district will suffer real consequences. All of the families, seniors, and workers in CA-30 whose lives are impacted by the decisions in Washington deserve a representative who will keep our communities supported. That doesn't happen with partisan soundbites or grandstanding, but with serious leadership focused on results. That's what our movement is fighting for, and that's the leadership I'll bring to Congress as our next representative. = More soon, Nick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

---
On the same day I took the witness stand, one of the Republican presidential candidates chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to __attack__ me online.
---
This is the same person who said that it would be a "fatal" mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me.
---
Let me clear something up for this very confused little RINO.
---
At the end of the day, it's not the GOP that lets a person be the presidential nominee... **_It 's the _**_**_VOTERS_**_** _who choose our nominee._**

---
_If the Party establishment can hijack the primary in order to steal the nomination from the _most popular_ GOP candidate in history and cancel YOUR vote, then the GOP will have become no different from the tyrannical Democrats who are trying to remove my name from the ballot.
_
---
The only thing "fatal" I see is this candidate's chances of _EVER_ having a future in politics. He will "get the BOOT" - as they say - and fade into oblivion.

---
But that's what you get when you choose to side with the tyrannical Biden regime for the sake of your own political ambitions.

---
OH WELL!

---
Very soon, the primary will be OVER - and we will instead be able to focus 100% of our time, resources, and efforts on FIRING the tyrannical crook in the White House.

---
_And the truth is - polls consistently show that I am the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe._

Together, we will wrap up the primary ASAP and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, On the same day I took the witness stand, one of the Republican presidential candidates chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to attack me online. This is the same person who said that it would be a "fatal" mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me. Let me clear something up for this very confused little RINO. At the end of the day, it's not the GOP that lets a person be the presidential nominee... It 's the _VOTERS who choose our nominee. If the Party establishment can hijack the primary in order to steal the nomination from the most popular GOP candidate in history and cancel YOUR vote, then the GOP will have become no different from the tyrannical Democrats who are trying to remove my name from the ballot. The only thing "fatal" I see is this candidate's chances of EVER having a future in politics. He will "get the BOOT" - as they say - and fade into oblivion. But that's what you get when you choose to side with the tyrannical Biden regime for the sake of your own political ambitions. OH WELL! Very soon, the primary will be OVER - and we will instead be able to focus 100% of our time, resources, and efforts on FIRING the tyrannical crook in the White House. And the truth is - polls consistently show that I am the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe. Together, we will wrap up the primary ASAP and we will win back the White House and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek -- Joe Manchin announced he isn't running for re-election, so now we have even more work to do to defend our Democratic Senate majority.
Policy differences with Senator Manchin aside, I ran for Senate promising to be the 51st Democratic vote on big priorities. Now, West Virginia's likely to flip red next year.
I've been proud of what we've done with our narrow majority -- we've gotten some wins for working people in PA + around the country. **But all of that is at risk, especially now.**
We're fighting an uphill battle to keep the Senate Majority, and, seeing an opportunity, _million$ in dirty corporate PAC money are going to be spent to flip seat after seat._
**[I'm going to do all I can to stop the GOP from flipping PA 🔴. If you're with me, can you make a contribution of any amount to power our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1-8662&refcode2=8662_434096_HA9Amx&akid=8662%2E434096%2EHA9Amx)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231110-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231110-8662&refcode2=8662_434096_HA9Amx&akid=8662%2E434096%2EHA9Amx)**
Our team has been people-powered since day 1 -- so *thank you* for your support. **[Whatever you can chip in directly helps us stand up to the GOP.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1-8662&refcode2=8662_434096_HA9Amx&akid=8662%2E434096%2EHA9Amx)**
Thank you,
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231110-8662-footer&t=1&refcode2=8662_434096_HA9Amx&akid=8662%2E434096%2EHA9Amx)**

name: Faith Alerts ------ [via Team Crane]
subject: God’s guiding hand has carried me through even the most dire circumstances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL.

| |
---
| | | _Friend, do you believe in God?_

I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL. With 5 wartime deployments, including 3 with SEAL Team 3, I've been in the most difficult and dangerous situations imaginable.

But through it all, God's guiding hand has carried me through even the most dire circumstances.

And even though I've put down my combat boots to serve this great nation in Congress, I still count on the Lord everyday to watch over me.

But there's a lot of work to be done in Congress to fix our country, drain the Swamp, and end the cycle of corrupt politicians putting their own interests above We the People.

**[So today I'm humbly asking you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I take on this fight.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=417c3bf780b741a9b0408c5cf0de9348&_e=tJs_tY5houlcmdzJORwyEB2sgoF8JwonLaGZreNgtxSKUhZFOlNdFKPG5HVACIh0DtTfAtNpXb60-MFJR_VC0h1OzhUUZAYwTmOO0sVZqqtIcK0UZyTJP0j1hcbW5aFGCQdlTp_Ngv55MhtRgyjO4iZQJAFjFE9No_B3Wd7WxjWsOvciJBQDD8PHtQHI5pdOq9K-82FALbJnUyJBudSPYb_tL26PYhxusQOSiuHwgG96HddYE1R0i1ry3w1D1ui4XhdwiKPlG35V8l80bgVDwdeuz8qKVD1H3y1QuzJIvqDXhQ4YMWiB9sPtWP_B2DdjUlmf5-h_s_bxKx-CvAKK6UJnu_cOvfd-J3cUCI5EEwq30ezMO7YFdvBU3XeMkCOzTnZUVBuumV4gk2iiYE0tVdTmsMimz2gaKW7tfF7JHZ_EHGlHBJhHvuw7Gs0099YibQE_NV50uamg3fiU2WaFUEDDrn8KXq6eTcnaJmz4msc%3D "So today I’m humbly asking you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I take on this fight.")** | | [SEND A PRAYER](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=417c3bf780b741a9b0408c5cf0de9348&_e=tJs_tY5houlcmdzJORwyEB2sgoF8JwonLaGZreNgtxSKUhZFOlNdFKPG5HVACIh0DtTfAtNpXb60-MFJR_VC0h1OzhUUZAYwTmOO0sVZqqtIcK0UZyTJP0j1hcbW5aFGCQdlTp_Ngv55MhtRgyjO4iZQJAFjFE9No_B3Wd7WxjWsOvciJBQDD8PHtQHI5pdOq9K-82FALbJnUyJBudSPYb_tL26PYhxusQOSiuHwgG96HddYE1R0i1ry3w1D1ui4XhdwiKPlG35V8l80bgVDwdeuz8qKVD1H3y1QuzJIvqDXhQ4YMWiB9sPtWP_B2Ddjtlbvm719HoyAhJ93toD959wHoE2BijGOW1iKez6H7S3aQvaQMGGG-uuNCcL9I10OEwxBoBSxSatWt1urD19hJN9Lg4Xh1avOcxEXC67Jv9rOVDQYq6D5-E2ps9ksT3TF9UG2SWfkUdsOr1fDhw_uMFf-44iSStC_RTmiGLdu85k%3D)

clean_body: I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL. | | | | | Friend, do you believe in God? I spent 13 years fighting on the frontlines as a Navy SEAL. With 5 wartime deployments, including 3 with SEAL Team 3, I've been in the most difficult and dangerous situations imaginable. But through it all, God's guiding hand has carried me through even the most dire circumstances. And even though I've put down my combat boots to serve this great nation in Congress, I still count on the Lord everyday to watch over me. But there's a lot of work to be done in Congress to fix our country, drain the Swamp, and end the cycle of corrupt politicians putting their own interests above We the People. "So today I’m humbly asking you to lend me your thoughts and prayers as I take on this fight." | | Thank you & God bless, Eli Crane | | | "Express donate here" Americans are tired of politicians selling us out and driving this country into the ground. If we want different results from our elected officials in Washington, then we must send different people to serve. Eli is an outsider who will bring both his military experience and business background to Congress. If you want to support Eli Crane now, you can "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>" | Paid for by Crane For Congress Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. PO Box 1950 Cortaro, AZ 85652 Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

clean_body: Demands are getting louder for Congress to protect DACA recipients. | | | Peter, Earlier this week, a group of labor organizations and large companies sent a letter to Congressional leaders urging them to take action to protect DACA recipients after the latest bad court ruling from Judge Hanen. As industry leaders, these businesses and organizations know that immigrants are the backbone of the U.S. economy and add value to every community we’re a part of. Permanent protections for DACA recipients and ALL undocumented people isn’t just the right thing to do — it’s also just basic economics. This letter comes on the heels of a similar one from members of Congress last week. The pressure is mounting for immediate action, and with your support, our demands will become undeniable. Immigrant youth have the potential to create the change we want to see. We led the campaigns to win DACA in the first place, and now we’re leading the charge to protect it and ALL undocumented people. Will you chip in $10 today to support our work? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for having our backs, Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: Prudent Politics
subject: Harmful Shampoo
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

If you're spending a small
fortune trying to reverse your hair nightmare…

By purchasing special shampoos,
creams and oils…

You're probably doing more harm
than good.

Why?

Because treating your hair from
the outside is letting the real cause of your thinning, shedding
and breakages continue indefinitely.

The real cause is a small group
of cells in your hair follicle that "pinch" off the oxygen and
nutrient supply to your strands of hair.

The more time goes on, the more
"pinched" these cells get... and the worse your hair nightmare
becomes.

But don't worry - whether you're
35 or 65, there's still time to "unpinch" the flow of critical
nutrients to your hair. Here's how…

Use THIS cosmetologist-approved
secret to restore a beautiful and more youthful head of hair.

PrudentPolitics.com

State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

If you're spending a small fortune trying to reverse your hair nightmare… By purchasing special shampoos, creams and oils… You're probably doing more harm than good. Why? Because treating your hair from the outside is letting the real cause of your thinning, shedding and breakages continue indefinitely. The real cause is a small group of cells in your hair follicle that "pinch" off the oxygen and nutrient supply to your strands of hair. clean_body: The GOP continues their lack of leadership as we face another shutdown | | Once again, a completely avoidable shutdown is on the horizon, friend. With just eight days left to come to an agreement, the House GOP is threatening to put millions of Americans at risk because they refuse to put extreme politics aside and do what’s right. These cuts will result in the loss of over seven million jobs, strip millions of their access to Medicare, slash essential funds to public education, and deny food to our children. I am not surprised that we’re here once again, especially after the House GOP elected such an extremist to lead their party. This is why it’s so important that we flip the House in 2024 and put an end to this dysfunction. | = Friend,I take my oath to serve the American people seriously. That’s why I’m so disappointed by the dysfunctional and chaotic leadership of House Republicans. = = Thank you, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Unfortunately, Manchin spent the last few years working in tandem with Kyrsten Sinema to weaken President Biden’s agenda. Yes, he helped pass a few important things, but he also blocked an awful lot. That strategy didn’t make him popular with anyone – and it’s also killed Sinema’s popularity in Arizona.
In fact, Sinema’s popularity is so deep in the toilet that she can’t beat MAGA extremist Kari Lake. Sinema is simply not an option in this race, even if you agree with her politics. (And we don’t.) Simply put, if Sinema wanted to help defeat extremism, she should just drop out of the race and endorse Ruben Gallego.
Winning a three-way race is going to be tough – but it’s going to be all the more important now. The entire Senate majority is at stake.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: A skewed and slanted institution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
There is a clear path forward to restore balance to the bench and public confidence in our courts: we need to expand SCOTUS now.
#
Peter,
Time and again, the U.S. Supreme Court has shown itself to be a skewed and slanted institution. _One that does not instill trust or faith in our democracy._
Corrupt, far-right Supreme Court justices are out of touch with everyday Americans and deeply influenced by extremist politicians and billionaire donors. Their corrupt ethics knows no bounds.
**These extremists in the highest court of the land are decimating abortion rights, upholding white supremacy, blocking life-changing debt relief, and so much more.**
Peter, there is a clear path forward to restore balance to the bench and public confidence in our courts: **we need to expand SCOTUS now.**
[**Add your name to our petition to call on President Biden to add justices to the Court and start reversing the damage that has been done.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/expand-scotus-petition_1110/?source=em20231110-3149&t=1&akid=3149%2E420207%2EgGYNYM)
**[Sign the petition ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/expand-scotus-petition_1110/?source=em20231110-3149&t=2&akid=3149%2E420207%2EgGYNYM)**
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231110-3149-footer&t=3&refcode2=3149_420207_gGYNYM&akid=3149%2E420207%2EgGYNYM)**

name: Team Slotkin
subject: What Manchin’s retirement means for Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=798%2E135344%2E-VRKp0)

Friend --
Michigan’s open senate seat just got much, much more important. Here's why:
Right now, Democrats have a 51 to 49 majority in the senate. Joe Manchin is one of those 51. With him announcing that he is not running for re-election in West Virginia, the GOP is likely to flip his seat red. That means going into the 2024 election, there are 15 solid blue races, 12 seats likely red, 4 Democrats in competitive battleground races, 2 Democrats in tough,Trump-voting states defending their seats, and one competitive open seat: Michigan.
**For Democrats to keep the senate we must defend the tough seats and must win this open seat in Michigan.** If we do all that, we’ll have a senate that’s 50-50, with hopefully the Democratic VP serving as a tie-breaker.
We already know that National Republicans view Michigan as a key battleground state for flipping both the White House and the Senate — but Manchin’s announcement means Michigan will be an absolute battle royale for control.
Luckily, we have a serious candidate who can protect this seat and defend the Senate. Elissa is tested, smart and believes that character still matters in politics.
[**If you know the importance of keeping Michigan blue, please consider making a contribution to Elissa Slotkin today. Winning a statewide campaign is never easy, but we can do it as long as people like you are involved in this race.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231110-2&t=2&akid=798%2E135344%2E-VRKp0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Jerrad
subject: About Tuesday…
body:
You and I haven’t met yet but the events of this past Tuesday means that we absolutely should. We haven’t met yet, but Tuesday’s results show there is so much more we can achieve together. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1WMFS2c5W5uP4nvROU-aKvP-C0nl5xG2yTST6pY4H94XoCTGsuVWSLJmEtlKXjynCmYvGSaXR0vFOYH-aNur-NphwJSvcsMxdFsL2JTQ7LtLVXBnktuFmvytZGqVTQqy2STsmPXDqk_ENVVfJP0OF0YGjH7-Iz35GZ_SVkMVfVmpLKaV4mhbGMZu-JoyJqjF4dnn9IdBfhsUgcUGgXug3p3GntkwlNskwB9rdWQeeIQsBe1t7VMjD2la4N74RB_yUji4cuKygMP8zy2THZjyZ/416/KHMcLVIASAWyrDRU0wrpUQ/h0/mlprcdA9P_Wxbs62Adv1phLra7TeQ1q7JwNrOkoDLQ0)
---
Friend, You and I haven’t met yet, but my name is Jerrad Christian and I am the Democrat running to unseat Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH) in Ohio’s 12th Congressional district - the Columbus suburbs and Appalachian portion of central Ohio. You probably aren’t too familiar with Ohio’s 12th district but here’s why this race matters. **This past Tuesday, Ohio voters came out in full force and demolished the Ohio GOP nixing their plans to implement a totalitarian abortion ban passed by our republican state legislature.**
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1WMFS2c5W5uP4nvROU-aKxDS1_X1FaN2vH7CLuLBHJKmReyh26PY9-LaTno_UC68xr35AuR-Xe0o9blHKYcHpWGLT5GRliarXCZ3E-6rL3TPdlbMm-5EDpDSUkViWNP1Ye2Casx6n0l9xku2zhUjvwPwiTyVeGKu8jF35zE8Mx7FdobEIVGKcDCVaoo92CkMd-HiQFnjgtXYSpNo01Agr9dV1gav8DGMOfLkGKFYm4aT4yS36lQl6aUJBP6eMv6pSTk5tvotw5rhl1a2R1k7ccRkKmBXINWPCxa2vELgmPQ/416/KHMcLVIASAWyrDRU0wrpUQ/h1/eVBFrS8hJRt3aHkeSSDJvAJTAW5WUgjCA42mZ6pUl-8)
---
In a state that voted for Mike DeWine and J.D. Vance just a few months after the _Dobbs_ decision struck down federal abortion rights, this is a big deal—**and it shows just how much things are changing here in battleground Ohio.** Tuesday’s vote showed that if we keep up the same momentum, engage with rural voters along with our urban coalition, we could flip districts like mine that lack real leadership and representation. To take back the House in 2024 we will need to flip districts like mine and I know our campaign can do it— _here’s why_ : Like many people in OH-12, I grew up in extreme poverty in the Appalachian region of Ohio - the kind of poverty that left me and my family uncertain about whether we'd have enough to eat the next day. After graduating high school, I made the decision to join the US Navy where I served as a flight deck fueler on an aircraft carrier during the global war on terror. After successfully surviving the hazards of the flight deck, I transitioned to the role of meteorologist where I learned about the inner workings of the earth’s climate and developed a lifelong passion for protecting the environment.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1WMFS2c5W5uP4nvROU-aKxDS1_X1FaN2vH7CLuLBHJFwC2e6duiIeq29MoQhOykh-nvGqyIQMVmuKBHvaK9Vx1uRGd7G_4KCUzPtB7uSGxC0J1rLO926Wxy31Bh1we5KfhUDuHIr6HMidiYJ3M9Jc2HSObIGXlNkgiLkzotdMA0nS5jqh1NDugw3zGzRwJb9VnBxo4o8-N_XYxTDeS55WiNwvQ8QeR246j4hkzMLvNxHo6WClYEISh3gewGQ5Au7zRjxvbLhLXB-MfiVbCiT1_VqTj3jrNDbuCk5SrttoZw/416/KHMcLVIASAWyrDRU0wrpUQ/h2/HCsPFJxpS9tjcjSDbh5bJt-seT9O0O41jkLRQ5Cw8zg)
---
_(Left) A younger me in my Navy dress uniform. (Right) Me below deck in my re-fueler uniform. We wore purple uniforms to signify our role as re-fuelers._
---
Today, I am a father, a small business owner (my brother and I run a BBQ food truck) and I also work as a software engineer. My stint in the US Navy as a meteorologist gave me profound insight into climate and its workings, my experiences with poverty taught me the value of hard work and never taking money for granted, and **my roots in rural Ohio instilled in me the belief that when good people come together, there's no challenge we can't overcome**.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1WMFS2c5W5uP4nvROU-aKxDS1_X1FaN2vH7CLuLBHJHdyJhO-AFum7ENb5oNz8aDBQ18YRru5KjBXJ0NnO57UJRSfKkZMULEnzZORkYmF6hVXwyTuuB0dytCm4cJTquqBEOqCD2r8okLnYiSNz0uMWe0WwSv8Upk6z0_x2br3snlBWx7wwxrxA3LkdcvluI2ygFtURmyIXmTAdErWCIUh5f2vdxskPLWI2pJ5uqRfYe5TvnMzDPnhUWrJSFx_aiIXryweoZ5Cg8O4kznNpZUG1n9g5TL9egkfBlITNRLGqQ/416/KHMcLVIASAWyrDRU0wrpUQ/h3/O3vvdHiv_BCmHvhNVvyjmUJjMBeU-1d3cd1YiSxWsJE)
---
_The people who I am fighting for._
---
A Republican for most of my life, after Trump came to power and I saw what his rhetoric of hate and division was doing to our country. I changed my voter registration and voted Democrat for the first time in my life, and I will never go back to the party that has supported him even after the violent January 6th insurrection that he encouraged and fomented with his ridiculous lies about the 2020 election. My opponent, right-wing extremist Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH), is among those who spread Trump’s message of hate in the halls of Congress, and he was one of ultra MAGA Congressman Jim Jordan’s key backers during his run for House Speaker earlier this fall - he voted to elect him a whopping THREE TIMES. Here’s a few more of his lowlights:
* Before serving in Congress, Balderson ran a used car dealership that defrauded thousands of blue collar Ohioans

* He voted against the bipartisan infrastructure bill, then touted it as a victory in his district when it passed

* Failed to hold President Trump accountable for the Jan. 6 insurrection on our Capitol building

**As a father, Navy Vet, and entrepreneur, I know that Balderson is the worst kind of leader for rural Ohio and I am committed to bringing back real leadership to OH-12.** Thankfully, Balderson is more vulnerable than ever; and Tuesday's vote shows that regular Ohioans are ready to take our country back from right-wing extremism. When discussing my district, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC), states **“With this ever-changing district and an out of touch incumbent, voters are ready to flip OH-12.”** **[We can flip this seat and help Democrats take back the House, but only with strong support from donors across the country who are eager to help turn Ohio blue. Can you contribute $25 or more to help me and my team do the work to bring home a victory on Election Day next year?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x1WMFS2c5W5uP4nvROU-aKxDS1_X1FaN2vH7CLuLBHJJ9lz7fWEOek7AIbMHiijgIckcm8d2uR8VCitCMU2P7P-OA3GVN_cOCD7gTIQnIkc49ZsKWbJ28TxQFFsKbF5IB5UON_7XAxC_g4Ur_fa-IPgfKAarvIkQEwznNqI_BrPQ4o4-f3AuldQh7A4Hk9-YwwFeIpCO39gT8KPkA1b3euMj4kFcW069SNfbuCtzqo8Lr5V9k4NrHd5vbZfQv0zTU3TNSIZz2SGWCQlfpHqXp90d8u419HuzKgdoR5XKYGeQ/416/KHMcLVIASAWyrDRU0wrpUQ/h4/-LU7euPt5vKdRu3xmdhNc2auJz23ct0_uH7zjZRr6go)**

Vance just a few months after the Dobbs decision struck down federal abortion rights, this is a big deal—and it shows just how much things are changing here in battleground Ohio. Tuesday’s vote showed that if we keep up the same momentum, engage with rural voters along with our urban coalition, we could flip districts like mine that lack real leadership and representation. Today, I am a father, a small business owner (my brother and I run a BBQ food truck) and I also work as a software engineer. My stint in the US Navy as a meteorologist gave me profound insight into climate and its workings, my experiences with poverty taught me the value of hard work and never taking money for granted, and my roots in rural Ohio instilled in me the belief that when good people come together, there's no challenge we can't overcome. | The people who I am fighting for. A Republican for most of my life, after Trump came to power and I saw what his rhetoric of hate and division was doing to our country. I changed my voter registration and voted Democrat for the first time in my life, and I will never go back to the party that has supported him even after the violent January 6th insurrection that he encouraged and fomented with his ridiculous lies about the 2020 election. My opponent, right-wing extremist Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH), is among those who spread Trump’s message of hate in the halls of Congress, and he was one of ultra MAGA Congressman Jim Jordan’s key backers during his run for House Speaker earlier this fall - he voted to elect him a whopping THREE TIMES. Here’s a few more of his lowlights: Before serving in Congress, Balderson ran a used car dealership that defrauded thousands of blue collar Ohioans He voted against the bipartisan infrastructure bill, then touted it as a victory in his district when it passed Failed to hold President Trump accountable for the Jan. 6 insurrection on our Capitol building As a father, Navy Vet, and entrepreneur, I know that Balderson is the worst kind of leader for rural Ohio and I am committed to bringing back real leadership to OH-12. Thankfully, Balderson is more vulnerable than ever; and Tuesday's vote shows that regular Ohioans are ready to take our country back from right-wing extremism. When discussing my district, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC), states “With this ever-changing district and an out of touch incumbent, voters are ready to flip OH-12.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Donate Tuesday’s election results are incredible, but they reflect the months and years of hard work that we have been putting in to win over swing voters. Thank you for helping us keep up this momentum and to win all across Ohio. In Solidarity, Jerrad Christian Democrat for Ohio’s 12th Congressional District U.S. Navy - Retired | | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | To contribute via check, please address to: Citizens for J Christian** P.O. box 315 Galena, OH 43021 | | | Sent via . subject: Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of The AMMO Act to restrict bulk sales of ammunition.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73145842/437559886/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQxZTNmNi1mMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBHMucReNaS_iANzJDP4zB_JWwAyy0elEFzk9G1EIbI=)
Team,
Earlier this week, I teamed up with Senator Elizabeth Warren to introduce a gun violence prevention bill we call the AMMO Act.
The AMMO Act restricts bulk sales of ammunition across the country. It makes sure that retailers who are selling ammunition have the same federal licensing as those who are selling guns. And it makes sure that people who are buying ammunition go through a background check.
**Despite the gun violence epidemic our country faces, right now there are no federal restrictions on the sale of ammunition. The AMMO Act will change that.**
[**If you are with us, please add your name to become a citizen cosponsor of The AMMO Act. Senator Warren and I want to know we have your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73145858/437559901/1284523589?refcode2=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&refcode=em231110-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQxZTNmNi1mMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBHMucReNaS_iANzJDP4zB_JWwAyy0elEFzk9G1EIbI=&emci=c67dea26-147f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73145861/437559906/1284523589?refcode2=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&refcode=em231110-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQxZTNmNi1mMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBHMucReNaS_iANzJDP4zB_JWwAyy0elEFzk9G1EIbI=&emci=c67dea26-147f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
Gun violence is a uniquely American problem. Thousands of people across the country lose their lives to gun violence every year, yet conservatives in Congress continue to do absolutely nothing to prevent the loss of life.
Gun violence is now the leading cause of death for our children, and we need common sense laws and solutions for better gun safety to ensure our families are safe.
[**So if you agree, please add your name to become a citizen cosponsor of Senator Warren and I’s AMMO Act. An act as simple as adding your name will show widespread support for increasing gun safety on a national level.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73145865/437559912/1284523589?refcode2=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&refcode=em231110-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQxZTNmNi1mMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBHMucReNaS_iANzJDP4zB_JWwAyy0elEFzk9G1EIbI=&emci=c67dea26-147f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73145871/437559944/1284523589?refcode2=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&refcode=em231110-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGQxZTNmNi1mMjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBHMucReNaS_iANzJDP4zB_JWwAyy0elEFzk9G1EIbI=&emci=c67dea26-147f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=b8d1e3f6-f27f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=16877361)
In my home state of California, we have proved that gun violence prevention laws work. And if passed, the AMMO Act will reduce gun violence nationwide.
Thank you for standing with us in the fight for a better and safer America.
Robert Garcia

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ea6b6daba443bfa7691932c8bf64ae&_e=OAUN0qJGF56yi1XKCeAUU_WSGcbAhxFvqaRz0tNhSUSxyeu8Rxv4SQM-emeM9cAn9Yc0msiCBdfSXyRalQkEIHLCgngB_a1ZCXqTKLMfZi4y4BqjA_QNtbRCuiHCMXYTYjXb6YdW55ridW9uUxWqxdurJFp-pgRDIGlxSYLU5z7_XznFwq9geWuXebqZn1MacM-hbhepswuesg8kb2qzRZwqqABlBdzvLAY5v1S8p27SAF-_r9YahFeLxtgEQU7Z68dcC2RjYvgCnes6zpVHLBYr4vwBv9Ml9TPl1kODHe_gzxSHW4fPx1sMLPedfeKJVNgl2Dh7fvuPTt__LFfbnZ4jhqSczf-pKJHFw1nnOvA6oW6wG61vtERMVkDeLSl_4wTbg5yIjAWJAIJ2EGdgsPu6gpgbFRl-PZco2LIk_MLs5PETdBob2Rp1PAou6WRuoL6TaPNS5_lr-tA4YXP9GjzHAuooKSbog_sMC7VnHZGI2l6yhNzH0c5zxSSBsNOpGVkpqmGer3QEDbE2Iw1z7XJkR89QHB3MUCd0rEbF8AFhINOc4McELah9xh_DXdi43Rg2aU3dIYYL7q20Lf4WryBclaiBaEYiL8E6x9gxIg_a9QaxT2jdxLwzB2w3_a_Y8j7-y01v3gGgLoqt67uaxw%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Nikki has now been declared the WINNER of not one, not two, but THREE presidential debates | | | | | Friend, When Nikki announced her presidential campaign, she told the media - " Underestimate me... that'll be fun." And she was right. Nikki has now been declared the WINNER of not one, not two, but THREE presidential debates, and the media is speaking the truth! | "Nikki Haley should NEVER be underestimated! Will you show her your support today? " | | It's simple. Nikki has NEVER lost a race, and she 's NOT starting now. When she launched her campaign for governor, the odds were stacked against her. Nikki was the least known and least funded candidate. She was told she was too brown, too female, and too young. She was the outsider and the underdog, but that never stopped her. Just months before the primary, Nikki was polling in fourth place, but she never gave up. South Carolina took a chance on Nikki, she WON , and she proved that she deserved to be there. "Nikki knows what it takes to win. She knows what it takes to get our country back on track. Will you join her movement today?" | | America is always worth fighting for, and Nikki will do everything in her power to protect American values and fight for policies that lift up all Americans. Now, it 's up to us to make it happen. Can she count on your support? "A donation of just $20.24 will help Nikki fund her campaign, amplify her message across America, and send Biden and Harris PACKING! → Don’t wait, send $20.24 now!" I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Did you catch this message from IA Gov. Kim Reynolds?

Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds believes that Ron DeSantis is THE PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE who can win this election and deliver results for the American people. That's why she announced her full endorsement for our campaign!
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952f5ff47628ab9b80836d00ab190fe64d4d5f835971ad2e0407a7ae4bf0a4cf4db3518cc1ac67d93c89cda21be87c96e30e04d29eab37fc7b0b
