WATCH NOW

Not only does she explain why she's endorsing Ron DeSantis in this video message, but she also points out all the ways WE can make a difference on the ground. Have you watched yet?

BONUS: Coming straight from one of the most impactful governors in the country, Kim Reynolds left this message for you right after the excitement of the huge rally in Des Moines! You can feel our team's momentum from this one. Don't miss out!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952f5ff47628ab9b80836d00ab190fe64d4d5f835971ad2e0407a7ae4bf0a4cf4db3518cc1ac67d93c89cda21be87c96e30e04d29eab37fc7b0b
VIEW THE MESSAGE HERE

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952fff5e360075f663b613f84da377ed5a5846ed374e64cfd7d26a5a8c87472f1b4646a42d1071d7183dd754068edaf4482f43d0dad41c3c4ed7

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952fdff319ce2435369a257bb7ab265b4ab0b13db1bef5fa9a09eb34d8502dcd0b0eb616d4576ebb8b5da2b4674eafbba139e2634bc4661c13b2
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952ffd82419d4cf91cf49a1ebc6edb763dad9279b7a89194abc880ede80548aa40bbef9cfbdc2f5d57b4aa4136042047ce513448a3a94f22980e
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952f5ff47628ab9b80836d00ab190fe64d4d5f835971ad2e0407a7ae4bf0a4cf4db3518cc1ac67d93c89cda21be87c96e30e04d29eab37fc7b0b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=01b67a3a3351952f5ff47628ab9b80836d00ab190fe64d4d5f835971ad2e0407a7ae4bf0a4cf4db3518cc1ac67d93c89cda21be87c96e30e04d29eab37fc7b0b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

body:
I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates:
This is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control and ramming through any radical policy he wants

Hey... this is Mike Johnson. I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates:
1\. We have multiple Special Elections THIS MONTH - Democrats are favored in at least one of them 2\. Democrats are WINNING the fundraising race - they've banked $44 million this cycle alone
3\. We have a razor-thin House Majority - that's the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control and ramming through any radical policy he wants
_**[The LAST thing I want to do at a time like this is ask you for anything but I'm deeply concerned. We have one last chance to turn it all around and that's RIGHT NOW. I'm humbly asking you for a few bucks - or whatever you can spare - in the next 90 minutes.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f98ad628fb5449e488b3e6c900ea97c8&_e=FK-VQIpPMtkuD-T3RtDDBvruW24_giojzEVhVScfGtteX6uIo5iv5Q1mkrwL0R2u1UMcdfljQ0kMjpHnIT8IuhLOwFPSe9GkyWuPLwYq_yq-trYjBgANxCLwhCt056AG59k-J9NAA90lcK2zbYlfBaj2LJWgaz39XahrtnRl0f5EwNpfN9Q7NVv3ggK2psXSRnnG8s98DvQ8dvNuHoR-qiaD_Q3hFNtIOs2akWmvlgM5cwrHl0Eo93xpj6dMi6LgXiUhVEoXgiAuOr_DUo3XsMcJBytaHGDyY7gvLTSSmRAscXgiYTKo_MI7lYvKhW6nLwj-LewJP9SewVydrd2IO9HwMdBz4DuczkHBTMJZsTcLmP0mYe-3_mDpsYCGFcltH8IOGX6mwwzjyzFdhnDBfg%3D%3D "The LAST thing I want to do at a time like this is ask you for anything but I’m deeply concerned. We have one last chance to turn it all around and that’s RIGHT NOW. I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks – or whatever you can spare – in the next 90 minutes. ")**_

_If everyone reading this agrees to help, we 'll expand our House Majority and make history!_
---
| | | [PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f98ad628fb5449e488b3e6c900ea97c8&_e=FK-VQIpPMtkuD-T3RtDDBvruW24_giojzEVhVScfGtteX6uIo5iv5Q1mkrwL0R2u1UMcdfljQ0kMjpHnIT8IuhLOwFPSe9GkyWuPLwYq_yq-trYjBgANxCLwhCt056AG59k-J9NAA90lcK2zbYlfBaj2LJWgaz39XahrtnRl0f5EwNpfN9Q7NVv3ggK2psXSRnnG8s98DvQ8dvNuHoR-qiaD_Q3hFNtIOs2akWmvlgM5cwrHl0Eo93xpj6dMi6LgCoeepYxnCdfvTDb0geXHCRXS3pvwq2MZXblB9hoq4_pM5-pIaSXPuYScpvmMS26Bdt-E3cIWhSPG9yCnWefVj2D_eCSVbhDM5uWRHr1T8B8O4tkZkkPfc_bryYxKzoVXO6--f8wEXPJSCYSmu6PJyg%3D%3D "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS")
---
Please listen carefully:

Democrats control the Senate and they control the White House. If they manage to flip JUST a handful of House seats, they'll take complete control.

_**[That's why I'm left with no choice but to ask you for help.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f98ad628fb5449e488b3e6c900ea97c8&_e=FK-VQIpPMtkuD-T3RtDDBvruW24_giojzEVhVScfGtteX6uIo5iv5Q1mkrwL0R2u1UMcdfljQ0kMjpHnIT8IuhLOwFPSe9GkyWuPLwYq_yq-trYjBgANxCLwhCt056AG59k-J9NAA90lcK2zbYlfBaj2LJWgaz39XahrtnRl0f5EwNpfN9Q7NVv3ggK2psXSRnnG8s98DvQ8dvNuHoR-qiaD_Q3hFNtIOs2akWmvlgM5cwrHl0Eo93xpj6dMi6LgbfpvM2PcuFHo0AnvsfDTeBkPc_I0GqUnd7EbY2zfpq1JijUCM5N2lShLhHlPFJqZfn0ObSABiA_bvTbhGOdc_sXFVyGan7dzmK9ikqGawW90O6T6Pyt27SbNJuBR575m4RBDc6evdQYRkSAOauTnTQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for help.")**_

**You know what would happen if Democrats take control of the House: our strong border security bill will come to a SCREECHING HALT, our plan to secure our elections will be SCRAPPED, we will LOSE subpoena power, Liberals will TAKE OVER all House committees, and our impeachment inquiry will go UP IN FLAMES ... **

That is, unless Conservatives everywhere rise to the occasion and come together right now.

The first Special Election is imminent. Democrat fundraising is surging. And our House Majority hangs in the balance.

_Are you ready to meet this moment and step up? I hope so. _

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

clean_body: I’m rushing to you with three urgent updates: This is the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control and ramming through any radical policy he wants | | | | | | | "Mike Johnson" Hey... this is Mike Johnson. I'm rushing to you with three urgent updates: 1\. We have multiple Special Elections THIS MONTH - Democrats are favored in at least one of them 2\. Democrats are WINNING the fundraising race - they've banked $44 million this cycle alone 3\. We have a razor-thin House Majority - that's the only thing standing in the way of Joe Biden having full control and ramming through any radical policy he wants "The LAST thing I want to do at a time like this is ask you for anything but I’m deeply concerned. We have one last chance to turn it all around and that’s RIGHT NOW. I’m humbly asking you for a few bucks – or whatever you can spare – in the next 90 minutes. " If everyone reading this agrees to help, we 'll expand our House Majority and make history! | | | "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS" Please listen carefully: Democrats control the Senate and they control the White House. If they manage to flip JUST a handful of House seats, they'll take complete control. "That’s why I’m left with no choice but to ask you for help." You know what would happen if Democrats take control of the House: our strong border security bill will come to a SCREECHING HALT, our plan to secure our elections will be SCRAPPED, we will LOSE subpoena power, Liberals will TAKE OVER all House committees, and our impeachment inquiry will go UP IN FLAMES ... That is, unless Conservatives everywhere rise to the occasion and come together right now. The first Special Election is imminent. Democrat fundraising is surging. And our House Majority hangs in the balance. Are you ready to meet this moment and step up? I hope so. Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | | | "PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. name: Working Families Party
subject: Progressive champions in Congress under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
After Democratic Rep. Summer Lee bravely spoke out in support of the Palestinian men, women, and children of Gaza and joined others in calling for a ceasefire — the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) hit back with a six-figure ad buy to smea | | | One of our biggest champions in Congress is under attack, Peter. **After Democratic Rep. Summer Lee bravely spoke out in support of the Palestinian men, women, and children of Gaza and joined others in calling for a ceasefire** —**** the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) hit back with a six-figure ad buy full of baseless lies and horrific imagery to smear her.1 Summer was an AIPAC target in 2022, with over $5 _million_ sunk into racist attacks to defeat her. Now, she’s facing a serious primary challenge from a Republican-backed candidate, and AIPAC is prepared to spend millions more. **We were able to fight back against AIPAC’s attacks in 2022, and with your support, we can do it again.** [**Can you rush a donation of $10 or more right now to show Summer we have her back? Your contribution will be split evenly between Summer's campaign and WFP to help fuel the organizing we’ll need to protect progressive incumbents like her from Republican-backed primary challenges in 2024.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6R-DwAJtiPR1MJk0zDTfSdeWSl85GF4hK6d2_0rtv6Frz5j5ySMZPNbXYMLuWPUi6_7JtLBNz7DudUDvGbneW3aq8IUpITySOB8QWNDEI2eXucGENAk4qJ1aEaWCf_UMwFx7kcbAPNupl2KNkm4OsMi2gLMnUTT8tWUiuXbi55PwFBkvRSLkiU-rSBDpETjQy-kAd65awxvbTx5VwpxCKljulAhyVrd4uftre428wXEwLflvug3eOJR_uVsU1lwJuvm2-ymceo7kdAiZHl8FBs3jmlKjf2Cn7aKQn-iZgSDoVyOlKkbSpa9ZZT6Cyucydytd_if73TPP3lpxeABY3iZhMB4c_tESKJ4EeVa7rUMnSsw9W3D46v-HRY7_D6Y-/416/2TMb0ZroR7e69Q1C0ZETbw/h0/LEVnivIBcnv9ptzMkKq6CU5In678AeX-0Q9O_1TF_RQ) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6R-DwAJtiPR1MJk0zDTfSdeWSl85GF4hK6d2_0rtv6Frz5j5ySMZPNbXYMLuWPUikbftlSKJ2oLKBc-IsemX9_4rzTjmJNUnDLBpWjnCRFE0fYYxSC9rr16ktRT1YptLAjvQivzoI6w0sSpK9rnIJyRfZOnJxn1AcjuO1EmZZ8WZP2egIp3HUpYTLamh8Lf6-OKiy064ths1D_d4cTVESiPp88vMe33C87YSPwmQ9VycFi5Np2YmuhNhpKfiiLjmYL6F9ntWbJ8OiOCI-fbJjiNKAZaske7ZfUgbRwuyReX688WTlPRH-3GoPj5kPowg-eZUJ7_2BXg0RukKfXdMOcA6dcl_gbNWib-o1IuVmmNJ95j4orR9kb9lJy7KsuAu/416/2TMb0ZroR7e69Q1C0ZETbw/h1/reww29BJVtMI2t24Oy7aRe-wQyIQpmcovnZ_SG0Z3rA)** Over the past two federal election cycles, AIPAC has funneled Republican billionaire money into Democratic primaries and dragged the Democratic Caucus in Congress to the right on a host of issues — from climate change to workers rights to U.S. foreign policy in the Middle East. So as we head into another cycle of competitive Democratic primaries, it’s important that we stand with members of Congress like Summer who are under real threat from AIPAC and other right-wing forces for simply calling on Israel to adhere to its obligations under international law. Billionaire-backed lobbying groups shouldn’t be able to buy our elections and maintain bipartisan influence over our elected officials and U.S. domestic and foreign policy. But time after time, we’ve shown that when we put in the resources and the time, we can win critical races even when our candidates are outspent. **Just as we saw in Summer’s district last year, it’s going to take a mass movement of working-class people to hold off powerful special interests.[Split a contribution of $10 between Summer’s campaign and WFP today to show AIPAC and other Super PACs that their millions are no match for our movement.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU6R-DwAJtiPR1MJk0zDTfSdeWSl85GF4hK6d2_0rtv6Frz5j5ySMZPNbXYMLuWPUig_ax5EpF2WXIJzRQ1efoU8A1PRoR-KSATrjzQoNpZ9ghdOdYDpFO6XweX4OiLoroDc3V39rR1lNnQZHDO2zq_TrkXjJ4vVuvVk1rAFqa3D2vXZpP1EAE7vtJAH6m2GMR3CfT9FsCscjsdsj2po9Nlocewmn9qwtfYBnJBw4Jb_Dze3NO4ZCRww56zzTelvoowPsRfndnfDaZIzh9qlz28huMm1DlAVHahnB9498aRNke9j8v7nH14MFgHZVfMgMN_T8qIjrTPzKGBP9Pl3jGjRPJ4-nZM_XJcavkQKYJn2GuPuLeUlli97lQqrqbsD59/416/2TMb0ZroR7e69Q1C0ZETbw/h2/4utZSEFPk-pTJisYG63isxU7-zJzkgGzFYWf7GKbi2I)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. clean_body: After Democratic Rep. Summer Lee bravely spoke out in support of the Palestinian men, women, and children of Gaza and joined others in calling for a ceasefire — the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) hit back with a six-figure ad buy to smea | | | One of our biggest champions in Congress is under attack, Peter. After Democratic Rep. Summer Lee bravely spoke out in support of the Palestinian men, women, and children of Gaza and joined others in calling for a ceasefire —** the American Israel Public Affairs Committee (AIPAC) hit back with a six-figure ad buy full of baseless lies and horrific imagery to smear her.1 Summer was an AIPAC target in 2022, with over $5 million sunk into racist attacks to defeat her. Now, she’s facing a serious primary challenge from a Republican-backed candidate, and AIPAC is prepared to spend millions more. We were able to fight back against AIPAC’s attacks in 2022, and with your support, we can do it again. Over the past two federal election cycles, AIPAC has funneled Republican billionaire money into Democratic primaries and dragged the Democratic Caucus in Congress to the right on a host of issues — from climate change to workers rights to U.S. foreign policy in the Middle East. So as we head into another cycle of competitive Democratic primaries, it’s important that we stand with members of Congress like Summer who are under real threat from AIPAC and other right-wing forces for simply calling on Israel to adhere to its obligations under international law. Billionaire-backed lobbying groups shouldn’t be able to buy our elections and maintain bipartisan influence over our elected officials and U.S. domestic and foreign policy. But time after time, we’ve shown that when we put in the resources and the time, we can win critical races even when our candidates are outspent. Just as we saw in Summer’s district last year, it’s going to take a mass movement of working-class people to hold off powerful special interests. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , Jewish Insider, November 5, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:

BREAKING NEWS, Peter: A federal judge just HALTED Idaho’s draconian “abortion trafficking” ban. As a reminder, this was a law that outlawed assisting a minor to receive abortion care without their parent’s permissions — even making it illegal to cross the border into Washington or Oregon where the procedure was legal. The law completely trapped anyone under 18, leaving them with no recourse to exert control over their own body. The first arrest under the law was made just last week — so this halt couldn’t have come at a more critical time. The halt from the judge was temporary, and the future of the law is unclear as it likely faces more legal challenges in the future. name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Remove him from office!
body:
We need Washington to hear our voice on this.

Peter - Eight people, including two innocent Americans, were killed this week in Texas after a smuggler transporting illegal immigrants across the border crashed head on into another vehicle while trying to escape from authorities.

Our border has become a war zone under Joe Biden over the last three years ...
and no one has been held accountable.

We don't more hearings or investigations. We need action and we need it now. And it needs to start with Biden's failed Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.

I'm calling on House Republicans to IMPEACH MAYORKAS and remove him from his office.

We need Washington to hear our voice on this, which is why I'm asking you to add your name to our petition to impeach Mayorkas and hold him accountable. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_111023&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=995ad0b4a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
SIGN THE PETITION (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_111023&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=995ad0b4a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Mayorkas' record in keeping our homeland safe - his literal job - is disgraceful.

Nearly 8 million illegal immigrants have crossed our border under Mayorkas, a record high. 264 potential terrorists have been caught trying to enter our country. And those are just the ones we know about!!

We don't need another investigation or hearing to see that the border is not secure. Mayorkas has clearly failed to do his job to keep the American people safe and needs to be removed from office.

If you're as fired up about this as I am, I hope you sign our petition calling on House Republicans to vote to impeach Mayorkas as soon as possible. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/impeach-mayorkas-2023?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ImpeachMayorkas_111023&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=995ad0b4a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

I can't sit by and do nothing while our national security falls apart and the Biden Administration turns our southern border into a war zone.

I bet you can't either. Hope you're with me on this,

Max Ukropina
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/flipca47red_contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=impeachmayorkas_111023&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=995ad0b4a8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Jon Tester
subject: Did you see?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Peter —

I wanted to make sure you saw our new TV ad, but we need YOUR help to get it running across Montana.

Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153538/437568119/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)_ **** _ Indiana Democrats Win Across the State_ From Lake Michigan to the Ohio River, Indiana Democrats won big across the Hoosier State on Election Day. Democrats flipped mayoral elections in Evansville, Terre Haute, Lawrence, West Lafayette, Michigan City, Hobart, Plymouth, and North Vernon. Democrats flipped 6 of Indiana’s 40 largest communities. We also elected historic firsts across the state, led by incoming Black women mayors in Evansville, Michigan City, and Lawrence.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153542/437568120/-1824433802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)** [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153544/437568121/-1824433802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) In Terre Haute, Brandon Sakbun made history and is creating waves. These win — and many more — will usher in an exciting new era of pragmatic and progressive leadership. Our Democratic candidates will serve each city with the same enthusiasm they ran on and lead to bold change for Indiana. **** _Mayors Joe Hogsett, Tom Henry, and James Mueller Retain Big Democratic Wins_ _Up against well-funded Republican opponents, Mayors Joe Hogsett and Tom Henry won their reelection bids. Mayor Hogsett won in a decisive victory with 60% of the vote, a landslide margin. He will continue to lead Indianapolis with his passion for progress. In Fort Wayne, Mayor Henry dispatched his opponent to win his 5th term in office. Mayor Henry has a collaborative spirit and is looking forward to continuing Fort Wayne’s incredible momentum. In South Bend, Mayor James Mueller notched 73% of the vote and secured a 9-0 city council. _ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153547/437568122/-1911632373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153549/437568123/-1334109259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153552/437568124/1668170415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153555/437568125/1668170415?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535) ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153558/437568126/1942587913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**_[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153561/437568127/1942587913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)_ This week, Ohio voters protected abortion access and voted to legalize cannabis by voting in a referendum. Ohioans voted overwhelmingly in support of the right to choose and for cannabis legalization. Indiana voters deserve the same chance. It’s time the Republican supermajority listens to the people and lets Hoosiers decide what’s best for our state through democratic referendums. Let Hoosiers Decide. ******[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73153564/437568128/1121656140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2FkZDhhYS1mNzdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfbwR7OHF6BQgbP4J_oqSqdfXAU3546HgDOjI5QAxaM=&emci=c655652e-eb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5cadd8aa-f77f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=4925535)**[Share clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Indiana Democrats Win Across the State From Lake Michigan to the Ohio River, Indiana Democrats won big across the Hoosier State on Election Day. Democrats flipped mayoral elections in Evansville, Terre Haute, Lawrence, West Lafayette, Michigan City, Hobart, Plymouth, and North Vernon. Democrats flipped 6 of Indiana’s 40 largest communities. We also elected historic firsts across the state, led by incoming Black women mayors in Evansville, Michigan City, and Lawrence. In Terre Haute, Brandon Sakbun made history and is creating waves. These win — and many more — will usher in an exciting new era of pragmatic and progressive leadership. Our Democratic candidates will serve each city with the same enthusiasm they ran on and lead to bold change for Indiana. Mayors Joe Hogsett, Tom Henry, and James Mueller Retain Big Democratic Wins Up against well-funded Republican opponents, Mayors Joe Hogsett and Tom Henry won their reelection bids. Mayor Hogsett won in a decisive victory with 60% of the vote, a landslide margin. He will continue to lead Indianapolis with his passion for progress. In Fort Wayne, Mayor Henry dispatched his opponent to win his 5th term in office. Mayor Henry has a collaborative spirit and is looking forward to continuing Fort Wayne’s incredible momentum. In South Bend, Mayor James Mueller notched 73% of the vote and secured a 9-0 city council. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, Ohio voters protected abortion access and voted to legalize cannabis by voting in a referendum. Ohioans voted overwhelmingly in support of the right to choose and for cannabis legalization. Indiana voters deserve the same chance. It’s time the Republican supermajority listens to the people and lets Hoosiers decide what’s best for our state through democratic referendums. Let Hoosiers Decide. ** Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions ** Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, Nov. 13th: 1 p.m. ET: So You Want to Run For Office: Indigenous American Heritage Month. Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free So You Want to Run for Office celebrating Indigenous American Heritage Month. The nation has made recent strides with Rep. Mary Pelota and five other indigenous members of Congress, but there is still progress to be made. Join to learn more about campaign basics and making the decision to run. Sign Up for Rust Belt Rising's Fall Trainings provides free training and research on best connecting with voters in our region and winning seats. They have helped 101 campaigns win elected office. Join their network of more than a thousand Midwestern Democrats to benefit from virtual training sessions and individual messaging and strategy support. Apply to be a Fall 2023 Rust Belt Rising leader with their course , which features weekly Zoom sessions to hear from elected leaders and strategists who’ve run some of the best recent campaigns in the region for approaches you can bring to your organizing. INDems IN the News WEVV: Tribune-Star: IndyStar: South Bend Tribune: Hometown News Now: WOWO: IndyStar: The Hill: Indiana Democratic Party Unveils New Website The Indiana Democratic Party is excited to announce its newly redesigned ! The site features events, ways to get involved, and all the latest news from the party. To stay up to date with all of the groundbreaking work of the Indiana Democratic Party, be sure to check out our new website at . Stay connected with us as we work to build a better future for all Hoosiers! Victory with Victoria | November 13 Fundraiser Dr. Victoria Garcia Wilburn, a relentless advocate for mental health and community safety, is seeking re-election for District 32. Show your support and join Victoria on Nov 13. Democratic Party Holiday Party December 15** Join the Indiana Democrats as we celebrate the holidays and a year filled with success for Democratic Hoosiers. The Holiday Party will take place at the Skyline Club in downtown Indianapolis on December 15th. = ### [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

A year later, we’re keeping up the good fight! Just last week, our friends on the ground won a campaign in Ohio to protect abortion rights for its residents. We were only able to achieve this victory because of the support from people like you. We want to continue to support ballot measures across the country, but we need your help. clean_body: It’s already been a year | | Team, It’s been a year since we’ve had some historic wins including raising the minimum wage in Nebraska, increasing access to Medicaid in South Dakota, the first-ever ballot measures restoring abortion protections in a post -Roe world, and more. A year later, we’re keeping up the good fight! Just last week, our friends on the ground won a campaign in Ohio to protect abortion rights for its residents. We were only able to achieve this victory because of the support from people like you. We want to continue to support ballot measures across the country, but we need your help. = = = The fight isn’t ending in Ohio — direct democracy is becoming the BEST way to implement progressive policies. We’ve already started partnering with ballot measures across the country to enshrine abortion rights, mandate paid sick leave for all workers, and so much more. As we’ve seen throughout this year in Ohio, our opponents never want a fair fight. Their attacks, misinformation, and misleading language will only get worse the more we continue to fight, but we won’t back down. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won over 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Hi there, we have been busier than ever on the campaign trail!

My team and I have logged hundreds of miles criss-crossing the district, attending events to connect with voters, and knocking on as many doors with less than one year until Election Day.

Meeting with voters motivates me to keep up the momentum as our campaign to unseat Schweikert here in AZ-01 continues full steam ahead. [**I want to highlight several recent updates with you, but first, will you chip in $3 toward our grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156048/437570236/-381882994?refcode=em-11.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyODI1NTctZjk3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3OL8yQIr68jWEmYoy-JgOhVzvLv__6qjA8Ka_Fi955E=)

Grateful for your support,

Marlene

* * *
**I attended the LD4 kickoff event to re-elect State Rep. Laura Terech and State Sen. Christine Marsh!** It’s critical that we keep these leaders in our state legislature fighting for us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156050/437570238/-381882994?refcode=em-11.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyODI1NTctZjk3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3OL8yQIr68jWEmYoy-JgOhVzvLv__6qjA8Ka_Fi955E=)
**I was thrilled to connect with former Arizona Rep. and gun violence advocate Gabby Giffords.** She is a true hero in the fight against gun violence and I am inspired by her continued service to our country and Arizona through her advocacy.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156051/437570239/-381882994?refcode=em-11.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyODI1NTctZjk3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3OL8yQIr68jWEmYoy-JgOhVzvLv__6qjA8Ka_Fi955E=)
**I was also honored to meet with former President Bill Clinton at a recent campaign event and discuss our race in AZ-01.** Like me, he agrees that David Schweikert must go!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156052/437570240/-381882994?refcode=em-11.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyODI1NTctZjk3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3OL8yQIr68jWEmYoy-JgOhVzvLv__6qjA8Ka_Fi955E=)
Our campaign has received many recent endorsements that help us grow our team stronger by the day. **EMILYs List, Rep. Linda Sánchez, former U.S. Secretary of Labor Marty Walsh, Professional Firefighters of Arizona, Elect Democratic Women, and more have put their support behind our campaign.**

With every passing day, our campaign grows. I am thankful for the support we have received so far in our effort to defeat far-right Schweikert, flip this seat from red to blue, give AZ-01 the community-based representation it deserves, and win the House majority.

[**But none of this is possible without your continued support. Will you chip in $3 today to help us keep traveling across the district and connecting with undecided voters? Every dollar donated boosts our strong momentum.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156053/437570241/-381882994?refcode=em-11.10.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTEyODI1NTctZjk3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3OL8yQIr68jWEmYoy-JgOhVzvLv__6qjA8Ka_Fi955E=)

Thank you,

Marlene

clean_body: | = Hi there, we have been busier than ever on the campaign trail! My team and I have logged hundreds of miles criss-crossing the district, attending events to connect with voters, and knocking on as many doors with less than one year until Election Day. Meeting with voters motivates me to keep up the momentum as our campaign to unseat Schweikert here in AZ-01 continues full steam ahead. = Grateful for your support, Marlene | **= I attended the LD4 kickoff event to re-elect State Rep. Laura Terech and State Sen. Christine Marsh! It’s critical that we keep these leaders in our state legislature fighting for us. = I was thrilled to connect with former Arizona Rep. and gun violence advocate Gabby Giffords. She is a true hero in the fight against gun violence and I am inspired by her continued service to our country and Arizona through her advocacy. = I was also honored to meet with former President Bill Clinton at a recent campaign event and discuss our race in AZ-01. Like me, he agrees that David Schweikert must go! = Our campaign has received many recent endorsements that help us grow our team stronger by the day. EMILYs List, Rep. Linda Sánchez, former U.S. Secretary of Labor Marty Walsh, Professional Firefighters of Arizona, Elect Democratic Women, and more have put their support behind our campaign. With every passing day, our campaign grows. I am thankful for the support we have received so far in our effort to defeat far-right Schweikert, flip this seat from red to blue, give AZ-01 the community-based representation it deserves, and win the House majority. = Thank you, Marlene **=** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: BREAKING - SkyTree Book Fairs challenges Scholastic’s monopoly
body:
Here’s what we’re up against.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[Donate](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/p2edxkrFo3UcjoHU1vp5jw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0REaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MTBXA3NwY0IKZUUVe05lrEo28lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $35 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/TXF-OTtkAmDdcNttn3DVPg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0REaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MjBXA3NwY0IKZUUVe05lrEo28lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $50 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ircb3gSdJboaDc5XOgIUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0REaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9NTBXA3NwY0IKZUUVe05lrEo28lIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

[Donate $100 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GHQlfD5D9uOe8SJcBgPztg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0RFaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwVwNzcGNCCmVFFXtOZaxKNvJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate $250 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/F4wRRVgH0pNNh2aAoETRAg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0RFaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MjAwVwNzcGNCCmVFFXtOZaxKNvJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate $500 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/bsgArCJbSHfyVKG6j6_zrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0RFaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9NTAwVwNzcGNCCmVFFXtOZaxKNvJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qv6hLFRrDopL4eZ2lxhuqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/qv6hLFRrDopL4eZ2lxhuqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0RGaHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Let's bring back wholesome content to kids, like what we had growing up. Kids should remain innocent and have content to encourage their moral character while fostering their imagination.

It's not complicated! It's what you and I grew up with.

Thank you for helping us offer schools an alternative to Scholastic!

God bless,

Kirk Cameron

P.S. Scholastic's monopoly on school book fairs has ushered in woke and inappropriate books to kids across the nation.

I've partnered with SkyTree Book Fairs to give schools a positive alternative to scholastic.

[Help us raise $100,000 to fund book fairs this spring semester at schools. Click here to donate >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

A reminder of what we're up against:

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

It's time to fight back.

You and I cannot afford to do nothing and let the woke mob indoctrinate millions of children.

[Click here to donate and help SkyTree change the world.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0y-fdghC5n1tv1K1IUDYCg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnMTbWP0Q6aHR0cHM6Ly9za3l0cmVlLWJvb2stZmFpcnMucmV2di5jby9wYS8_dXRtX3RjPVJPTi0yMDIzMTExMFcDc3BjQgplRRV7TmWsSjbyUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023.

Restore Our Nation

There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. This can't wait.

Peter, Do you remember when young men and women were volunteering to serve in our military by the hundreds of thousands because people in this country **_knew_** that we had something special worth making that ultimate sacrifice for? **Think about it this way:** What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now? A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?** It's absurd and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Peter. I am stepping up and running for president to fight against it with everything I've got to fight, win, and lead our American comeback. If there's one point I'll **never **compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.** I need your help to fight back.**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b8e7507bce9d489ab8be349b5c882e8b&_e=jOo4YKryfqETCmzeDqZXIKEJqo7mgO9d_Q6Rj9VtXFSllPUtONZAjRrX9AEKazoNZHzdLmnhXa1Ox-fS6UTyPJQtvo9p-JyYNd6yYqanE06nmu7H2OdFrKQBHCSFdYMs1rzWFk67WuEoRrqra-KKd-TslFahzuxF4V4Ca4DgWfazRw7pZmO8aBTjERGF7Dmi4EM4L7h6jM8bArbs4uxPJb1ucrkhxIhtTxw5YT_4Mb50ulcaya2iomlyio_yWz9Ks4tNBLhfc_di_tXp8bW_qAzuJfDN04TQMmrv269Rqmg4tnxQR4RlvUN7YDNUaQLz0TE1akJgs2qkSpO8gI-NSAjtYPzNfZuiyYUnNSXJvzGLgyP0ep02yuVXTaTEb0aIQgTv9w5SiIPvsdo2-gEqXdOdfhsPIMS92ANlx8y1bhbFAvcP1qg5rjXMprLIUGoG)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

body:
There is no set of people to whom we owe a greater debt than our senior citizens

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73156883/437573091/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231110_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjhlNWI1Ny1mYjdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bij8wTWuxau89eAmF-LP8EpDYP07vYB5PngVOOr7TI8=) Peter, I’ll say it again: **There is no set of people to whom we owe a greater debt than our senior citizens.**

That’s why I’ve always remained steadfast in my support for Medicare and Social Security, and it’s why I introduced the _Right to Medicare Act_.

But Peter, newly elected Speaker Mike Johnson has made it _crystal clear_ that he’s after these very benefits that protect our seniors' livelihoods.

Medicare is how millions of seniors and retirees are able to live decent, dignified, and healthy lives — Peter, we can’t give Mike Johnson and Republicans another 2 years in charge to destroy it.

**That’s why it’s absolutely crucial that we have all hands on deck to take back the House next fall and restore Democratic leadership that’ll fight _for_ our seniors, not against them. clean_body: There is no set of people to whom we owe a greater debt than our senior citizens | = Peter, I’ll say it again: There is no set of people to whom we owe a greater debt than our senior citizens. That’s why I’ve always remained steadfast in my support for Medicare and Social Security, and it’s why I introduced the Right to Medicare Act. But Peter, newly elected Speaker Mike Johnson has made it crystal clear that he’s after these very benefits that protect our seniors' livelihoods. Medicare is how millions of seniors and retirees are able to live decent, dignified, and healthy lives — Peter, we can’t give Mike Johnson and Republicans another 2 years in charge to destroy it. That’s why it’s absolutely crucial that we have all hands on deck to take back the House next fall and restore Democratic leadership that’ll fight for our seniors, not against them. = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, — Ritchie Torres | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. I'm with my two youngest sons, Israel and Robert, visiting the bust of my great-great-grandfather, Civil War hero and U.S. representative Robert Smalls. (As you can tell from my stylish outfit and mustache, it was a while ago.) **The mustache might have been a regrettable choice, but here's what I'll never regret: Teaching my kids about our country's history. ALL of it – the good, the bad, and the ugly.** Robert Smalls was born enslaved, but his life story is one of perseverance, bravery, and achieving the impossible. Ron DeSantis and the pro-censorship crowd have it backward. Understanding American history is patriotic. Erasing our history is cowardice. That's why I was proud to serve as the first President and CEO of the International African American Museum in Charleston, and why I'm committed to telling my great-great-grandfather's story in every way I can. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73157396/437574965/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.10_B1_Mustache_Actives_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmOWExMDktZmM3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z7pS8Pirdihkn3YSmR14_rQJ4rZF56_i0v_pDjutp6c=) **When we win this race next year, we’ll send a strong message to every MAGA politician who wants to muzzle teachers, mislead students, and rewrite history that their time is _over_.** [_**But first, we have to raise the funds needed to reach every voter in this swing district! Please, if you're able, pitch in to support our campaign – let's stand up for truth and freedom at this critical time in our history.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73157397/437574966/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.10_B1_Mustache_Actives_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNmOWExMDktZmM3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Z7pS8Pirdihkn3YSmR14_rQJ4rZF56_i0v_pDjutp6c=) body:
In Washington DC, many votes have been taken relating to the ongoing Israel-Hamas war. However, our Congresswoman, Susan Wild, refuses to take a position on this issue and she continues to dodge votes. |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=471c574d3f504eee9cb7ddeecd560c72&_e=P8lrsTv40Gl7RHoohPuU9qm6uUtAFxXUEJ5IP5_0-ywIDiMYb2y06Dt0RdIlGARPMbkHDgdMCTUuVFerNt-UsiTPbQBO-Wvw1xD8qKvETX2zj4PDhG_5x3eXkgolbmeYFjrV71oo_lufxyw5R_IwwCF1Rj45FQW3BEHot6QwlV3S2tuk-b9TZQ5Ahvnd3ySWCLy5nobruEl12RWWeq2U1GDFVGVfl9wAwSXmvYtSKyxxI0SJ7O_tsA5aWAbuUFSs50J4GHY3hUQDY5f4Y8o0PK_gSSFMhyv4jOSZ85eeUhN6vSA8V1OYndl7iw67RcgiodGmZDC1XucmHNuHg529QUjNn_DQUbnEfyEkmFSFdXQFa3B9gp4Qxcl92T5WJYTlZ0cosClERwl31FweOfHtyS-exm_I5r8iTHhNfdwlNG8%3D)
Peter,

It’s so cliché.

A politician who says one thing but does another. [**What about the politician who says nothing and does nothing too?**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=471c574d3f504eee9cb7ddeecd560c72&_e=P8lrsTv40Gl7RHoohPuU9qm6uUtAFxXUEJ5IP5_0-ywIDiMYb2y06Dt0RdIlGARPMbkHDgdMCTUuVFerNt-UsiTPbQBO-Wvw1xD8qKvETX2zj4PDhG_5x3eXkgolbmeYFjrV71oo_lufxyw5R_IwwCF1Rj45FQW3BEHot6QwlV3S2tuk-b9TZQ5Ahvnd3ySWCLy5nobruEl12RWWeq2U1GDFVGVfl9wAwSXmvYtSKyxxI0SJ7O_tsA5aWAbuUFSs50J4GHY3hUQDY5f4Y8o0PH8INmJa8V7Ll6qfqPhKJFFYlEkbFC6FSEOBWq3NkuHHkm4sPoJinN55wIiDxp7yXpRzdbrYaWoqpMUuSJQuLLRk-oBxBxpTU2PNJd32Zdr1oNGO3G9tVxZvuJHo4LF0iujIV2gZ3y2QdYK7DwHRmsI%3D)

In Washington DC, many votes have been taken relating to the ongoing Israel-Hamas war. However, our Congresswoman, Susan Wild, refuses to take a position on this issue and she continues to dodge votes.

Last week, she was listed as “not voting” on the censure resolution against Squad member Rashida Tlaib. Yesterday, a different censure resolution against Tlaib was brought up and Wild failed to vote ‘Yes’ or ‘No’ again. This time she was listed as “present.” She was one of only four that did so. The censure resolution passed with 234 bipartisan votes.

subject: A straightforward ask

body:
This is how we’ll power our campaign.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)
Peter, we'll be straightforward.
We're building a team across PA to hold this seat, re-elect Bob Casey, and make sure we defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.
**[Can you help power our campaign with a grassroots contribution of $5 or any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
We're running against David McCormick, a mega-millionaire who can easily self-fund his campaign. Together with Mitch McConnell and dark money GOP donors, he's trying to buy PA's Senate seat.
**[To stop them, we need the help of grassroots supporters like you-- so can you help us compete by chipping in today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
The stakes are high, and Pennsylvania is key to the GOP's plan to take back both the Senate and the White House. _CNN_ has upgraded our ranking to the #4 most competitive Senate seat in the country. The only way we'll keep Bob fighting for Pennsylvania families in the Senate is with your help.
**[We need to fight back, and to do that we'll need you, Peter. Rush a contribution today so we have the resources we need to re-elect Bob.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-1?refcode=em20231110-1&refcode2=1104_552475_mAAD-5&akid=1104%2E552475%2EmAAD-5)**
Thank you for all you do for this team.
Together,
Bob Casey for Senate

name: Callie Barr
subject: Freedom doesn’t come for free
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73157839/437576512/-1758524140?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231111_na_VeteransDay_cand_kw_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNkNjEzMDktZmQ3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bJzK5sfxzt21GMCwT3QoRXWY_JhLDQpEOCw36K0bNkg=)
---
Peter, As Americans, we’re grateful for our freedom knowing that it has come to us at great cost. And, we know that securing that freedom is just as important today as it was yesterday and as it will be tomorrow. So on this Friday, we’re recognizing our veterans and servicemembers who have made our American freedom a continued reality. _The Mackinac Bridge, photo from [Drummond Island MI](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73157840/437576513/2135036584?fbid=670282911863236&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNkNjEzMDktZmQ3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bJzK5sfxzt21GMCwT3QoRXWY_JhLDQpEOCw36K0bNkg=&emci=490dc5ae-d67f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=bcd61309-fd7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9697413) on Facebook_ **First off: it's the United States Marine Corps' birthday.** 248 years of always faithful service to this nation deserves to be celebrated. To all the Devil Dogs in our lives – thank you. **Second: it's Veterans Day weekend** , which means an opportunity to recognize and honor all those who have served our nation. **While we thank our veterans and servicemembers for their hard work and sacrifices, we do more when we back up our thanks by taking care of them and their families **with a system that makes it easy to access the healthcare and benefits they’ve earned. When my husband Matt came back from Iraq with a traumatic brain injury, I made it my mission to fight for veterans like him. **That mission led me to activism, then to law school – and now it's fueling my campaign for Congress.** So today and every day, thank a veteran for their service. But also, let’s make sure our government — that we — have their backs the other 364 days of the year. Tuebor, Callie **P.S. If you or someone you love is a vet, be sure to take advantage of some great discounts this week. Here are a few I've seen:** Krispy Kreme: Free donut and coffee
Texas Roadhouse: Free voucher with military ID from 11AM-2PM
Denny's: Free Grand Slam from 5AM-12PM
McDonalds: Free breakfast combo before 10AM
Applebee's: Free meal from a select menu. ID required.

That mission led me to activism, then to law school – and now it's fueling my campaign for Congress. So today and every day, thank a veteran for their service. But also, let’s make sure our government — that we — have their backs the other 364 days of the year. Tuebor, Callie P.S. If you or someone you love is a vet, be sure to take advantage of some great discounts this week. Here are a few I've seen: Krispy Kreme: Free donut and coffee Texas Roadhouse: Free voucher with military ID from 11AM-2PM Denny's: Free Grand Slam from 5AM-12PM McDonalds: Free breakfast combo before 10AM Applebee's: Free meal from a select menu. ID required. | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense or the Marine Corps. Our team is working to create a budget for the 2024 election cycle, and making a plan to elect Dr. Brian Williams for TX-32. **And the most important part of keeping our budget on track is by increasing the number of monthly sustainers we have.**

name: Battleground Update (via the NDRC)
subject: What do Alabama, Louisiana, Georgia, South Carolina, and Florida all have in common?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Quick question, team: Do you know what Alabama, Louisiana, Georgia, South Carolina, and Florida all have in common?

In each of these states, judges have found that Republicans implemented maps that discriminated against Black voters in the 2022 election. **Now, we have the opportunity to secure fair maps before voters head to the polls in 2024.**

clean_body: | Quick question, team: Do you know what Alabama, Louisiana, Georgia, South Carolina, and Florida all have in common? In each of these states, judges have found that Republicans implemented maps that discriminated against Black voters in the 2022 election. Now, we have the opportunity to secure fair maps before voters head to the polls in 2024. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Ahead of the 2022 election, our grassroots efforts helped secure what the New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” Now, we have the opportunity to fight for an even fairer map before 2024’s highly consequential election. “Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered . . . are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.” – President Barack Obama = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

For GOP extremists to keep the government open. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158121/437577658/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231110_fr_GOPCR_team_nc_act_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg3YzBmZS1mZDdmLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3M6gDhhvDKBFU51KBAmRHv6MjHaED3sFChBxCGBNDHQ=)

**It’s been just 36 days since extreme Republicans in DC ousted the speaker of the House.** One thing that got missed in the debate around Kevin McCarthy? The most extreme factions of the GOP didn’t like that McCarthy passed a continuing resolution* (CR) with Democratic support to keep the government open. **And Mike Johnson’s approach to averting a shut down? Doing the exact same thing. And if they don’t make any progress, the government will shut down in another week.** We can’t afford the GOP’s extremism. clean_body: For GOP extremists to keep the government open. | = It’s been just 36 days since extreme Republicans in DC ousted the speaker of the House. One thing that got missed in the debate around Kevin McCarthy? The most extreme factions of the GOP didn’t like that McCarthy passed a continuing resolution (CR) with Democratic support to keep the government open. And Mike Johnson’s approach to averting a shut down? Doing the exact same thing. And if they don’t make any progress, the government will shut down in another week. We can’t afford the GOP’s extremism. We need representatives in Washington who’ll make our government work for us. We need Sarah — and more compassionate leaders who can actually pass legislation — in Washington.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In Dover, Sarah’s passed policies that: ✅ Guarantee family and medical leave and expand access to health care ✅ Protect children — our most vulnerable — from gun violence, lead paint, and more ✅ Combat public corruption And much, MUCH more. clean_body: Team -- We needed to make sure you saw this. We called on our grassroots supporters everywhere to step up in the wake of Joe Manchin announcing he won't seek re-election in 2024 -- but we're STILL falling short of our must-hit goal! Donations have been pouring in, but with just hours left until our midnight deadline, we need your help to hit our $50,000 fundraising goal. Thank you, Team DSCC \------ Forwarded message ------ From: Emergency Match Date: Nov 9, 2023 Subject: re: Joe Manchin | | | BREAKING NEWS: Senator Joe Manchin (D‐WV) just announced that he will NOT be running for re-election. | | We won't sugarcoat this. We're at a critical point in the fight to defend our Senate majority. Republicans think they have all the momentum, but there are a few things they don't know. They don't know how strong our incumbents are in key states like Montana and Ohio. They don't know how close our fantastic Democratic challengers are to beating toxic senators like Ted Cruz and Rick Scott. And most importantly, they don't know the power of this grassroots team. It's because of YOU that we've been able to win victory after victory in the Senate, and it's because of you that we'll do it again -- but only if everyone steps up to do their part. So please, we can't wait another second: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you, Team DSCC | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Carmen Goers
subject: Honor Their Service: Support Our Veterans This Veterans Day
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Honor Their Service: Support Our Veterans This Veterans Day********
**
---

Dear Peter,
As Veterans Day approaches, we are reminded of the profound sacrifices made by the brave men and women who have donned our nation's uniform. In Washington's 8th legislative district, we have a sacred duty to honor these heroes, not just in word but in deed.

Our campaign is steadfast in its commitment to our veterans, advocating for better healthcare, job opportunities, and the recognition they so rightfully deserve. However, our resolve must be matched with resources to make a tangible impact.
Would you join us by contributing $25, $50, or $100 to help me fight to ensure our veterans receive the honor and support they need?
---
| | | |
---
|
In DC I will work to:

* Enhance support systems for veterans’ mental health and well-being.
* Expand programs that facilitate their transition to civilian life.
* Ensure their valor is commemorated, and their stories of sacrifice are told.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/654e84bed9459b254fc81213/654e73ef0c03baa668d28f8e/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=8368d41d7e5f527a111064daadfbafb6c549a91a9c50854386fc01ffb7cbb96a)
---
| | | This Veterans Day, let's renew our commitment to those who served. With your help, we can provide not just gratitude but also meaningful support to our veterans.

Thank you for honoring our heroes.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---

I am thrilled to announce my run for Washington's 6th Congressional District

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158448/437578737/1713626325?refcode=BLU-HFFC-20231110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI3OWY1YjItZmY3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_ap6betjTGaaiU7iqv0Uukw3OiyipYVd9mHoR9H3LaU=)

| Peter,

As Commissioner of Public Lands, I brought folks together to tackle some of our state's biggest issues, like preventing and preparing for wildfires and taking on the climate crisis.

**Now, I am thrilled to announce my run for Washington's 6th Congressional District** , taking my vision for bold, progressive action to the other Washington to keep fighting for families across our state and country.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158449/437578738/-194426440?refcode=BLU-HFFC-20231110-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzI3OWY1YjItZmY3Zi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_ap6betjTGaaiU7iqv0Uukw3OiyipYVd9mHoR9H3LaU=)

name: Lauren Groh-Wargo
subject: Brian Kemp’s Revenge Commission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by One Georgia Leadership Committee
body:
Hi Derek,
As Stacey Abrams' former campaign manager, I've seen firsthand the lengths to which Governor Kemp and his partisan political cronies will go to challenge our efforts. Now, the _Atlanta Journal Constitution_ is reporting on the four-year saga of false allegations and political maneuvering aimed at hurting Stacey’s allies and our movement.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158579/437579073/-2011309591?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRmZmEyZC0wMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O6GJ8IjlaWfXyhQKJgMN2C47iohD9EHEylwFJqKdYqI=&emci=e916a669-fb7f-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=494ffa2d-0080-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3066577)**
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158580/437579074/2129541143?refcode=fr111023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRmZmEyZC0wMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O6GJ8IjlaWfXyhQKJgMN2C47iohD9EHEylwFJqKdYqI=)
The Republican-controlled State Ethics Commission has spent years dragging Stacey and our movement through the mud. Unbelievably, the Commission is run by one of Gov. Kemp’s donors, David Emadi, who is about to be rewarded for his partisan loyalty with a fancy judgeship by Kemp himself.
This isn't just about campaign finances; it's a calculated attempt to undermine the democratic process in Georgia. **They aim to silence us, but with your help, we will stand firm**.
[**Your support for One Georgia is crucial**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158581/437579075/1077474624?refcode=fr111023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRmZmEyZC0wMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O6GJ8IjlaWfXyhQKJgMN2C47iohD9EHEylwFJqKdYqI=). It's a rebuke of these partisan tactics and a rallying cry for justice and fairness in our political landscape.
[**By donating today, you're making a powerful statement: We are undeterred, unafraid, and unwavering in our mission for a better Georgia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73158582/437579076/1077474624?refcode=fr111023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTQvMS85NDA4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTRmZmEyZC0wMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O6GJ8IjlaWfXyhQKJgMN2C47iohD9EHEylwFJqKdYqI=)
Let's show them that our collective voice cannot be stifled.

With determination,
Lauren Groh-Wargo

name: Wes Moore
subject: Veterans Day
body:
Friend,

Maryland has a long and proud military tradition, unmatched by any other state. Today, more than 375,000 Veterans call Maryland home, and they play a critical role in our state and economy.

As a former service member, I am proud to support our veterans. So far, we’ve worked to pass over $200 million worth of tax relief for veterans. I am working to pass free health care and dental care to our members of the Maryland National Guard.

But there is so much more we need to do to support our military community. We need to make sure that 'thank you for your service' is more than just a quote, or something that we always put at the end of a sentence. We can and must do more as a state for the men and women who have worn the cloth of our country and sacrificed so much to keep us safe and protect our freedoms.

Just like they have fought for us on the frontlines, I will continue to fight for them.

Elevate,
Wes Moore
