name: Brian Mast
subject: Could change everything
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2101324e1bfe4e0e8b679c143a15cc3c&_e=ZEB6alXvCWDulvkZr-dS0jyA01TEf0CGwQ8S9C2_47r6V6wsidjP-gJThdDD765fdfnPV9UmJbMV2pfOmrB_WY4dK7Wzjegnm-xn9p5_VoQeSdGPh-rpB6UYtjK_5CrevzKRYsc35J85hh9cw_znLCDubmTelC_RPymtvsjK56VLV2G9izlRCj43-7hRdx2dqJ8ddDSpHAtScVRzxw_lwt5O8eiFjzCw4dNhQs6NBM_jkVQRO8-9Fnnm28lU0WgnPMtmlPScx7jxyQ_TuObwsrtOIue0GoOf8r_G-KWKIUFL9IMES5odpGj0zYTf2P2J_basmSnjIUkctRSx1kTWVyQoD7IJ96Z_27XrYq_wjPqDZ5gLqxz9HLM1lPuyH6Tv)
Brian Mast volunteering with the Israeli Defense Force
---
Hi there...

I'm not quite sure how to phrase this, but I'm going to be honest with you, Patriot.

**These election results weren 't good news for Republicans.

I need to tell you about it, though, so you can choose for yourself whether to join the fight. You could change it all...**

My name is Brian Mast. If you aren't familiar with my background, I'm a combat veteran turned Congressman.

I lost both my legs and a finger in Afghanistan when a Taliban IED exploded beneath me. But, I survived. I returned home to my wife, Brianna, and our young son.

The terrifying truth is that there is a growing radical faction in Congress that apologizes for and even defends the same brand of monstrous terrorists that blew off my legs. I have been loud and clear in my opposition to their hate!

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 6 years, 4 indictments, 91 felony counts, and 327 tweets about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Because of you, I can spend my time focusing on my job — meeting with voters, traveling across California, communicating directly with the people on TV and social media, and so much more.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4437%2E5257348%2E3KvaU7)
Derek, I am able to do _this_ because of you._
My service leading the impeachment of Donald Trump.
My oversight on the January 6th Committee and the hearings we held to investigate the attack.
My work leading the House Intelligence Committee.
My ability to share the truth — even after two impeachments, four indictments, 91 felony counts, and 327 mean tweets from Donald Trump about yours truly in the last six years.
My decision to run for U.S. Senate to give Californians the bold, effective representation we deserve.
**None of that would be possible without you. I’m serious.**
Because you chip in when you can. Because you care. Because you read these messages and share them with your friends and family. Because you volunteer. _Because I can count on you._
Derek, here’s the truth. Because of you, I can spend my time focusing on my job — meeting with voters, traveling across California, communicating directly with the people on TV and social media, and so much more.
**Because I can count on this team, I can focus on protecting our democracy and taking that message directly to the American people.**
**[Because of you, I know we can win this race. And I’m hoping that I can count on your support of my Senate campaign as we approach our final mid-quarter fundraising deadline of the year in a few days. Can you chip in $3 today so I can focus on the work ahead?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231110_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4437%2E5257348%2E3KvaU7)**

**_Republicans will do absolutely anything to win Florida._**
And now, more and more people from the far-right are going to be tuning into our election. We have to rally our own base of support if we want any chance of fighting back. **[So I'm asking 20,000 grassroots Democrats from all across the country to endorse my campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Will you please sign on now to show the GOP that we're flipping Florida blue in 2024? Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: a lot of lies | | | Friend: Wednesday night, Trump took the stage right down the street from me to rally his MAGA base while his fellow extremists pushed their hateful agenda on prime-time TV during the GOP debate. There were a lot of lies told, but there's one thing that has been proved true: Republicans will do absolutely anything to win Florida. And now, more and more people from the far-right are going to be tuning into our election. We have to rally our own base of support if we want any chance of fighting back. | | This state has given me so much: A better life, opportunities to give back to my community, a way to serve my country, a beautiful family, and a chance to win my own American Dream. That's why I refuse to let far-right extremists push their hateful agenda on our state any longer. I'm going to defeat Rick Scott next fall and win a better future for Florida — but I need your help in this critical moment to do it. | | I'm so grateful for your support, friend. Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Attack ads against Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The attacks on Rep. Rashida Tlaib just keep getting worse. The Democratic
Majority for Israel PAC launched a six-figure buy of TV ads smearing her
across her district in the Detroit media market.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-2-rt.rtKQZ9&refcode=em20231110-31773&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Can you rush a split donation right now to fight back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-2-rt.rtKQZ9&refcode=em20231110-31773&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Tweet from Josh Kraushaar: BREAKING: Democratic Majority for Israel
goes up with 6-figure ad buy in Detroit against Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI)
over her hostility against Israel. Ad is titled "History and Humanity."

Rashida is being attacked by members of both parties with hateful
rhetoric, a formal censure in Congress, and TV ads to try and turn her
constituents against her — all because she believes in protecting the
human rights of ALL and issuing a ceasefire to prevent the killing of more
innocent people.

She is the ONLY Palestinian American in Congress. We cannot lose Rashida’s
critical voice and courage, especially in times like these. So, we're
setting an emergency goal to raise $5,000 for Rashida before midnight
tonight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-2-rt.rtKQZ9&refcode=em20231110-31773&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Justice Democrats stands with Rashida, and we will do everything in our
power to re-elect her next year. Will you split a donation of
$3 between us and Rashida’s campaign right now to help us
fight back against these attacks?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231110-2-rt.rtKQZ9&refcode=em20231110-31773&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Contribute $3

With your support, we will not stand by and let pro-Israel super PACs tear
down Rashida with these racist and Islamophobic attack ads. Together, we
can and must defend her seat with everything we’ve got.

In solidarity,

JusticeDemocrats.com

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231110-31773-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31773_1203867_ozUtbO&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31773%2E1203867%2EozUtbO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

## 3 Signs Of A False Prophet
---
There are so many voice trying to speak into our lives but not all voices are beneficial to listen to. I just released a 10 minute teaching on the 3 red flags that you can look for to help you identify a false prophet. Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/dd7PsE2qsaQ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1144.1.7c437e3b1cb731cd285f52b3157d39ed)

---
## Upcoming Events @Sheridan.Church
---
-**Saturday, November 11** @5pm (OKC): **Acts Pt. 26 - Abraham** -**Sunday, November 12** @10am (Tulsa): **Acts Pt. 26 - Abraham** -**Friday, November 17** @7pm (Tulsa): **Young Adults Service** -**Saturday, November 18** @11am (OKC): **Women's Luncheon** \- Whipped Bakery -**Wednesday, November 22** @6:30pm (Tulsa): **Chili Cook-Off**

## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1146.1.ba9fec5b2a2ddc06ec9508885259f480)
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_.
**I am convinced that the BEST commentary on the Bible is the Bible itself.**
Here you can learn what the 7 Signs are: [https://youtube.com/live/TuNK8YzJBRY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1147.1.18fc28d14c8757a1406b7e684f5599be)
| | [ Watch: 7 Signs Of The End Times ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1148.1.f8111bb0b3dcfd7ff7b1149b78cb3821)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1149.1.cc10d84eb5d382dd29eb306df79f4019)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1150.1.92e9bc89f3820b190fadadda63f8d852) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1151.1.a0be2491fe715cda3e61bc7f1a4d2204)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1152.1.4e1b15bc5bfbec7633bc1675fe22f498)
---
|
---
---
## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1153.1.5aa77ff0b16c63e7b4b5299fe5972314)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3423410.1154.1.19ac42e5943c33e79724dbdeb4bf78de)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I can’t do this alone
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

Saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. Fellow American -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=feced290bae94ec8805cd61da3a0e90b&_e=Z3H3a6S3qfXhQoHKcrfgd0v_m8W6ckGs2mJc0p2F59E5aIeHh2tu2l1GgZs-jMWSzZ5hpbjzGheJS6wpHlLuDl15MwQhzfzMUexITGcuVTnF3IBqPtwPK9-W3fI4YyKg8_kCLjLAIVouVrEpZLt7u8eRVGf4lrSEN3ed5PDhcXyA0vLeIRjSrjV2CFW5UUU7qE7fwlaTuNj1MIx_DW1bwSkSI2Wf9zV7y1L3DPPoGd1x1oPxIBohuA2TFPI0I134dgrEp72X597Wyur7Ah-o-yc83e_0NP1r5R8C1auebIc5530UcpKXSENSmoaJEG_kTNlvue7UO917RZpE40NS3MckoNybDTTksALSnpUHk_4n5dyUGwaMuXMdCJz06NDeBZpIZ1yX64PXMAax5mCHIWyYzQPjuOYJ-8KNF2gIolk%3D)

**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=feced290bae94ec8805cd61da3a0e90b&_e=Z3H3a6S3qfXhQoHKcrfgd0v_m8W6ckGs2mJc0p2F59E5aIeHh2tu2l1GgZs-jMWSzZ5hpbjzGheJS6wpHlLuDl15MwQhzfzMUexITGcuVTnF3IBqPtwPK9-W3fI4YyKg8_kCLjLAIVouVrEpZLt7u8eRVGf4lrSEN3ed5PDhcXyA0vLeIRjSrjV2CFW5UUU7qE7fwlaTuNj1MIx_DW1bwSkSI2Wf9zV7y1L3DPPoGd1x1oPxIBohuA2TFPI0I134dgrEp72X597Wyur7Ah-o-2CjVbiYHhyc24b8xPibr84VNBbcsvawfsGyM9e3o1V3Dbm1jy2JLaYROBTIMhCoMOGPXtc0L4bttMRR83FohEx9kdN3rhrjRYADbNLQAvcJ2-MpkN9Juy0DfNyHiHAhX-09geEdODeJnzyebDpv9Xw%3D)

Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left.

It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. body:
|
#
---
Hey team, We’re reaching out today because we’re less than a year out from Election Day. As we inch closer to the 2024 election, knowing that we can count on your support each month will help our team map out a winning strategy, grow our organizing and outreach programs, and invest in digital advertising to reach voters where they’re at. **That’s why we’re humbly asking:[Will you help make a powerful impact on our efforts to reelect Nikki by starting a monthly contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160550/437586452/398268834?recurring=yes&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFiMzJlZi0wNzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBFRldTCc2NILztezBZSsySLRz7GVUTZcnw2NNEFiZI=)** | [BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160551/437586454/-407522354?recurring=yes&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGFiMzJlZi0wNzgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oBFRldTCc2NILztezBZSsySLRz7GVUTZcnw2NNEFiZI=)
---
By starting a monthly contribution today, you’re making a strong commitment to support Nikki’s advocacy for working families in Washington.
Since coming to Congress earlier this year, Nikki has cut through the noise, worked across the aisle, and found commonsense solutions to lower costs for working families, improve our district’s infrastructure, and protect our farmers by bolstering crop insurance programs.
Now, she’s running for reelection to keep making progress for working families, farmers, and veterans — but Republicans have named her one of their top targets and are lining their pockets with millions of dollars to flip seats like hers and expand their House majority.

body:
| | |
**[SIGN ON: Support automatic voter registration nationwide!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mmU3eocngtB_NYdRG2wW0QudNA-ctSb0Nyx3vhmqZwEwQaxaVOnPo3FwaeyA-UrS9ikeL2oOc84Zc4xFd14P8gzr1_yUiyeeQLzn9GEVScZsjsQlBr-3kWvLBAkpHv6umdrDsGwCSI2a1E5R1wWRSj9f4UqbmfT1F_M4apISm_-T7oovXjFDZ8g1xpHrwxObyKvgmRmZmHTSVdM6ImO0gHbaMDj4CrrnrUfHgl9d137CpayQwIeGDhODgw-H1IkPkSqr63EgZQbJEYcVeEpAqROW7Y5ORcxNznMITn0ldxn3p-5LH98E2zuUssnl0UnDgmRE4JTnKQdg1al5S4KtsY1Mbwgb7Ny7Dpb0sYqCVRPbhyhmpda72Kf2eE4IG9Y819OI9yQsvog5PEZrGOFr5M4cKvK3_PkDY7VYAOTiFypnsc_-o2nawFq9alJOZI0XO7yGXWZqRMBFN2sCf14PMzQDgGGNu2ehOLvTOcVKNNuz-w3Ey2H2TxNwuVVnWZDbBo9jYkuArgZqpG3uo_7BdBzi7zoCQvmJbIrVIO1hRPfWgSS-iFN1mjrMdvL1QW_-ettBEB_xUb8bEEoTNRk_ZYg/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h0/GCc145cvJoOVc3MZQOWJPsdI3bp65YGZFhLvfFyAFcQ)**
* * *
The United States has one of the lowest voter participation rates of all developed nations due to barriers in the voting system that disenfranchise minorities and young people.

Voter registration can be difficult for college students and citizens who have recently moved.
In the last eight years, 24 states have opted for automatic voter registration, [boosting](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHuQYDmmJRcwSD6x4OfijSwCYrvZDtzKtm4V4oTaNpVQ4i0GCGe6NjX2NBHi-V8rbNw9_ALN4cUeVWJj_3cIc0-02IeRNBX1--zCxXgDxPGA_TsEZ4Eo1TmcFjRBj_xy7gZDp2z7MGAcWjzp1upVjSXFB0L6NfCvRH6h5Lyc0oLXr2fl32DF0KW-DkwVH3ZgUQ1K8bPr9vTCuZMsvVLix3YFAmRtnYsEvGvyqbMg1bBgqlMiIpWKaM8rAyy_pZChSXYqyLuVmn4q1Hkko9gjHtz2RX7EBlcGVxTpEJKnX9ixKjMHNEGVd0ke5eVkLSlfalRmE_3FTyMIzlkAudfien8/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h1/dm1mlsRGPbyHqSbDMqg8zOcXTlcEdTc8mZ6Go30rFqM) voter turnout among generally marginalized groups such as young people, voters of color, and low-income voters.
**Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress to pass automatic voter registration, defend democracy, and restore the Voting Rights Act.**
He’s running against a MAGA Republican that voted YES to overturn the 2020 election and NO on the Freedom to Vote Act.
**[It’s time for all of the states to implement automatic voter registration and remove the barriers to access the ballot box. If you agree, stand with our campaign and sign the petition.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mmU3eocngtB_NYdRG2wW0QudNA-ctSb0Nyx3vhmqZwEwQaxaVOnPo3FwaeyA-UrS9ikeL2oOc84Zc4xFd14P8gzr1_yUiyeeQLzn9GEVScZsjsQlBr-3kWvLBAkpHv6umdrDsGwCSI2a1E5R1wWRSj9f4UqbmfT1F_M4apISm_-T7oovXjFDZ8g1xpHrwxObyKvgmRmZmHTSVdM6ImO0gHbaMDj4CrrnrUfHgl9d137CpayQwIeGDhODgw-H1IkPkSqr63EgZQbJEYcVeEpAqROW7Y5ORcxNznMITn0ldxn3p-5LH98E2zuUssnl0UnDgmRE4JTnKQdg1al5S4KtsY1Mbwgb7Ny7Dpb0sYqCVRPb8Xor53Rr_TIsthQPLDs9HJRf1acgagl1l-LeFTOQNK-tkHLAItt3qYlRn-nU84wCefQdbiv2uafs30MuH-fCL37E070DZCr5V0uFolnuKsQ5R7GmxBv9LEDSBNE2C5QyAhXHs_WpH-mn9gY_H5sKwzGrHRAaXAB4BDwhH8mCVHelM9bOOLl131PsHfVkb-tvzzDHZB1NMgWCt1_S7IK85YqFEYqFj1IKawMRiVR0PrA/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h2/WCRthp5ASME87gjwN2G19Fh6ZYTtnoJ2BUO0AOh-YZQ)** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mmU3eocngtB_NYdRG2wW0QudNA-ctSb0Nyx3vhmqZwEwQaxaVOnPo3FwaeyA-UrS9ikeL2oOc84Zc4xFd14P8gzr1_yUiyeeQLzn9GEVScZsjsQlBr-3kWvLBAkpHv6umdrDsGwCSI2a1E5R1wWRSj9f4UqbmfT1F_M4apISm_-T7oovXjFDZ8g1xpHrwxObyKvgmRmZmHTSVdM6ImO0gHbaMDj4CrrnrUfHgl9d137CpayQwIeGDhODgw-H1IkPkSqr63EgZQbJEYcVeEpAqROW7Y5ORcxNznMITn0ldxn3p-5LH98E2zuUssnl0UnDgmRE4JTnKQdg1al5S4KtsY1Mbwgb7Ny7Dpb0sYqCVRPaiHAwz4Or9dkFpD0LxnzOZM0pRvG-JQf2aIoKtbNM2koQyfmXYvK4huhYs3Ix7b8kEOMZCKknI_D_G4PLNYrUTQO4BXPh7pn3D9h43D4FFmWt-ck9e6PHgjOCSuSxFq9gsD_WHg-v6IaZjbALzmIB3A84pnRidMHjCu77uLYK6S9ceCrZ4oQjFQlcbPrEan16xp8bSqBMbJr0dbbYPRjoytLX-H7h_vQw4q_6reg4DEA/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h3/0sZb5t51fQmfDwG_jNSSXV7iEQY6ThNQCvORLmELFCo) Approximately 30 percent of eligible voters aren’t registered to vote in part due to our outdated voter registration systems. When registration is a barrier for people, they are disincentivized and exhausted, and that just might be the point.
For issues like access to reproductive care, tax fairness, and climate change mitigation the ballot is the most powerful tool that voters have. That’s why access to voter registration is fundamental to ensure that everyone has a voice in the nation’s future.
Research has shown that automatic voter registration boosted voter turnout by [5.8 percentage](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKaLdv2FnGWV3cJMdU1eCpjtRjF8rX0533G9aNBuxpWK1XeX3plMPihunbu7PjraAw_awU4pzrBNRuLdl0euY0-CfGlm72mZYVRTHkmfDWCVM-zb0gFU8nM5YaPpqjbBlOU7ZJO6erfRrMjYR3mBOjREeUSG3dLbyHO77qBpxNuli0tafuQekG_knV9HolHgFuzgWZm10cm80DRt56SqxvUeATyOHUlnPpefwPq4-TXU0W5J4O7w5wos48YZHPomshWjP_8n-2x5iC3JdEvn-A2emhQNp2AzBtYyfgInyKG6k7W8h8sE9GPiZwQhN0MEImEXBAU4wt6r7FWo8tNinQIQ/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h4/AP-MxvmKyXSQgTT4khwSjdDslEPIxOfNx-mvajLe1Us) points.
**Automatic voter registration would put every eligible voter on the rolls, giving more Americans a voice.**
****[**Sign on to support automatic voter registration in every state!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mmU3eocngtB_NYdRG2wW0QudNA-ctSb0Nyx3vhmqZwEwQaxaVOnPo3FwaeyA-UrS9ikeL2oOc84Zc4xFd14P8gzr1_yUiyeeQLzn9GEVScZsjsQlBr-3kWvLBAkpHv6umdrDsGwCSI2a1E5R1wWRSj9f4UqbmfT1F_M4apISm_-T7oovXjFDZ8g1xpHrwxObyKvgmRmZmHTSVdM6ImO0gHbaMDj4CrrnrUfHgl9d137CpayQwIeGDhODgw-H1IkPkSqr63EgZQbJEYcVeEpAqROW7Y5ORcxNznMITn0ldxn3p-5LH98E2zuUssnl0UnDgmRE4JTnKQdg1al5S4KtsY1Mbwgb7Ny7Dpb0sYqCVRPYKjm0EijSyBU53-4WC8huaDUzXlVMM2_ZmXKB2Ls9zsaDlsphxHbBjL1lGlEwfS_s-RZaUBU47mUlXvJu4j4OEMh8Dtd2qdUfcelTtC_3HIZIPSKUnb6aUqapJIvFHDDZ2ACpAdNpYcwBPfFCqOXCVFH_lLFZyfYSNu8b6KXE2wexxPDguCGMhg6LyN5NCSa_mHfiX5UySjbAU3X_DA8j2Rdmzo7gXWFWg8NZthro_KA/416/I7gpv58OS5uCZ-dkqaCmdA/h5/BmyfIIqCIB7jfOhRZyiSif1NqDCHB8c6iIKkJWzhbvo)

clean_body: | | | The United States has one of the lowest voter participation rates of all developed nations due to barriers in the voting system that disenfranchise minorities and young people. Voter registration can be difficult for college students and citizens who have recently moved. In the last eight years, 24 states have opted for automatic voter registration, voter turnout among generally marginalized groups such as young people, voters of color, and low-income voters. Democrat Derek Marshall is running for Congress to pass automatic voter registration, defend democracy, and restore the Voting Rights Act. He’s running against a MAGA Republican that voted YES to overturn the 2020 election and NO on the Freedom to Vote Act. Approximately 30 percent of eligible voters aren’t registered to vote in part due to our outdated voter registration systems. When registration is a barrier for people, they are disincentivized and exhausted, and that just might be the point. For issues like access to reproductive care, tax fairness, and climate change mitigation the ballot is the most powerful tool that voters have. That’s why access to voter registration is fundamental to ensure that everyone has a voice in the nation’s future. Research has shown that automatic voter registration boosted voter turnout by points. Automatic voter registration would put every eligible voter on the rolls, giving more Americans a voice. ** Democracy succeeds when people participate. \- Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

#
_Hi Peter, this is Mazie. I wanted to pass along this message from my friend Sherrod Brown, who is up for re-election in Ohio next year. He needs our support, so please take a moment to read:_
* * *
This is monumental news, Peter: **Ohioans just resoundingly voted to enshrine abortion access in our state’s constitution!** Voters came out in droves to send a clear message: Ohioans believe women’s health care decisions should be between them and their doctors, not politicians. Moments like this make me especially proud to be an Ohioan – and to represent my state in the Senate. Now that we've protected abortion access in Ohio, I promise you that I'll continue to work every day to make sure women’s rights to make their own health care decisions are also protected _nationwide._ But here's the deal: I'm up for reelection, and **I'm running against three anti-abortion extremists – all of whom would support a national abortion ban.** The latest polls show us _neck and neck_ , and our Democratic Senate majority is up for grabs. name: Josh Harder
subject: The not ok-ness continues
body:
I’m in absolute disbelief.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160616/437586611/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2MDgyNTktMDg4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0IFUjb6dSSeRvJdkHv2E3WG9W7DAvGj2x-mRb7eFE8=) | Peter - Just when I thought the Clarence Thomas scandal couldn’t get more corrupt, I was proven wrong (shocker!). From undisclosed gifts like yachts, private resorts, to a mega donor buying his mother’s house, Clarence Thomas’ corrupt actions continue to leave me in absolute disbelief. Well the not ok-ness continues: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160617/437586612/-1213042357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2MDgyNTktMDg4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0IFUjb6dSSeRvJdkHv2E3WG9W7DAvGj2x-mRb7eFE8=&emci=eb786452-757e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9e608259-0880-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652)****Yep! You read that right. A quarter of a million dollar loan, completely forgiven for a Supreme Court justice. The same justice who voted to overturn Roe v. Wade. This has real consequences!** [_**Will you add your name to my petition to pass a new bill to make bribes like this illegal on the Supreme Court?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160618/437586613/-1213042357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2MDgyNTktMDg4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0IFUjb6dSSeRvJdkHv2E3WG9W7DAvGj2x-mRb7eFE8=&emci=eb786452-757e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9e608259-0880-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160619/437586614/-1213042357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2MDgyNTktMDg4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0IFUjb6dSSeRvJdkHv2E3WG9W7DAvGj2x-mRb7eFE8=&emci=eb786452-757e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9e608259-0880-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) The fact that the American public had no knowledge of this kind of corruption for decades is insane. All of this has happened - and continues to happen - because the Supreme Court has no code of ethics. That’s why I support a new bill: _the Supreme Court Ethics Act._ This will establish new rules of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas, similar to the rules that are applied to me and every other member of Congress. [_**So, Peter, if you support ethics and more transparency on the Supreme Court, will you please add your name to this petition as I work to pass the Supreme Court Ethics Act?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73160620/437586615/-1213042357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU2MDgyNTktMDg4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c0IFUjb6dSSeRvJdkHv2E3WG9W7DAvGj2x-mRb7eFE8=&emci=eb786452-757e-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=9e608259-0880-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) This isn’t just about one corrupt Supreme Court Justice. This is about making sure our Supreme Court isn’t influenced by dark money and wealthy special interests. It’s despicable and we cannot let it continue. Thanks for your support! Let’s get this passed. \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. clean_body: I’m in absolute disbelief. | = | Peter - Just when I thought the Clarence Thomas scandal couldn’t get more corrupt, I was proven wrong (shocker!). From undisclosed gifts like yachts, private resorts, to a mega donor buying his mother’s house, Clarence Thomas’ corrupt actions continue to leave me in absolute disbelief. Well the not ok-ness continues: ! You read that right. A quarter of a million dollar loan, completely forgiven for a Supreme Court justice. The same justice who voted to overturn Roe v. Wade. This has real consequences! The fact that the American public had no knowledge of this kind of corruption for decades is insane. All of this has happened - and continues to happen - because the Supreme Court has no code of ethics. That’s why I support a new bill: the Supreme Court Ethics Act. This will establish new rules of ethics for Supreme Court justices like Clarence Thomas, similar to the rules that are applied to me and every other member of Congress. This isn’t just about one corrupt Supreme Court Justice. This is about making sure our Supreme Court isn’t influenced by dark money and wealthy special interests. It’s despicable and we cannot let it continue. Thanks for your support! Let’s get this passed. \- Josh *

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: [add your name] Tell Congress: Don’t fund genocide with our tax dollars!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Congress must listen to the vast majority of Americans demanding a ceasefire. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvi2lwrEEls2LR71Js0CVKCaom8Mx-tRg5yVP_kpAycb6w0rukXeC2v57rC_rf7RcggTdXS4X0yNiOaIanw0bKY9O1GUD2LKzRhRqNM_nMFk7WeOKePuJ_q9t2X55JUwpmD5SSlYFhx5Uw4Kz1xDwdxdf2zbY_eG5BtQVMv1hcmU_8WdTgahXRQkaB8uUlg6GY9oHjNECvDCEE6ii2c3jlzxPWSrdtk85_DtIbPF5k2syCmyjbkzItUsjYXPHQLrxA/416/M1Cekeb7RyOpZkPUZP5A3w/h0/Mu4DRWm2woQdFGc-g2NsbfI3FsQ4rDuYJqeAp6Ma8gM)
---
Friend, Many U.S. Congresspeople have told us for years that they can’t find the money for healthcare, housing, childcare, education, or other basic things Americans need. But now most Members of Congress want to send billions of our tax dollars to fund the genocide of Palestinians. An overwhelming majority of Americans support a ceasefire, but people’s First Amendment rights are being wiped away for saying that children deserve to live. Congress (including 22 Democrats) voted to censure me this week for speaking out against war crimes. **We cannot let people suppress our voices. We must do everything possible to save lives.** [**Sign now to tell Democrats in Congress: Listen to the vast majority of American people demanding a ceasefire. No more war crimes in our names or with our tax dollars!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QBphbmb4PxiDfAWcjrRIiYCHoyf7dgEGtD2ZAVVhftDR91T8Ut07C_9KMantGZerpMPnHPuyONM_MTxTK0uoFuwdALUsC3EGESE2DucFxCajVay3XQ4jaVzh6pQw6ZroVqnK5L6uEzBnK0qonfgYuDmk08oabHWyBaP8_DHPdBdMtXr6frY6d73jFGH71Y8152GolHGCOhjO_IJf0tFgUIbY4V2RfIqZHYUrXHL5V4fsZryRUypSzXzdv1MFWqPqMqVoilGchyOqnkNxWR4YSCakPyYpAkEqrwLLwiyemiQ52yQ_2v6FB_zGAaYm7NSS1o8ZGJ7QRgs9W_N6t3oza3KAQheO9NDO5nZJeHaBOMHi27VYpBDUZwgWiaenHIAxIVq6CoyAJyCmyGFojTFilGRrOgB0iwdhkrDK_3xVG5uY/416/M1Cekeb7RyOpZkPUZP5A3w/h1/xNd8Cb5Oge2LWDXBZlxukrdoD_gRRyMNVhIVdy6VF0M) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QBphbmb4PxiDfAWcjrRIiYCHoyf7dgEGtD2ZAVVhftDR91T8Ut07C_9KMantGZerpMPnHPuyONM_MTxTK0uoFu1AbQ7sL5cLnkGg7R7G1vPgefdlReuo0-OIyA4piWXqlg7CQuovT8ePoLD11HWzED3fMlRUch2x303YthZpfGZAuTIFsPvVgMkmSeHBdsLwX9ZTT_R2nQJMp0ZMqiWxijPbCLXjbsyn97rqqwnfwcOj4tbJcxzw7jJ5Q02agEXhxhOrf744JXJj5oFCWdIockt1d_9KWTW8nVXPdZZO_Li-FMbW6rvgC3W1Q6b5JAeFDPoVFsILZpOC1LzkDtN7ugJXtHxCiJU2NBUvTn9ERbrbtbq4yr_Z-rKdMAez3UBg6a7ewvL89GQG-eGWBZOv3nHHIZmfJEKNPHrsy4VmRigk/416/M1Cekeb7RyOpZkPUZP5A3w/h2/6l0fe2qVVAKGEoty_BWS8TNnxLSC3JbGwGyVdHYQ0IY)
---
Most Americans are against oppression and human rights violations, and want the killing to stop. The answer to war crimes must not be more war crimes.
**Let’s continue to speak up to say:** Not on our watch. Not in our name! We won’t be intimidated, and we will not be silent.
In solidarity,
Rashida
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Thu, Sep 9, 2023
Subject: [add your name] Tell Congress: Don’t fund genocide with our tax dollars!
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
I’m the only Palestinian American serving in Congress.
Amidst the U.S.-backed genocide of Palestinians, many of my colleagues in Congress singled me out for censure this week.
This bigotry from elected officials—including 22 Democrats—endangers their own Palestinian, Arab, and Muslim constituents. Instead of calling to end the violence, they act like we’re disposable, like our lives don’t matter.
Instead of supporting a ceasefire in line with the majority of Americans, most Members of Congress are rushing to send more than $14 billion U.S. tax dollars to fund the Israeli government’s destruction of Gaza.
[**Please sign the petition to tell Democrats in Congress: Oppose unconditional funding to Israel’s military! Listen to the vast majority of American people demanding a ceasefire.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QBphbmb4PxiDfAWcjrRIiYCHoyf7dgEGtD2ZAVVhftDR91T8Ut07C_9KMantGZerpMPnHPuyONM_MTxTK0uoFu0VHk2B1OAMVQoo7rk1WEfs2MiGZkKqNvPJnKeCiVHyme534N6PjKeJ-Y0BbN9Xg0gK78Le_CDFFj5WdEhLGVaYILKbPUWFz-vo5Xf-SJfCK-QOk-PoJ9A7aaP7lVyHNIYZk_QGAwD0oUL3MaNVIZr4zt6rraOKSLIFIGB3ClS__v4Z_MDPIoa5Abd2MaGLfcGmofQMAd6kb2i6f_uXMbbVA0rH_vWXz66zdbeASf3GzFAFqXQzYhUBiqcqfh5LOqKg5E04AiN9-spTAFJwkIXZSVFE4KJoYvYyTKp9XaK7lt4bOyXXN8zvWU5DoOyUn0OabMVsNk3aBbDwhGXJnIiI/416/M1Cekeb7RyOpZkPUZP5A3w/h3/K12RkUqHlrlxQPX-gYXbvw2PLlwRAxk-DwyibHpSGXo)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QBphbmb4PxiDfAWcjrRIiYCHoyf7dgEGtD2ZAVVhftDR91T8Ut07C_9KMantGZerpMPnHPuyONM_MTxTK0uoFu7aZ3aXSE5sIm5gEVt9QZ1eV3YOT5f94ho8Z_dI-JLiXtJiFatjaJf8uwRjlUpSLgdyScYbP7K6pOQKXM6lNyTMLYLF9ttouEYF9a1TkPPYyfKyJw5QL_3C1gaDTbgvqF8Ca-UfAlOjRBwFj2dotrg_tk9uMUQYJyLihjeyJr-q-dk4ss-gTr8zjuQ3bgE2V94nflekmO5bu5PES5EveGcSxqSfDP5aTUwlwWk2NrrkV84gY_Ih2c9GDIazziEnML-xUASDqQewHxKw9L4HPdKlegKoKJckJsqzCdIPybFdP5KlPTyvXkc-3r9diTF1allrlFvu2GuMQZrSdqRHeFFU/416/M1Cekeb7RyOpZkPUZP5A3w/h4/y37BkR0prxIPouz3udx2UkCqutatSGIyMO4O6t-eH7w)
---
Already, Israel’s military has dropped the equivalent of two nuclear bombs on Gaza. And war-mongers in our federal government want more bloodshed.
Yesterday, more than 100 U.S. congressional staffers held a vigil and spoke out for a ceasefire, saying:****_“Our constituents are pleading for a ceasefire, and we are the staffers answering their calls every day. Most of our bosses on Capitol Hill are not listening to the people they represent.”_
**In my home state, 71% of Michigan Democrats want a ceasefire, and a majority oppose sending $14 billion of U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military.**
But most Congresspeople are acting against their constituents’ demands. Last week, a majority of Representatives voted to send Israel $14.3 billion in military aid, and many have advocated against a ceasefire. Instead of calling to end the violence, they’re punishing me for speaking up about it.
Some of my colleagues even want to ban and expel Palestinians from the U.S. Others have expressed horrifying and dehumanizing views, saying that there are no innocent Palestinians, or that they want to turn Gaza into a “parking lot” and “level the place.”
As an American, I am ashamed. How many more people have to die before our government says "Enough"?

clean_body: Congress must listen to the vast majority of Americans demanding a ceasefire. | | | Friend, Many U.S. Congresspeople have told us for years that they can’t find the money for healthcare, housing, childcare, education, or other basic things Americans need. But now most Members of Congress want to send billions of our tax dollars to fund the genocide of Palestinians. An overwhelming majority of Americans support a ceasefire, but people’s First Amendment rights are being wiped away for saying that children deserve to live. Congress (including 22 Democrats) voted to censure me this week for speaking out against war crimes. We cannot let people suppress our voices. We must do everything possible to save lives. | Most Americans are against oppression and human rights violations, and want the killing to stop. The answer to war crimes must not be more war crimes. Let’s continue to speak up to say: Not on our watch. Not in our name! We won’t be intimidated, and we will not be silent. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Thu, Sep 9, 2023 Subject: [add your name] Tell Congress: Don’t fund genocide with our tax dollars! To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m the only Palestinian American serving in Congress. Amidst the U.S.-backed genocide of Palestinians, many of my colleagues in Congress singled me out for censure this week. This bigotry from elected officials—including 22 Democrats—endangers their own Palestinian, Arab, and Muslim constituents. Instead of calling to end the violence, they act like we’re disposable, like our lives don’t matter. Instead of supporting a ceasefire in line with the majority of Americans, most Members of Congress are rushing to send more than $14 billion U.S. tax dollars to fund the Israeli government’s destruction of Gaza. Already, Israel’s military has dropped the equivalent of two nuclear bombs on Gaza. And war-mongers in our federal government want more bloodshed. Yesterday, more than 100 U.S. congressional staffers held a vigil and spoke out for a ceasefire, saying:“Our constituents are pleading for a ceasefire, and we are the staffers answering their calls every day. Most of our bosses on Capitol Hill are not listening to the people they represent.” In my home state, 71% of Michigan Democrats want a ceasefire, and a majority oppose sending $14 billion of U.S. taxpayer dollars to Israel’s military. But most Congresspeople are acting against their constituents’ demands. Last week, a majority of Representatives voted to send Israel $14.3 billion in military aid, and many have advocated against a ceasefire. Instead of calling to end the violence, they’re punishing me for speaking up about it. Some of my colleagues even want to ban and expel Palestinians from the U.S. Others have expressed horrifying and dehumanizing views, saying that there are no innocent Palestinians, or that they want to turn Gaza into a “parking lot” and “level the place.” As an American, I am ashamed. How many more people have to die before our government says "Enough"? I care about human beings—with no exceptions. Everyone deserves to live. Everyone deserves safety, equality, and dignity. We must continue to remember our common humanity. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Arctic Drilling Petition: Prioritize polar bears, people, and the planet above Big Oil profits
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112587?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Fossil fuel industry drilling and fracking is threatening the Arctic and all who call it home![_Take action now >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112588?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Polar bears are struggling to survive and are suffering some of the worst impacts of the human-driven climate crisis. Their Arctic home is melting _**TWICE as fast**_ as the rest of the world, and they’re quickly being pushed closer to _**EXTINCTION**_ every single day. Meanwhile, greedy fossil fuel corporations continue to exploit the Earth and threaten the existence of this beloved glacial animal — **_all for the sake of profit._** When Big Oil comes charging through the Arctic, it releases harmful _**global-warming emissions**_ into our atmosphere and brings in _**toxic chemicals and waste**_ that contaminate sensitive polar bear habitats. The massive machinery even poses the risk of _**running over and crushing**_ polar bear nursing dens or _**burying innocent mama bears and cubs alive**_ under snow! **Big Oil’s dirty pollutants and environmental destruction in the Arctic are harming polar bears, people, and the planet.[_We MUST demand federal action if we’re going to STOP the fossil fuel industry from DECIMATING the Arctic — so we’re urgently calling on 4,827 more activists to sign our Arctic Drilling Petition today before the 11:59 P.M. deadline. Will you speak up and add your name now while there’s still time?_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112589?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112590?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve in the Arctic is the single largest unit of public lands in the country, _**spanning nearly 23 million acres!**_ It serves as a critical habitat for migratory birds, brown bears, threatened polar bears, walruses, and more. __Preserving biodiversity and protecting this valuable wildlife are essential parts of balancing our whole planet’s ecosystems.__
**And near the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, local tribes, like the Gwich’in people, rely on a healthy Arctic ecosystem for their way of life.** Arctic drilling goes against protections listed under _National Environmental Policy Act_ (NEPA) — a law that requires federal agencies to assess the environmental effects of any proposed actions, including an evaluation of any related social and economic impacts on nearby residents, like the Indigenous communities in the Arctic.
_**Endangered Southern Beaufort polar bears. Public lands like Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve. Local Indigenous tribes like the Gwich’in people.**_ _**The entire Arctic is under attack by the fossil fuel industry.**_ And without stronger protections at the federal level, money-hungry Big Oil companies will continue recklessly drilling and fracking until there’s nothing left. We’ve still go a chance to stop this though, Friend. _**But it’s going to take a major grassroots coalition of environmentalists like you if we’re going to stand up to the powerful fossil fuel industry.**_ [_**Can we count on you to take action and help us urge President Biden to STRENGTHEN protections against Arctic drilling?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112591?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2112592?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Fossil fuel industry drilling and fracking is threatening the Arctic and all who call it home Polar bears are struggling to survive and are suffering some of the worst impacts of the human-driven climate crisis. Their Arctic home is melting TWICE as fast as the rest of the world, and they’re quickly being pushed closer to EXTINCTION every single day. Meanwhile, greedy fossil fuel corporations continue to exploit the Earth and threaten the existence of this beloved glacial animal — all for the sake of profit. When Big Oil comes charging through the Arctic, it releases harmful global-warming emissions into our atmosphere and brings in toxic chemicals and waste that contaminate sensitive polar bear habitats. The massive machinery even poses the risk of running over and crushing polar bear nursing dens or burying innocent mama bears and cubs alive under snow! Big Oil’s dirty pollutants and environmental destruction in the Arctic are harming polar bears, people, and the planet.== | == Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve in the Arctic is the single largest unit of public lands in the country, spanning nearly 23 million acres! It serves as a critical habitat for migratory birds, brown bears, threatened polar bears, walruses, and more. Preserving biodiversity and protecting this valuable wildlife are essential parts of balancing our whole planet’s ecosystems. And near the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, local tribes, like the Gwich’in people, rely on a healthy Arctic ecosystem for their way of life. Arctic drilling goes against protections listed under National Environmental Policy Act (NEPA) — a law that requires federal agencies to assess the environmental effects of any proposed actions, including an evaluation of any related social and economic impacts on nearby residents, like the Indigenous communities in the Arctic. Endangered Southern Beaufort polar bears. Public lands like Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve. Local Indigenous tribes like the Gwich’in people. The entire Arctic is under attack by the fossil fuel industry. And without stronger protections at the federal level, money-hungry Big Oil companies will continue recklessly drilling and fracking until there’s nothing left. We’ve still go a chance to stop this though, Friend. But it’s going to take a major grassroots coalition of environmentalists like you if we’re going to stand up to the powerful fossil fuel industry. == == Thank you for taking action, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Kaila Hood, LCV
subject: Tell the Biden Administration: Expand Berryessa National Monument
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxZ-yDJW/RE5VZi9EU0plSElQVm94NmZHQW1ORjR3NDVzRmZEcy9rckhWQktCWDRhUTZsZDZwb0JMRldsM1NZaWdoNGtyb08xSTlGaStkZ0cwYjltd2RBNnVxTjRVZGlhbEQ5azIzUmNrdXZGRHA4VXc9S0/TjI4UlljUlZkMzBHdVlKL0hVRXRkRDhJOHZ3dGZmY1RJZ1diaXJBRmhOdDlWUFBNcWd3Ym85cngydXZMeUgvNmdCa3IwUFJUSTFCK2NvRjFkRUt5ZENudS91OE1BNmJOS0 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6feR~EafV/RE5VZi9EU0plSElQVm94NmZHQW1ORjR3NDVzRmZEcy9rckhWQktCWDRhUTZsZDZwb0JMRldsM1NZaWdoNGtyb08xSTlGaStkZ0cwYjltd2RBNnVxTjRVZGlhbEQ5azIzUmNrdXZGRHA4VXc9S0/TjI4UlljUlZkMzBHdVlKL0hVRXRkRDhJOHZ3dGZmY1RJZ1diaXJBRmhOdDlWUFBNcWd3Ym85cngydXZMeUgvNmdCa3IwUFJUSTFCK2NvRjFkRUt5ZENudS91OE1BNmJOS0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10202184&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDE5NzY3OAS2&spReportId=MTg2MDE5NzY3OAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10202184&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDE5NzY3OAS2&spReportId=MTg2MDE5NzY3OAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT4ay-mFe/RE5VZi9EU0plSElQVm94NmZHQW1ORjR3NDVzRmZEcy9rckhWQktCWDRhUTZsZDZwb0JMRldsM1NZaWdoNGtyb08xSTlGaStkZ0cwYjltd2RBNnVxTjRVZGlhbEQ5azIzUmNrdXZGRHA4VXc9S0/

| **‘I refuse to put people over politics’: Speaker Johnson fundraises with apparent typo — The Hill** Mike Johnson’s recent typo tells you everything you need to know about what to expect from his leadership.

He has championed causes such as a national abortion ban with no exceptions, has said horrific things about the LGBTQ+ community, is a proponent of the Big Lie and has plans to undercut Medicare and Social Security—all showing us that his apparent typo was actually in line with his policies.

name: Katie Porter
subject: New, higher contribution limit disadvantage our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
No fear mongering, just facts
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)
Hi Derek,
I always cut through the BS, and recently, a special election was called for California’s U.S. Senate race after the passing of Senator Feinstein. Let me explain what this actually means and how it affects our campaign:
1. **California will technically have two elections on the SAME ballot.** One will determine who serves from November 2024-January 2025, and another will elect someone who will serve the normal six year term beginning in January 2025. The same candidates are running in both races.
2. This doesn't mean we have to reach the same voters twice. **But it does mean the contribution limits have doubled**. So people who could afford to give $6,600 (the federal limit) can now give $13,200.

**These new, higher, contribution limits disadvantage our grassroots powered campaign.** Politico checked the receipts, and my opponent, Adam Schiff, raises 10x the amount of high dollar money our campaign does.
That means I’m counting on this grassroots team to help us make up the difference and compete in what is going to become an even more expensive race. **[Can you join us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-2?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_2_NBS_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32919_3422442_kLqwW5&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation._
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231110-2?recurring=yes&refcode=EMAN23_2_NBS_20231110_V1_F&refcode2=32919_3422442_kLqwW5&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)
Onward,
KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_2_NBS_20231110_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32919_3422442_kLqwW5&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=32919%2E3422442%2EkLqwW5)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Now is the moment for freedom-loving American patriots everywhere to stand up and take back the country we love from a corrupt group of politicians who are marching us toward World War III. | | ---|--- **EXCLUSIVE EDITION, Order yours today I refuse to let liberty die with thunderous applause. The Establishment wins by making people think they are alone. We’re not alone. Good people will fight with good leadership. We’ve got a decision to make in 2024, but the time to take action is now. This movement needs you. This campaign is pioneering ideas beyond your traditional political conversations. It’s an opportunity for us to finally chart new territory and demand a government that acts and believes in the best interests of its citizens. It’s about renouncing dictatorships and autocracy in favor of patriotism and American unity. It’s about the TRUTH. Thank you. Vivek GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Peter -

**I have always known the importance of a good team.** _It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day._

It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America.

**I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on.** [**Today I am asking you to join my team. Let me explain why before you click out of this email.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz_9J06RcZ4iqtXrvhe9rfBsapcz_0T53ZgZOgha3cvb7nZ5bjgIvuyBIJCasslVT24K_FS1fJF7K0XNWK35ki76OzttBwFcIr2rxtZlWz-coui1ZIpIp1Q5MnbQaVyQNXL2BgTI5xzBpWuAkPkap1XG)
[** JOIN SPEAKER JOHNSON’S TEAM > **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz8iS1Eqr__phyIIu34i0atBOFtTOGEQ6DW6EzWiKJkmQiWYGvOVjaglg-EDgtuJpGfVwsITnfrsxP6ZRN84IslOx9Ku21HzfM8tCLh9XPc1nxnct22HQokmA8OdU96KwobMzDDx4Ym6FYhm3Un55vFs)
**Why I need your help:** _"Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_ As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon.

Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to _"re-engineer"_ – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on.

**The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country.**

Their actions speak louder than their words, [**and I need your help to fight back and protect our republic.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz9qSOGFiIhk5zfc-rOXSl0cM-fv6W3dBzrkuVjQsgpD8nE3G6huzaeNDxdvRWat1DxaCcu_b3YbHm23IzgXjoOdy7UCqwxkkM2WH4r3B8_axVJJ4E2G28DqUvcLVzYqs8s6kSshhTdTZB-hy-RNczx0)

As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington.

I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, [**which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz8Il7WtbEjYJzoENRra2zrGzvMdhzi5D5dpolZ1I1n02JgxOQSdSIi-No4IgSEwWQ81pef1nXMOumD24pAIHqsg7VU18Az4Q8xmI1ELuELXRsEfLfq86Trpp31nupjNtAFYbOyWuqXbNP6m4FfdkALk)

[** BE PART OF TEAM JOHNSON > **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz98A6cjysNzIYa25HdnLc9Gque38JoA5wxxHSFDKQ1Ewxxi7ZD8336GROliQc-o0G6CSpQ5D49xv8tCNF5dfqPk85GZi0wM5jOSSfLAHlOukX_pfeoynKcCbwgDm1st0IbKWMpH5mCLeqX7xpRWfCEn)
Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left.

It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. [**I can’t do this without you.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e682ecee02e64ef9b559f8b00cbc781e&_e=Mb6S4avNyS87TdJHsdyp-tYNebrzBFy2gnHnWyjraNHWAduVSLxjwLfLlWMFdtt8ZEBH_6rZ2idvThkUbYWfwUOrJDAUGdu8ZhpUU147BVr7eUNvxgCc6528dLYMpVwliYpxzBrovDatVf8P-l0DJXKzyQJL5jmHjU0kUMvHR3wiUlKV-Dl2Xxdg4mK3Hg1YSRIzeYWr2-CWNZm-dwNzyjz_UktRPRxqmkOF5Y1m5YoR_l0Imgjn2zPcd5srCCNSo_n5IS0r-Di6s5s2fPBl5eakLbyoOMWih4xxlgYfmz-AdG3zcPjJ6l8Es-mFoXZEDEtG_YJrHLgxT2J2i_KM2bZwcux2PBoM7JbP0u8gj-mB1f9ascKtLTefa4cAYbH-j_3MHmyxf1K7aHwP9v8mZOg5Iw8vzjMzh-4Z8joM2Upx5XB9v-q-sJ6F2_BhB-6-)

clean_body: Saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, which is why I am assembling a team of foot soldiers I can rely on. I need to know you’ll have my back when I need you most. | | Peter - I have always known the importance of a good team. It’s why I married such a phenomenal woman and surround myself with God-fearing, hard-working, driven individuals every single day. It is no secret that my team has grown exponentially in the last several weeks. As I sit in and out of meetings and interviews, I am astounded by the good people who are willing to serve our country. In fact, I am more hopeful than ever about the future of America. I am recruiting great American patriots who are determined to preserve the foundations this country was built on. Why I need your help: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." As Ronald Reagan reminded us, we must always be on guard. This is especially true TODAY – as the Left is determined to dismantle the very foundations our great nation was founded upon. Take a moment and consider what Democrats have pledged to "re-engineer" – their new favorite buzzword: voting rights, gun rights, freedom of speech, education...the list goes on. The Left says they don't hate America, but they are working day and night to divide and destroy our country. Their actions speak louder than their words, As Speaker of the House, I am the new boogeyman. Democrats are coming at me with everything they have, to try and take back the House, un-seat vulnerable Republicans, and take over FULL control of Washington. I know that saving our country from the radical Democratic agenda extends far beyond what I can do as one man, Freedom is fragile and needs our vigilant protection. We need to expand our majority in 2024 to defend our country against the anti-American policies being pushed by the Left. It’s time to come together, work as a team, and ensure the future of our country. - For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. name: Team Emerge
subject: Celebrating Our Indigenous Alums! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73163359/437596360/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1351-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTY4OTMxLTE1ODAtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CYIoie5I7RsmCK2og4f6CFM2Q_kpFHC7GrJFSFVYUlU=)
---
Peter – it’s Native American Heritage Month, and we’re celebrating Emerge’s visionary Indigenous alums changing the face of politics right now. We can’t wait to introduce you!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73163360/437596361/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1351-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTY4OTMxLTE1ODAtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CYIoie5I7RsmCK2og4f6CFM2Q_kpFHC7GrJFSFVYUlU=)
You may know that **Secretary Deb Haaland (Emerge New Mexico)** made history as the **FIRST Native American to serve as a cabinet secretary.** But that’s not Haaland’s only historic first. When she ran for New Mexico’s first congressional district in 2018 and WON, she became **one of the first Native American women ever elected to Congress.** Haaland has worked tirelessly for over a decade to build a truly inclusive democracy in the U.S.
**April Fournier (Emerge Maine**) made history as the **FIRST Native American woman to serve on the Portland City Council.** She brings her vast experience as a community organizer and advocate to this work, helping to ensure that the needs of all Portlands residents are heard. April is a member of the Diné (Navajo) Nation. **Ronalda Tome-Warito (Emerge New Mexico)** is going to be the **FIRST Indigenous woman to sit on the Albuquerque School Board.** She has served on multiple educational committees and boards at the state and national levels and has worked with parents and schools for more than 20 years. Tome-Warito has been influential in the growth of New Mexico and Colorado’s education systems and her voice is a much-needed addition to the Albuquerque School Board.
Peter, we are stronger, more resilient, and more just as a country when our elected officials reflect the full range of our identities, cultures, and experiences.

**By empowering more Indigenous women to run for office at every level, Emerge is making major strides toward building the democracy all our communities deserve. But we need your help to build on success and see MORE Indigenous women in politics. **
**[So please: Will you donate $5 or more to Emerge now to recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women to run and win in 2024 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73163361/437596362/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1351-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTY4OTMxLTE1ODAtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CYIoie5I7RsmCK2og4f6CFM2Q_kpFHC7GrJFSFVYUlU=)**
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73163362/437596363/-1986725773?amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=jtk1351-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNTY4OTMxLTE1ODAtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CYIoie5I7RsmCK2og4f6CFM2Q_kpFHC7GrJFSFVYUlU=)

Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Team Emerge

subject: Taking tomorrow off.

body:
#

Peter,
Ruben is a Marine Corps veteran. A lot of the folks reading this are veterans, too. With Veterans Day tomorrow, to honor the folks who served, we’re going to come down on our fundraising. No texts. No emails. You have our word.
It’s the right thing to do, but it puts us at a bit of a disadvantage. So we’re reaching out one last time today to see if you can make a donation.
With Kari Lake hot on our heels, with a leaked poll showing Ruben down by one point in a three-way matchup against Lake and Sinema, and with Manchin out and control of the Senate coming down to Arizona, we need you with us.
When Ruben signed up for the Marines, he swore an oath to defend the Constitution from all enemies, foreign and domestic. Today, a donation to Ruben’s campaign is a step to defend our Constitution from Kari Lake — a real threat to our democracy.
So please, if you can: [**Use this link to make your first donation to help Ruben beat Kari Lake in Arizona. Anything helps.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231110-2-f&t=1&akid=1427%2E734936%2ECWXnfv)

clean_body: Peter, Ruben is a Marine Corps veteran. A lot of the folks reading this are veterans, too. With Veterans Day tomorrow, to honor the folks who served, we’re going to come down on our fundraising. No texts. No emails. You have our word. It’s the right thing to do, but it puts us at a bit of a disadvantage. So we’re reaching out one last time today to see if you can make a donation. With Kari Lake hot on our heels, with a leaked poll showing Ruben down by one point in a three-way matchup against Lake and Sinema, and with Manchin out and control of the Senate coming down to Arizona, we need you with us. When Ruben signed up for the Marines, he swore an oath to defend the Constitution from all enemies, foreign and domestic. Today, a donation to Ruben’s campaign is a step to defend our Constitution from Kari Lake — a real threat to our democracy. So please, if you can: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** For our chances at victory next November, this means a lot. Thank you, Team Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73163597/437597269/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0OTliZGMtMTY4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3S2oyd08vQp9OeihdIXaW7U6zERPGHjQ1U7CzV1mQo=&emci=c4e4db2b-0980-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=be499bdc-1680-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3595835)

Peter,

As Commissioner of Public Lands, I brought folks together to tackle some of our state's biggest issues, like preventing and preparing for wildfires and taking on the climate crisis.

**Now, I am thrilled to announce my run for Washington's 6th Congressional District,** taking my vision for bold, progressive action to the other Washington to keep fighting for families in this state and across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73163598/437597270/1713626325?refcode=em23_231110_HFF_fnd_gq_act___HF_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231110_HFF_fnd_gq_act___HF_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=be499bdc-1680-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0OTliZGMtMTY4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3S2oyd08vQp9OeihdIXaW7U6zERPGHjQ1U7CzV1mQo=)

Over the last few months, I’ve talked to voters in every corner of Washington and have heard the same concerns – rising prices for necessities like housing and healthcare pushing families out of the middle class, protecting reproductive freedom and women’s rights, long overdue action on gun violence, and of course the existential threat of the climate crisis bearing down on us.

The challenges we face extend beyond the borders of Washington, and so must our solutions.
[**So, Peter, as I embark on this next chapter in serving the Evergreen State, will you stand with me as a Founding Donor to my congressional campaign by contributing $25 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73163599/437597271/1713626325?refcode=em23_231110_HFF_fnd_gq_act___HF_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231110_HFF_fnd_gq_act___HF_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=be499bdc-1680-ee11-8925-00224832e811&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmU0OTliZGMtMTY4MC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f3S2oyd08vQp9OeihdIXaW7U6zERPGHjQ1U7CzV1mQo=)
