name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: The day 13 Americans were vaporized in Kabul
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_t=_6sxNUxyQadhU_fnzwmguQEdnjWkzEULzKkQvgaABB7aEj7Fa2X_sQjUduo0vRZm97w6mCKMNPTPmAFO0iT-rN5dE1TcpBVtrKXVeQBGF2E%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_t=_6sxNUxyQadhU_fnzwmguQEdnjWkzEULzKkQvgaABB7aEj7Fa2X_sQjUduo0vRZm97w6mCKMNPTPmAFO0iT-rN5dE1TcpBVtrKXVeQBGF2E%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3BHo0EIYptaT23Bi3_TGr3cBa80QviASO4r9QUD1DoxaaFaKTJh7ny9gfPCoEpdVjp8kHIBguGC0zL3ho4rDqTsWuYI0GcejTCTS39hsqOwatQM7-9ZGbRUGNqV6j3SDNHnARwF55vpWj9VY0zjkQTA%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, **those are the traits that define me**. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to **[launch a campaign for the United States Senate this past June.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3IlhlhadUZZGgKdBWFMQN9iZuFxb9SAj82J7I6RU8ToSVM6q3a-6QaHyteHpCZ_D1nTXGztI3MsEQlZbkBX__dDzVTMLNHeZS1_WLWhgm7PbQSFRdgD4KOxdE6gIg9nAFZljs5_YSvRrBegwD2LeOg4%3D)**

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3GGndC77T4C0XtWjF4GjmmZr8c05FKCRUBYwBL0p5hRgo0cwHHDP8zJfDr75Yamphu4y28TprkmFWEvyLdI9iKKAyDWpm-uLhuvZnO_itxKrB9j4HdW--j_V4mfmZwanr3I_mqDP7Tgfr1ywZ0prbP4%3D)
This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, _**“I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’”**_

Every day it got worse.
Every day it was a disaster.
The adult in the room never materialized.

**Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport.** Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.”

I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. _**So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt**_ because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil.

It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. **But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3HizKOubCjxsue59mwxiNjwJm-gPP5UjJq6LqQZfbJpV8ectixwHlP64B9cnEs-STrw87WMBUw9-v5HMV4KeQUMdtJob3_3C3v0AJJ6ei239lSisXMfm-dr3r8L8I-sNHzLZRLn93HY_sbrbvjI0N0o%3D)
**Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.** I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. [**MAKE A GIFT TODAY
HELP ME WIN THIS RACE->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3LGh16qUqD-fuPKQvXSMZ41Sd0s53XYuDAauUxRdDDgcsYG7sCRA0-76Uy0SkdP1s9hj3Hn7pnYFqTx-jW_sxTY4X7X7L23xYgPW2EfvTkZKwbkU8aXPykusIRv-fLei3Ojjd1X4xxn8jYFByEGk8yQ%3D)

I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, **[I’m going to need the help of every conservative donor who reads this letter.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3L09lVo6yXAI4BTHnuRSoU3hoxhl7QIAJY8-Yrm9T8zBgftM0nCAz0y2zvrGlzj89bUrS6rSW-PIlNu1WfY6p0vMUhPfxs_7JF7KudI6P3Q8DMAKgCCHe9ZOSijHHTUqbWrzqv3cKC6xm87tBByUCzU%3D) **

Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes.

We fought in Iraq, _**I was there.**_ We fought in Afghanistan, _**I was there.**_

And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times.

I want to look at my children and tell them, _**“Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.”**_

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3FhxmGjieIWFwlL_1wWEG_z03qeQP4Q_BFb4oQKhJ3aUcBoJZn1eUiHjyfLBr5jQmTzBpkULlmVMTTKdHca4V_IrzXhG7IjrYsL6nEb5Ep1ues6q6fOHEmxbiI03Jiusu8P54jCQwz-3PNh5bb66zLc%3D)
**But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it.**

So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain.

[**HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT
ELECT A FIGHTER TO THE U.S. SENATE->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4322e5c59fd544dfb8979bb6bbb2b296&_e=I7zcK9dpHyH6TfeM_KDw0UyCpGmn0fEefbIF3mFzeaVOxzY8EhzoEBd7QP1k0RAUGE9Ui0KuN7-xh0uTPj6bm5iaKrJQu7TZck_zuVdkeQcs83uYFSjDxP4fxIxA2-P05eaLAwpEGvQ85QtGXGUCp2S2y9dJANDFt_hSHzQQn6mOkoN-BTYxH_dvuc7QZqKw8RUgCB6RUwyHfG0l-h3hLZjxn5a7H8JuEqF3kUkvufdvu6TWfT1P9MogAxi2QQfbYh3Bw1sWmoGNjeX_azwO3LQRNvFjVRLiHl1xTc6XNYTISLlAISVDsu4TB9x2Dgy28oxISofFpD0wNO_ZibfCrjDPzQBA4qB0LLy2m62ywdClDIZHyYoCYvWFLO_u3cytxqSWvzylnBVQgtgKZqe2817PQvK_4IVsw6STzCWmy2s%3D)

For America's Future,

clean_body: The day 13 Americans were vaporized at the entrance to the Kabul airport was the first time I’d ever considered serving in government again | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. Duty to country. Service and sacrifice over self, those are the traits that define me. I’m proud of the work we did for our country. That said, the events of August 2021 rocked me to my core and ultimately led me to In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. This continued for days. Throughout the entire process, “I kept thinking to myself, “The adult will come in the room and say, ‘Hey, this is a disaster; we’re going to stop this.’” Every day it got worse. Every day it was a disaster. The adult in the room never materialized. Then, 13 Americans were vaporized at the gate to Kabul’s airport. Billions of dollars in military and human assets were left behind – all so Joe Biden could get a press conference saying that he’d pulled the country out of an “endless war.” I sat in the homes of the families that we were frantically trying to get out; I promised them that we weren’t going to leave them behind. So, you can imagine the dishonor that I felt because of the promises we weren’t able to keep to the people who’d sacrificed so much to help us combat evil. It was in the aftermath of the fall of Afghanistan that I ever truly considered entering politics. Deciding to launch a campaign for the United States Senate wasn’t an easy decision. But the United States needs leaders who understand the sacrifice it’s taken to build our country. When your country calls and needs you, you have to answer. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. I’m reaching out to you today because if this campaign to flip Montana’s U.S. Senate seat is going to be successful, Twice in a row, Joe Biden has pulled us out of two wars for political purposes. We fought in Iraq, I was there. We fought in Afghanistan, I was there. And each time, for political purposes, Biden pulled out our forces and damaged our nation’s reputation in the process. And my opponent in the Senate race, Democrat Jon Tester, supported Biden both times. I want to look at my children and tell them, “Yes, you should serve your country, as your mom and dad did. Your parents put on the uniform; you should do the same.” But when we have a president who is willing to pull the plug on a whim for political purposes, it’s hard to tell future generations the sacrifices in service of God and country will be worth it. So, Fellow Conservative \- that’s what I’m fighting for. I’m fighting to restore faith in our American way of life. I entered the political arena to ensure the sacrifices my friends made weren’t made in vain. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. Three things you should know before you donate to our campaign: | | |
---
Peter -- There are just three things we need you to know before we ask you to donate to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign.
1\. **The Biden-Harris campaign is powered by lots of folks who donate small amounts at a time.** This movement is for, and made possible by, thousands of donors like you -- grassroots supporters who chip in what they can, when they can. 2\. **Our average contribution last month was just $33.** We rely on small-dollar support to ensure that our campaign has the resources to reach voters in every corner of the country so that we can fight back against MAGA extremism and keep pushing for progressive change. 3\. **Joe and Kamala are facing attacks from extreme MAGA Republicans threatening to take away our fundamental freedoms.** Our opponents are actively raising and spending millions of dollars on attack ads and the money you give helps us fight back.
Peter, we need this team to show up stronger than ever to prove to MAGA Republicans that this is just the beginning of our powerful grassroots movement. And we depend on thousands of people from Pennsylvania and beyond to keep this campaign running. clean_body: Three things you should know before you donate to our campaign: | | | Peter -- There are just three things we need you to know before we ask you to donate to Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign. 1\. The Biden-Harris campaign is powered by lots of folks who donate small amounts at a time. This movement is for, and made possible by, thousands of donors like you -- grassroots supporters who chip in what they can, when they can. 2\. Our average contribution last month was just $33. We rely on small-dollar support to ensure that our campaign has the resources to reach voters in every corner of the country so that we can fight back against MAGA extremism and keep pushing for progressive change. 3\. Joe and Kamala are facing attacks from extreme MAGA Republicans threatening to take away our fundamental freedoms. Our opponents are actively raising and spending millions of dollars on attack ads and the money you give helps us fight back. Peter, we need this team to show up stronger than ever to prove to MAGA Republicans that this is just the beginning of our powerful grassroots movement. And we depend on thousands of people from Pennsylvania and beyond to keep this campaign running. So, we have to ask: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your support helps keep our movement strong. You’re the backbone of this campaign -- thank you for joining us in the fight for progress. \-- JoeBiden.com

name: Gabe Evans
subject: Why I’m running.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Friend,

I know you get a lot of emails from Republicans like me, but I wanted to take a minute to share my story and tell you why I'm running for Congress.

My name is Gabe Evans. I flew Black Hawk helicopters in the U.S. Army for 11 years. When I got back from the Middle East, I served my community as a police officer, fought wildfires in the Army National Guard, and currently serve my constituents in the Colorado State House. Here's what I stand for: law and order, freedom, and service to the American people.

When I see what the Biden Administration is doing to our country, especially at our Southern border, it makes me furious.

My grandfather immigrated to this country from Mexico for a better life. He gave back to his new country, served in WWII, received two Purple Hearts for his service, and earned his citizenship in the process.

It was hard work, but he was able to provide a better life for my family.

_Now, when I see the chaos at the Southern border, I can 't help but think about my grandfather._

There are so many people who are trying to get into our country the right way, but the Biden Administration is letting cartels and human traffickers cut in line.

_That just doesn 't sit right with me - and I'm running for Congress to do something about it.

_**[Trust me, I don't like asking for money. But this campaign is fueled by grassroots patriots like you, and we won't win without your support. Will you pitch in now and help us WIN with our law and order campaign?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5f37f54dbfba4dbab954f7d653c621c4&_e=txuPW1uL2mNZ6fdeLbrNaxYlxVm_RRfuNuy5EkmnZY2zgNCx_Sxa31MZm2y9yhTcPlLC4TuY8qGyQ8B4ccDbZZf4H5uGln4VrUJRRGek_cer1qzyUx8XEVlyCf4l-9haJJwzeWSJM9aWOVeb44PaX9l5HH03POyRSmg0vt7r5Pyo9RzBcx0U11e80fsBvffdka9mITel3N2jN9kRqmijOte7rJhXJph3MK9DsFF0vrBXP4JnehWTvcjZtc5m22cPJzwMbrqKHFwVVxcRCwOVPGAFGCB2fi4cCuOog6cacaIuFDptjry8mx1Ss2SanmAll6B1wvk6khF5C5i8sq4HHQZpjGbqHp2dLaNkqgJUPqpfyqWZJeuNFiTuIlx3SfSX)**

I chose to join the Army and serve our country because **America is worth fighting for.

** This country gave my family everything, and it was my duty to pay her back.

Now, I'm ready to serve America in a new way.

We need fighters in Congress who understand the price of freedom. Too many politicians haven't spent a day serving anyone but themselves. _That 's not me, and it never will be.

_**[I'm running this campaign the same way I do everything in my life - with energy, humility, and tenacity. Now, I want you to step up for the leadership you want in Congress. clean_body: | | | Friend, I know you get a lot of emails from Republicans like me, but I wanted to take a minute to share my story and tell you why I'm running for Congress. My name is Gabe Evans. I flew Black Hawk helicopters in the U.S. Army for 11 years. When I got back from the Middle East, I served my community as a police officer, fought wildfires in the Army National Guard, and currently serve my constituents in the Colorado State House. Here's what I stand for: law and order, freedom, and service to the American people. When I see what the Biden Administration is doing to our country, especially at our Southern border, it makes me furious. My grandfather immigrated to this country from Mexico for a better life. He gave back to his new country, served in WWII, received two Purple Hearts for his service, and earned his citizenship in the process. It was hard work, but he was able to provide a better life for my family. Now, when I see the chaos at the Southern border, I can 't help but think about my grandfather. There are so many people who are trying to get into our country the right way, but the Biden Administration is letting cartels and human traffickers cut in line. That just doesn 't sit right with me - and I'm running for Congress to do something about it. I chose to join the Army and serve our country because America is worth fighting for. This country gave my family everything, and it was my duty to pay her back. Now, I'm ready to serve America in a new way. We need fighters in Congress who understand the price of freedom. Too many politicians haven't spent a day serving anyone but themselves. That 's not me, and it never will be. Thank you, Gabe Evans | | Paid for by ElectGabeEvans.com | | PO Box 350608 Westminster, CO 80035. Use of Gabe Evans' military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

subject: Waltz at Work
body:
| | | _**⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ An Update From ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯**_
---
_**An Update From**_
---
[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e5e5f48682a24a0e9a0ef0eef5270d6a&_e=cD86Qmrd0IA5_V7o2GYlZoKWhIEwxlTny2ZSJoRRAAEuAMYKA7MJAQJp8NuyOcTQUYq-ZShffFqNpNH3VK0RH4cWnrsWAE6il3qq3WIWfDx6AlYFS_FyzRs-463Uz0CC8RZ7ZNJL66C6SHulQzBJpN4HZNMfiueKn4bDe6I9m5D87JEgWVMYbWlCyN57vVGuLE7-C-Z1dibX1dE28Pt7cNvqrL23cbmqtSooFDtQWYkKdN_q-3FuEfcsK-onb3d7LXA1oQ0bnllCMGm6wP04kqeh-fW-iu-Ed54ioD_Q5U4%3D)
---
| | Peter - As we move into November and inch closer and closer to 2024, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and give the team some important updates on what I've been up to. It's been quite a month in Congress- Republicans came together to elect a leader to guide us as Speaker of the House. My friend Mike Johnson's election as Speaker is a testament to his unwavering commitment to conservative values. He doesn't just recite lines; he takes action, and I am confident he will make a great Speaker of the House. Following Hamas' terror attacks in Israel early this month, I've been outspoken in my opposition to Biden's 'Appeasement Strategy' with Iran. Hear me loud and clear Peter, this is an obvious Iranian-backed assault on Democracy in the Middle East, and we must cut off the head of the snake in order to neutralize this threat. **For more on my thoughts, read on below.**
---
** ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ _IN THE NEWS_ ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯**
---
**_IN THE NEWS_**
---

clean_body: | | | ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ An Update From ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ An Update From | | Peter - As we move into November and inch closer and closer to 2024, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and give the team some important updates on what I've been up to. It's been quite a month in Congress- Republicans came together to elect a leader to guide us as Speaker of the House. My friend Mike Johnson's election as Speaker is a testament to his unwavering commitment to conservative values. He doesn't just recite lines; he takes action, and I am confident he will make a great Speaker of the House. Following Hamas' terror attacks in Israel early this month, I've been outspoken in my opposition to Biden's 'Appeasement Strategy' with Iran. Hear me loud and clear Peter, this is an obvious Iranian-backed assault on Democracy in the Middle East, and we must cut off the head of the snake in order to neutralize this threat. For more on my thoughts, read on below. ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ IN THE NEWS ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ IN THE NEWS WALTZ ON IRAN'S INFLUENCE ON HAMAS "It's no coincidence that Biden just released $6B for Iran to use for “humanitarian aid” & now Israel is under attack. We WARNED this would free up money to help the Iranian Regime's terrorist puppets like Hamas. We've gone from the Abraham Accords to a Middle East on fire. An appeasement strategy has landed us here. We need MAX pressure on Iran!" Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON PRO-HAMAS PROPAGANDA "It's incredibly disgraceful how quickly the media, UN, European & American politicians, & members of the Biden Admin turned their backs on Israel & believed terrorist propaganda without verifying information. Rather than debunk it, they played directly into Hamas' playbook." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON BIDEN'S CRISIS AT THE SOUTHERN BORDER "Here's the fundamental flaw in Eric Adams' criticism of Republicans: If we move on to immigration reform while we still have an unsecure border, we're going to be right back where we started within months." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON BIDEN ADMINISTRATION'S RESPONSE "We must raise the cost for Iran’s militias attacking Israel. President Trump put maximum pressure on the head of the snake and dried up their money. Biden MUST reverse course to do the same or these attacks will NEVER stop." Watch the entire clip . WALTZ ON HOLDING IRAN ACCOUNTABLE "That’s the message our enemies are not getting is what will be the consequences? What will be the cost? And as long as they see this perceived weakness and opportunity, they’re going to continue to take it." Watch the entire clip . ⎯⎯ ⎯⎯ ⎯ ⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯ STORE ⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ ⎯ STORE Our Online Store is live! If you haven't checked it out yet, . You can find all the Waltz Warriors shirts, hats, stickers, koozies, and more! ⎯⎯ ⎯⎯ ⎯ ⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯ SOCIAL ⎯ ⎯ ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ ⎯ SOCIAL | | | | | | That's all for now- thanks again for being a crucial part of this team. It's a privilege to serve Americans like you. De Oppresso Liber,Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.) Raquel Terán is a “powerhouse community organizer.”
Don’t take our word for it, Peter. That is what a recent Arizona Republic article called Raquel.
Since she started as a community organizer nearly two decades ago, Raquel has helped move the needle forward for our communities, immigrants, women, and working families. Now, she’s taking our fight to Congress, but we’ll need your help to get her there. Chip in $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111023_powerhouse&amount=5]
With the progress we’ve made, we know there are still barriers to climb and walls to break down for our communities. That’s why we need Raquel representing us in Congress. She knows how to build broad movements to win on tough issues like climate change, living wages, abortion access, and immigration rights.
But before Raquel can lead our movement to Congress, we have an election to win here in Arizona. Can you chip in $30, $15, or even $5 to help us out? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111023_powerhouse&amount=30]
Muchas Gracias,
Team Terán
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_111023_powerhouse]

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: We need Angela Alsobrooks in the Senate, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friends, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Having served in the Senate for nearly 15 years, I can safely say that I’ve seen both the best and the worst of what the chamber has to offer.
At its best, the Senate can be a beacon of progress and a testament to our democratic ideals. I truly believe that Angela Alsobrooks embodies those traits and would be an invaluable asset and a champion for democracy.
That’s why I’m proud to endorse Angela as the next United States Senator from Maryland, and why I’m emailing y ou now, friend.
This is going to be a tough race, and Angela is relying on grassroots support from people like you. Can I count on you to chip in $25 to send Angela to the Senate? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4065-bu-d]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Angela Alsobrooks and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4065-bu-d]
As a state’s attorney and as Prince George’s County Executive, Angela dedicated her career to bettering the lives of Maryland families by increasing opportunity, prioritizing education, and improving public safety.
On top of that, she has an energy and an enthusiasm for public service and lifting up communities that we could use a lot more of in the Senate, Friends .
I know that Angela will represent Maryland with dignity, grace, and determination, and I’m ready to do what I can to help her win.
Will you join me in supporting Angela in her race for the U.S. Senate by donating $25 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_alsobrooks?amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&amount=5&refcode=jtk4065-bu-d]
With love and gratitude,
Kirsten
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=vPszGj9IA3Q5xZyyppQUaMWKP5v7LPAv621T9VXDC627PN1ntW2kS8yfYcZOxqgOiXxK7TGWfgBpUNigKlIEmLyogSz%2FIrVgu2XtzXwJ7i3J8SZivCMDhbOa2qiUUzRvHphMZkQSv3whti%2BWoXj2Uo%2BVbuZ%2Bw77P99te9kfSpizRr73gWKPWgHfP%2BM31tAMiJCZvdW3n9S2oYpybXKnEpampoYCREit%2BVN4RvllgZi2L%2Fg9yrNp%2BdFP1G9cGKhHHBEIuZRAqINbr4qmfgkCxY5M3QBQCUS9qPj1hFSKRmv4woY%2B%2BHAwAZ8bCf5De%2FtlzE%2Bi5tcpjbZAnMAlEEmkzJ47LJ%2BvKG0eyK0tnn%2FSr9dbawGCnQLWHBDCHZlQ4OuYB2iUxm3tXWyTlNXfDDSDKWE1R3GL3Fgvq5H2HNqLQ%2FjQ%3D .

| | Patriot,

---
It’s always laughable to see the disloyal RINOs who were on the debate stage this week talk about their signing of a “loyalty” pledge.
---
Let me be as clear as day: **_their pledges are MEANINGLESS!_**
---
_Because every minute our special interest “Republican” opponents waste attacking yours truly instead of the Crook currently occupying the White House, is another minute they are being_** _DISLOYAL to_** _**_YOU_**_ _– the more than 74 MILLION voters who make up our incredible movement!_
---
The longer they refuse to accept the reality that we are the UNDISPUTED FRONTRUNNER (leading by 50 and even 60 points!) and the _ONLY_ candidate crushing Crooked Joe by double digits, the more they _HELP_ salvage Biden’s failing campaign.

---
But they don’t care about loyalty to you, Patriot, or saving our country from Marxist tyranny for that matter...
---
The only thing they care about is furthering their own political ambitions.

---
Which is exactly why on the very same day that I was forced to testify in the SHAM TRIAL in New York, one of our RINO opponents chose to use that dark and disgraceful moment to __attack__ me online.

---
This is the same person who said that it would be a “fatal” mistake for the Republican Party to let me be the presidential nominee if Biden were to unjustly convict me.

---
_The only fatal mistake is these disloyal RINOs playing right into Crooked Joe’s hands!
_
---
**And that’s why I’m making a** _**_REAL_**_**loyalty pledge – a pledge to the ****_PEOPLE_****:**

---
And in turn, with just two months to go until the _FIRST_ contest of the primary, I ask that you consider contributing even just $1 to our Primary Victory Fund to help lock up the nomination ASAP.

_But of course, if you’re struggling right now because of Crooked Joe and his RINO enablers, then please don’t even think about donating. Very soon, we will win back the White House and America will come ROARING BACK! Don’t you worry._

name: Team Kennedy
subject: A Veterans Day Message From Robert F. Kennedy, Jr
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Veterans Day reflection regarding your service and sacrifice to our nation.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=1)
---
Peter, Happy Veterans Day! **If you're a veteran, I have a special message and a promise...**
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/veterans-day-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=2) I hope you and your families fill this Veterans Day with peaceful reflection regarding your service and sacrifice to this great nation. Also, I hope on this holiday, you will reconnect and deepen the bonds you have formed with fellow veterans. You may not have agreed with the policies that launched the wars you served in, or maybe your views changed during your service. Yet you showed the kind of willingness to sacrifice for something greater than yourself that our country needs so urgently today. When I am in the White House, I will convene a permanent Veterans Advisory Council with a seat on the National Security Council so that veterans have a say in future decisions of war and peace. You, who have sacrificed the most, are among the best qualified to guide us. **Read my more detailed plan for veterans[HERE](https://www.kennedy24.com/veterans-for-kennedy?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=3).** As I can only win this election with your help, I am asking that you **share your support on social media this weekend. Tell the world of your support with the hashtag****#KennedyVet, and my team will gladly amplify your voice.** Further, we’ve created a [**Facebook Community**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qJdRq_BCGKk51C3Oq3MQn7pYcKY7l3DQm4QUmqlr4MDeA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=4) so that you can connect with fellow [**Veterans For Kennedy**](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sAbiimTwRd6ssr23ZzK-qJdRq_BCGKk51C3Oq3MQn7pYcKY7l3DQm4QUmqlr4MDeA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=5). **Please[join](https://www.kennedy24.com/volunteer?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=6), participate, and [help build](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=7) this movement**. We need you, and with your help, we will rebuild our country in prosperity and freedom to meet the highest expectations of your patriotism. Thank you, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. Team Kennedy
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=8)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=veterans_day&n=9)

Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! name: James Carville
subject: I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Excuse my language, Peter, but I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED.
The news of Joe Manchin’s retirement is a HUGE BLOW to Democrats’ chances of holding their Senate majority.
With an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE more to retake the Senate, and you can bet that national Republicans will turn their full attention (and resources) to Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.
This race was already gearing up to be one of the most expensive Senate races of the year, but now GOP spending is going to skyrocket. If we’re going to re-elect Bob and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the gavel, we need all the grassroots support we can get.
**[That’s why I’m asking: Can you rush an urgent donation to Bob’s re-election campaign to stop national Republicans from buying this seat? Your action TODAY could make or break our Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-2?refcode=em20231110-2&refcode2=1106_552475_HDbSyx&akid=1106%2E552475%2EHDbSyx)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-2?refcode=em20231110-2&refcode2=1106_552475_HDbSyx&akid=1106%2E552475%2EHDbSyx)**
**The stakes couldn’t be more clear: If we lose Pennsylvania, it’s game over.** Democrats could lose the Senate majority AND the White House.
There’s no way in HELL I'm going to stand on the sidelines and let that happen. So I’m asking one more time: **[Will you rush $5 to Bob Casey’s campaign today to help his team raise the resources necessary to prepare for the tough fight ahead of us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231110-2?refcode=em20231110-2&refcode2=1106_552475_HDbSyx&akid=1106%2E552475%2EHDbSyx)**
Thank you for stepping up.
James Carville

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1106%2E552475%2EHDbSyx)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

body:
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73165348/437602720/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU1ZjdlYS0yMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFfUoTZf10Jeank_ljRPEbjbSKFxtFzZSyaw2_lEcE0=&emci=3348e5c3-1d80-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4f55f7ea-2080-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=19445147)

Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73165350/437602722/1610638071?refcode=em20231110pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4f55f7ea-2080-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU1ZjdlYS0yMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFfUoTZf10Jeank_ljRPEbjbSKFxtFzZSyaw2_lEcE0=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73165351/437602723/1610638071?refcode=em20231110pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=4f55f7ea-2080-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjU1ZjdlYS0yMDgwLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uFfUoTZf10Jeank_ljRPEbjbSKFxtFzZSyaw2_lEcE0=)

clean_body: In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! Hello, In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! = In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: So, I joined Truth Social…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Democrats, Independents, Republicans... we are all in search of the truth.

Friends -
Democrats, Independents, Republicans... We are all in search of the truth. That’s why I joined Donald Trump’s social media platform last year...
I joined to ask fellow truth-seekers why GDP growth in California outpaced all red states last year and why the top three fastest growing economies in the US are all led by Democrats?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2961?t=1&akid=1648%2E4767699%2Ezlqs1O)
I joined to ask those in pursuit of the truth why 7 of the 10 states most dependent on the federal government are Red States while Blue states make up 61% of the US Gross Domestic Product?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2962?t=2&akid=1648%2E4767699%2Ezlqs1O)
I joined to ask who thirsts for truth about the Red State murder problem and why 8 out of the top 10 states with the highest murder rates are Red states?
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2963?t=3&akid=1648%2E4767699%2Ezlqs1O)
We are not going to let Republican lies go unchecked. Not in this campaign, and not with so much at stake in California and in our country.
Today’s Republican party refuses to regulate assault weapons while gun violence is the leading cause of death of kids in America, but will champion the regulation of women's bodies and take away reproductive freedom.
They fan the flames of the culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth, and economic outcomes they are failing.
That's the truth.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeRNq3yGAVAxrxZM5si9aLx8AnwMdUhqs5q07It1LvuTUBKoZ-X_kmXx6C77wFtDaMlc6_HgB45WVLC8wO-sZO69GFdU9ZEqj-2yiSwr93hLVCWoM94G4voAzbiYjGJuNB_fWCFCl5o6SXXEBixNjlTaBinmgRLRLqi9EXMCmDmFHWd41HLuUIc_7BxZTqkFe4pwqRfgQkYr4Hac7ssWkgqfQVe_aTNRtvnVGfnL1WyAjKfAbd7tzhe4TRe7n2eocUqfgmW-cONK1Lpph-WNV70lqZPB9RGg-4pNVN2fKsHMqAY6bc7Q5tBEMDqxbl8goyfSH38oLoyp1gSI_5wsIGkHRxwT_DeTCnG9xZR_EMDrfHQxVF0pKSLXVNHHjGMwZvCDI-fMWl2s3t-QOlmRcqf8%3D)

Fellow American,

It’s probably not news to anyone reading this note that American universities are fertile breeding grounds for the far left.

In the early 2000s, George Bush-hating, anti-war on terrorism protesters flourished on campuses across the nation.

And I don’t have to remind you how ugly things got during the Trump years; we all remember how vile college conservatives were treated by fellow students AND their instructors!

**We must find a balance between protecting free speech on college campuses while reigning in the “Hate America First” organizations, professors, and student groups who only serve as a launching pad for people who want to destabilize our nation. **

Many of us in Congress are considering legislation to revoke the tax-exempt status these universities enjoy AS A PRIVILEDGE because they are, in theory, helping to educate and enrich American students so they can be the next leaders, innovators, and entrepreneurs to drive our country forward. But now, many of these universities have become little more than extremist breeding grounds for hatred of America and our values.

[**Do you think we should introduce a bill in the House to strip the tax-exempt status of universities who promote and celebrate the atrocities committed by terrorists?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeRNq3yGAVAxrxZM5si9aLx8AnwMdUhqs5q07It1LvuTUBKoZ-X_kmXx6C77wFtDaMlc6_HgB45WVLC8wO-sZO69GFdU9ZEqj-2yiSwr93hLVCWoM94G4voAzbiYjGJuNB_fWCFCl5o6SXXEBixNjlTaBinmgRLRLqi9EXMCmDmFHWd41HLuUIc_7BxZTqkFe4pwqRfgQkYr4Hac7ssWkgqfQVe_aTNRtvnVGfnL1WyAjbn_M6hZg1_foAMfVUXjPU1zS3LlDNXE6IfpkLnLVUzqDK1GdpUDc-m7jY3jwx7xlf7OrLwhQwW4PJ5MSGEi3JG3ux5896oOb3cFH3KN9CfmRTd1TyU6t5FBNF6KZOKLcqCACvTZkkwjsH4LoxOAg6-LYkDdJlwTPcI1oSSfSBErh1myP3DlCJNdzrQOoDGrd)

[ ** LET ME KNOW ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeRNq3yGAVAxrxZM5si9aLx8AnwMdUhqs5q07It1LvuTUBKoZ-X_kmXx6C77wFtDaMlc6_HgB45WVLC8wO-sZO69GFdU9ZEqj-2yiSwr93hLVCWoM94G4voAzbiYjGJuNB_fWCFCl5o6SXXEBixNjlTaBinmgRLRLqi9EXMCmDmFHWd41HLuUIc_7BxZTqkFe4pwqRfgQkYr4Hac7ssWkgqfQVe_aTNRtvnVGfnL1WyAjbn_M6hZg1_foAMfVUXjPU96LvEfpBZXGEhD52jYnQ6S9enTa8CAPskoO9Xe1WvyrCzMRbYNXN7TkDIYLRIc6s66dbUQ7PFwoQIKWvyg2_EtLlv6hhUQ-oqWk-OHB5DpfyZsSAfLdep7yGXlEAUGu_CrqzVQfgCfred867gVV9POxacNZfOIwfbJnuVCbxBTc)

As always, I appreciate your taking the time to let me and my team know where you stand on the most important issues of the day.

Sincerely,

Beth Van Duyne
Congresswoman (TX-24)

[ ** SUPPORT BETH TODAY ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeRNq3yGAVAxrxZM5si9aLx8AnwMdUhqs5q07It1LvuTUBKoZ-X_kmXx6C77wFtDaMlc6_HgB45WVLC8wO-sZO69GFdU9ZEqj-2yiSwr93hLVCWoM94G4voAzbiYjGJuNB_fWCFCl5o6SXXEBixNjlTaBinmgRLRLqi9EXMCmDmFHWd41HLuUIc_7BxZTqkFe4pwqRfgQkYr4Hac7ssWkgqfQVe_aTNRtvnVGfnL1WyAjbn_M6hZg1_foAMfVUXjPUwCrB_nFBkQHrr5aPy0yOB6dAxX_hvb0cQr1zy2PbH16DqajRAiyc_Stp9PKxrHXHuFDprg91qGRVN8K85943SZg0pfnlx9N_LyqvbR8H0QI3HBH5S3Z5oRri_b5cVjZZNvoSKNX0saY7zgrkrqt9-HnqZCtL1UtNa3qi5R1jsmq)

Follow Beth On Social Media
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeZUqL2NBSZOZoFLKHEVNPIFOaaSR3sV_GwQvWOQIvwWqhtdo-hPy3QTalGoffsAjcDzE5laNry-qdFjDqppzkHQ2rNjkieGGEMfVvnJMlYFxVcrggUXqyhUWyYx9diZM0-E3FcIPKQPg7-PXLvLSrj36SqliJt9JQcPoW-ERG4e3mx5o-JwSXTO9aIxvU9SCq1PHce35DrHnVEEI0KSYDdU%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeQaEY5tWlup_LucOuLOg2-Sexn_qcF89Tm48vAl2dZt1fKYSVlDbH1i7REdCt3WHoQGHLjqekEGLP4BxmgMsqyNUZq-olFm-foNUIvfN6YCy7zE7Lp7HaasziN5vGRUekuibVLSX2vXJ0ESuoPf4TZWR3eyOQkp4oSuEqRcQ9Qnpej9-6fzJJhxNDu3S_yL_xw%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeYVbX1JhAS2296lz2xD4jFL63IPlr1bjDDH_l70awAaC8QggP3_f9-Q1zoYXUSBdEwLAzRFt43QGZz7P8aAQ5Id48ZMR5cNM_EKPeRl7YLgWAJrMU4tVmp_D8JVD9jYAZ5idIv7va8u07ma2AInEdqFvcVa6gNn5NDHJhX8doDirc-Fy0IoVz8GuQZJU2gtV6owDapidVSvad5zmkarOkCY%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaedjQd-epStGHt34Vchl1oS5YGBt5UBh5jpDZ2xKcnp3lj88SbWJkMAgt7AKtkPjwPRuvICFvjGrf5w50rIIF4qWTPxIPI1xAe0v6jMiuPT1SBl7ZV4o-TD5uxt764sbr5yrHO4jJU6Xce_o0wuwXsYkMTe9xKynrG7RytnAiuPx57VzPBhg8WxZuoMPCndQ5sQDKeF0klwHte4mSKb9og8c%3D)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? **Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.** She’s been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. **Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. [ ** SUPPORT BETH ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3c5f00ae30274b98a69ff82189695bcd&_e=TvPufjAZEL126lHPpdAaeRNq3yGAVAxrxZM5si9aLx8AnwMdUhqs5q07It1LvuTUBKoZ-X_kmXx6C77wFtDaMlc6_HgB45WVLC8wO-sZO69GFdU9ZEqj-2yiSwr93hLVCWoM94G4voAzbiYjGJuNB_fWCFCl5o6SXXEBixNjlTaBinmgRLRLqi9EXMCmDmFHWd41HLuUIc_7BxZTqkFe4pwqRfgQkYr4Hac7ssWkgqfQVe_aTNRtvnVGfnL1WyAjKfAbd7tzhe4TRe7n2eocUhmq3EQa8THH5NF7a5qQuNZMgqGYEb4Ye8bfNuwuQFkMAWF0b2KGk-GLffLxIKWmbQOkuVvbwSGMSIEDSn4RFTiO74xjIxNfBLczQFlWV83D8KL8S3uhHAK6JVohKRcn2chi3HU01bTkW3diqZxUPOM%3D)

---

subject: Fresno Supervisor Buddy Mendes Endorses John Duarte

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0b5f12411a0c/john-duarte-launches-campaign-for-13th-congressional-district-9590537?e=76a47b375f)
---
| |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
November 10, 2023
Contact: Duane Dichiara
Phone: (916) 997-4784
---
| **Fresno Supervisor Buddy Mendes Endorses
Congressman John Duarte**** **
---
| | **Modesto, CA – **Today, Congressman John Duarte (R-CA13) proudly reports an endorsement from Fresno County Supervisor Buddy Mendes. Supervisor Mendes assumed office to the Fresno County Board of Supervisors in 2015 and was re-elected in 2018 and 2022. Buddy is a farmer in the Riverdale area, who has been very active in the community for over 20 years, including serving on the Riverdale Unified School District Board of Trustees and the Southwest Transportation Agency.

Regarding the endorsement, Supervisor Mendes said, "Since being elected to Congress, John Duarte has been very active in the community, always available to help or listen to our toughest challenges. In Washington, John continues to put the priorities of the Central Valley over partisan politics. I am proud to endorse him for Congress in 2024 and look forward to continuing to work with him.”

“I am grateful to have earned an endorsement from Supervisor Mendes,” says John. “Supervisor Mendes has been a local leader in Fresno County for decades. It’s been my pleasure serving alongside Buddy to address the challenges facing the Central Valley and advocate for working families.”

Please visit [www.johnduarteforcongress.com](https://johnduarteforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d614871a572868b235b65477d&id=98c864ad21&e=76a47b375f) for more information about the campaign.
